name: Kee Song Bio-Technology Holdings Limited
summary: Kee Song Bio-Technology Holdings Limited engages in the poultry and processing distribution, and farming business in Singapore, Malaysia, and Taiwan. The company also involves in importing, slaughtering, wholesaling, and retailing various types of poultry and consumable goods; layer and poultry farming; investment holding; property investment; processing and marketing of seafood and poultry related products; provision of supporting services for transportation; food catering; and manufacturing of poultry feed products. In addition, it offers whole chicken and cutting products. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Tehmag Foods Corporation
summary: Tehmag Foods Corporation operates in the baking industry in Taiwan. The company offers bread products, including margarine flour sheets, flours, flour milling products, instant yeasts, bread improvers, luctor/custido/carlex sprays, bread mixes, flavor powders and series, bread fillings, bread decorations, and sugars; dairy products, such as fl√É¬©chard sas, other creams, cheese, and dairy whipping creams; and pastry products comprising ingredients for cakes and mousses, waffle mixes, cocoa powders, jelly powders, nappage series/coatings, and ingredients for decor and gold powder. It also provides fruit products consisting of frozen purees, ambiet fruit purees, IQF fruits, frozen coulis, fruit filling series, decorative fruits, fruits preserves, and flavor series. In addition, the company offers liqueur and coffee beans, syrups, juices, and tea; chocolate products; cupcakes; tart shells, cones, savory lines, macarons, and croissants, as well as frozen food; packaging products; and molds, openers, and blades, as well as festival and western bakery products. Tehmag Foods Corporation was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kanpai Co., Ltd
summary: Kanpai Co., Ltd operates restaurants under the Kanpai brand in China. Its restaurants offer yakiniku and beer. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan. Kanpai Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of Tokyo Gas Co., Ltd.

name: SunWay Biotech Co., LTD.
summary: SunWay Biotech Co., LTD. focuses on professional research and development, and technical material manufacturing and processing business. The company researches, designs, and manufactures Monascus purpureus NTU 568; Lactobacillus paracasei subsp. paracasei NTU 101; and related products. It offers dietary supplements, fermented milk and soy-milk, and formula additives in form of capsules, powder sachets, liquid, and tablets. SunWay Biotech Co., LTD. was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Taihan Precision Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Taihan Precision Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells precision molds primarily for system integrators in worldwide. It offers plastic injection products; surface treatment products, such as painting, NCVM, and IMD products; and assembly/installation and welding products and services. The company's products comprise MFP related components; keyboard frames, keyboards, and handset key tops; mobility products, including handset housings, net book housings, DSC housings, and plastic components of digital photo frames; plastic components of photo printers; and projector housing and other plastic components. It is also involved in the mold and die development and fabrication of automotive plastic components. The company was formerly known as TaiHan Steel Mold Corp. and changed its name to Taihan Precision Technology Co., Ltd. in June 2000. Taihan Precision Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in engineering and manufacturing lightweight metal products primarily for the automotive industry. It provides forged aluminum wheels for luxury and sports automobiles; and engineering lightweight suspension components. The company has operations in Taiwan, the United States, the United Kingdom, Germany, other parts of Europe, Australia, Japan, and internationally. SuperAlloy Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Douliu City, Taiwan.

name: St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd.
summary: St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and supplies contact lens in Taiwan and internationally. It offers daily spherical, frequent replacement spherical, aberration control, toric frequent replacement, color, and silicone hydrogel soft contact lens, as well as lathe-cut, cast-molding, and RGP lenses. The company offers its products for myopic and hyperopic patients for the correction of astigmatism. The company was formerly known as First Optical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. in 1986. St.Shine Optical Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: De Poan Pneumatic Corp.
summary: De Poan Pneumatic Corp. manufactures and sells professional pneumatic tools worldwide. The company offers nailer products, including industrial and framing coil, cordless, framing, roofing, finishing, palm, and brad nailers; and staplers, cap tools, and pinners. It also provides air tools such as composite and aluminum wrench and air saw. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Sinmag Equipment Corporation
summary: Sinmag Equipment Corporation engages in the manufacture, retail, and wholesale of baking and food service equipment. The company offers bakery equipment, including spiral mixers, divider rounders, moulders, make up lines, sheeters, proofers, cake machines, planetary mixers, deck ovens, proofers, convection ovens, rack and tunnel ovens, slicers, refrigerators, workbenches, food service equipment, and others. It also provides kitchen equipment comprising pizza equipment, combi oven/convection oven/steamer, rotisseries, fryers, Chinese/western kitchen equipment, meat processing and refrigeration equipment, dishwashers, stainless steel sinks and tubes, and showcases. The company sells its products in Taiwan, China, the United States, and internationally. Sinmag Equipment Corporation was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: TopGreen Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: TopGreen Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various cutting tools in Taiwan and internationally. Its products comprise composite rods, mechanical cutting tools, micro cutting tools, tapping tools, PCB tools, medical tools, diamond tools, aircraft cutting tools, special molding tools, blanks, custom tools, precision punch tools, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: China Fineblanking Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: China Fineblanking Technology Co.,Ltd. develops and sells fine blanking products in China, Taiwan, and Malaysia. The company offers HDD VCM, gearbox parking and shifting mechanisms, door locks, hydraulic pumps, powertrains, brake parts, seat parts, gear boxes and clutches, gear box parts, synchronize rings, bicycling cassettes, and other products. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Inmax Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Inmax Holding Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells a range of fasteners primarily in the Southeast Asia region. It offers pneumatic and industrial nails; coil roofing nails for roofing, asphalt and fiberglass shingles, lathing, insulation board, vinyl siding, fiber cement roofing and siding, and waterproof tar paper applications; coil nails for use in wooden pallets and wooden boxes assembly, siding, decking, panel sheathing, and fencing; and staples for furniture and wooden box manufacturing, as well as for fastening works, such as architectural applications. The company also provides brads for use in finish, trim, drawers, and cabinets; and plastic strip and paper tape nails for framing, sheathing, sub flooring, roof decking, and exterior decks. Inmax Holding Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2009 and is headquartered in George Town, the Cayman Islands.

name: Taiwan Wax Company,Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Wax Company,Ltd. manufactures and sells refined wax in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers refined paraffin wax, microcrystalline wax, and light/heavy foots oil wax. It also imports and sells aquatic products, such as king crab and salmon. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Chiayi, Taiwan.

name: Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. operates as a pharmaceutical company primarily in Taiwan. The company provides parenterals, aseptic parenterals, lyophilized injections, pre-filled syringes, and pre-mixed IV infusion bags, as well as tablets, capsules, topical products, and oral suspensions. It offers various products in the areas of cardiovascular system, gastrointestinal system, nervous system, alimentary and metabolism, blood, antineoplastic and immunomodulatory, musculo-skeletal system, respiratory system, dermatological, genito-urinary and sex hormone, systemic hormone, systemic antibacterial, and cosmetics, as well as hospital solution. Nang Kuang Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1963 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: BIONET Corp.
summary: BIONET Corp. engages in the cell therapy business in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers stem cell banking services, such as stem cell storage, mesenchymal stem cell storage, dental stem cell storage, adipose stem cell, and PBSC and immune cells; and genetic testing services. It also provides storage and application of hematopoietic stem cells; regenerative medicine, analytical testing, clinical and preclinical research, and commercialized cell-derived products; and Exosome, a cell-free therapy. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: GeneFerm Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: GeneFerm Biotechnology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, markets, and sells fermented products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers a range of raw materials, such as fermented microbial, fungi, and fruits and vegetables products; probiotics; and herbal extracts and animal derived peptides and powders. It also provides ODM, as well as fermentation toll manufacturing services to companies for the development and manufacture of dietary supplements, functional foods, health food products, and various applications. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Easywell Biomedicals, Inc.
summary: Easywell Biomedicals, Inc., a biopharmaceutical and medical device company, develops and commercializes medical devices, drug substances, and pharmaceutical dosage forms in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers pharmaceutical products, which include high-barrier generics for the treatment of anti-cough, anti-urinary incontinence, breast cancer in PMS women, anti-depression, prevention of pneumocystis pneumonia, epilepsy, chronic angina, and inflammatory lesions of rosacea; and 505(b)(2) drugs for the treatment of Parkinson's, urinary, and pneumonia diseases. It also provides medical devices, including digital clinical, infrared ear, and non-contact forehead infrared thermometers. The company was formerly known as Actherm Inc. and changed its name to Easywell Biomedicals, Inc. in July 2015. Easywell Biomedicals, Inc. was incorporated in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Polylite Taiwan Co., Ltd.
summary: Polylite Taiwan Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes GIA polycarbonate lenses worldwide. Its products include FSV, SFSV, progressive, KID, and polarized lens. The company also offers dispending, fitting, and edging and finishing services. Polylite Taiwan Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Fulltech Fiber Glass Corp.
summary: Fulltech Fiber Glass Corp. produces and sells fiber glass yarn and fabrics in Taiwan. It offers electronic grade fiber glass yarn for use in the manufacture of fiber glass fabric, printed circuit boards, desktop and laptop computers, cellular phones, PDAs, and projection cloths, as well as industrial grade fiber glass yarn for use in the manufacture of insulation tubes. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Feng Ching Metal Corporation
summary: Feng Ching Metal Corporation produces and sells copper wires and enameled copper wires primarily for use in electronic, electrical appliance, and communication technology industries in Taiwan and internationally. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Sheh Kai Precision Co., Ltd.
summary: Sheh Kai Precision Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells bi metal screws, screw anchors, and screws in Taiwan and internationally. It offers bi-metal window, concrete, self tapping, self drilling, and wing screws, as well as self piercing screws and side lap screws; hammer and diamond drill bits, and dust caps; and bi-metal concrete screw anchors, bi-metal concrete anchor stainless steel internal thread heads, galvanized concrete screw anchors, and galvanized concrete screw anchors internal thread heads. The company also provides wood screws, stainless steel self-tapping screw sharps/blue points, special fasteners, hex lag screws, double end hanger bolts, carriage bolts, and automotive fasteners. Its products are used in various applications, such as roof wall steel fastening, curtain wall window, and concrete anchor systems, as well as concrete anchor products. The company was formerly known as Sheh Kai Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Sheh Kai Precision Co., Ltd. in 2003. Sheh Kai Precision Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Camellia Metal Co., Ltd.
summary: Camellia Metal Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells steel bars and wires in Taiwan. It offers low-carbon, middle-carbon, high-carbon, free cutting, spring, alloy, and stainless steel bars and wires. The company's products are used in motor and mechanical axis, as well as axis of business machines; screwdrivers, hex wrenches, and sockets; torsion and balance bars, and automotive coil springs; and medical and aerospace technologies, household appliances, and high-precision and other materials. Its products are also used in cars, bridges, steel, and screws and other building materials; and electronics, telecommunications, and IT industries. The company was founded in 1971 and is based in Changhua County, Taiwan.

name: Sheh Fung Screws Co., Ltd.
summary: Sheh Fung Screws Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells screws primarily in Taiwan. The company provides various screws, including self-drilling, timber construction, drywall, chipboard, self-tapping, decking, self-piercing screws, and other screws. It also offers hammer drill bits, customized fastener parts, kaitex coatings, and packing boxes. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Sumeeko Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: Sumeeko Industries Co., Ltd. manufactures, repairs, and sells automotive parts, hardware parts, mechanical parts, and screws. It offers power trains, suspensions, transmissions, exhausts, chassis, and interior parts for use in automobiles; appliances; and products for use in mechanism, construction, and other applications. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures fastener equipment worldwide. The company offers sorter machines for screw/bolt, nut/washer, rod/stud, and eddy current series; second hand machines; and accessories for sorting machines. It also provides screw and bolt making machines, including standard and long stroke bolt, bolt parts, and high performance formers; process monitoring products; automated guided vehicle systems comprising warehouse and transferring robots; and intellectual automation production integration. Ching Chan Optical Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells butt-welding pipe fittings and high purity components in Taiwan. The company offers stainless steel butt-welding pipe fittings, such as elbows, tees, reducers, caps, stub ends, etc.; and UHP components, including high purity pipes and pipe fittings, metal gasket face seal fittings, micro butt-welding fittings, LoK-DJ compression fittings, UHP CGA/DISS fittings, diaphragm and ball valves, valve manifold boxes, and special chemical storage tanks. Its butt-welding pipe fittings are used in the areas of petrochemical, ship building, foods, sugar making, paper production, chemical engineering, agricultural chemical, dyeing, synthetic fibers, liquid chemical, gas, industries piping, construction drainage pipe fitting, etc.; and UHP components have applications in the areas of semiconductor, LCD-TFT, solar energy, LED, food industry, chemical piping, gas, liquid, construction pipe fitting, etc. Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. also exports its products to Japan, Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, France, Germany, Ireland, England, the United States, Australia, New Zealand, China, and the Gulf Region. The company was formerly known as Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Limited Company and changed its name to Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. in 1977. Tachia Yung Ho Machine Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1943 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: C.T.I. Traffic Industries Co., Ltd.
summary: C.T.I. Traffic Industries Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells auto engine parts in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers green power products; DLC piston rings comprising black diamond piston rings; gasoline engine oil rings, such as car and auto oil, car piston, engine oil, and piston ring expanders; diesel engine oil rings, including cast iron rings; liner kits; piston kits; and timing kits and components, timing guides, and timing chains, as well as tensioners, and cam and crank gears. It also provides overhaul engine gaskets, which include CYL heads, cylinder head gaskets, automotive and engine oil seals, valve covers, oil pans, and valve stem and engine valve seals, as well as intake, exhaust, and pipe manifolds; engine valves consisting of auto engine valves, engine valve seats, engine bearings, and engine valve guides; and carburetor kits. In addition, the company offers hydraulic brake systems, such as break, master, brake wheel, and brake master cylinders; compression rings, including hook, step, inside cut, under cut, notch, both-side keystone, slip in, and copper plated rings; and jump starters. Its products are used automotive, agriculture, off-highway, and heavy-duty trucks applications. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Kaison Green Energy Technology Co., LTD
summary: Kaison Green Energy Technology Co., LTD researches and develops, produces, assembles, and sells electric vehicles. The company is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Shining Victory Motor Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Shining Victory Motor Electronic Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of automotive components. It offers optoelectronic products, automotive electronics, and automotive metal and plastic decorative parts, including car door illuminating welcome pedals, car interior light bar ambient lights, shifting atmosphere lights, sun visors, luggage racks, bright strips, etc. The company is based in George Town, the Cayman Islands.

name: Young Shine Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: Young Shine Electric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automotive a/c components in Taiwan. The company offers automotive a/c compressors, heat exchangers, and parts. It also exports its products internationally. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: ReaLy Development & Construction Corp.
summary: ReaLy Development & Construction Corp. engages in the land development and administration, and construction management businesses in Taiwan. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Franbo Lines Corp.
summary: Franbo Lines Corp. provides ocean transport and shipping agency services through bulk and general cargo vessels in Taiwan and internationally. Its operating and forwarding business focuses on the transportation of steel, logs, chemical products, and mechanic equipment primarily through Asia and Pacific Regions. The company also owns and charters ocean going and Far East vessels to Japanese shipping companies, as well as offers freight forwarding services. In addition, it offers vessel management services, which include safety, international ship security, and manning management services. Further, the company is involved in the long- and short-term vessel chartering, and freight brokering businesses, as well as provision of technical, marine supply, ship inspection, and insurance claim services. Franbo Lines Corp. was founded in 1998 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Soonest Express Co., Ltd.
summary: Soonest Express Co., Ltd. provides integrated logistics solutions in Taiwan, Asia, and the United States. It offers air and ocean freight forwarding services; custom clearance services; transit/warehouse/transportation services; and courier services. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Pleasant Hotels International Inc.
summary: Pleasant Hotels International Inc. engages in the operation of a hotel in Taiwan. The company's hotel features 388 guest rooms, as well as wedding and meeting halls; and a business center, swimming pool, fitness center, and restaurant. Pleasant Hotels International Inc. is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Yummy Town (Cayman) Holdings Corporation
summary: Yummy Town (Cayman) Holdings Corporation engages in the sale and service of food and beverage chain to sell various leisure tea and beverages, snacks, and light meals. It also franchises various brands. The company operates its business under the Real Brew Tea, Happy Lemon, Tai Quan Trading, THE SPICELAND, RBT TEA CAFE, Tea Opal, Hippo Bobatea, and Alma brands. It operates in Mainland China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, the Philippines, South Korea, the United States, the United Kingdom, Australia, the Middle East, and other countries. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.

name: TTFB Company Limited
summary: TTFB Company Limited operates a chain of restaurants in Taiwan and internationally. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Miramar Hospitality Co.,Ltd
summary: Miramar Hospitality Co.,Ltd engages in the hotel business in Taiwan. The company operates Miramar Garden Taipei, a 5-star international business and tourist hotel that provides accommodation services, including deluxe rooms, business rooms, executive deluxe rooms, boss suites, and premier suites; dining services under the Rain Forest, Light Caf√É¬©, JIU BAR, and Tic-Tac-Toe Bakery names; and conference services, such as conference rooms, and wedding and banquets. It also provides health club, fitness center, outdoor swimming pool, sauna, fitness club membership, and business center facilities. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan. Miramar Hospitality Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Tze Shin International Co. Ltd.

name: La Kaffa International Co., Ltd.
summary: La Kaffa International Co., Ltd. operates cafes that provides tea, Taiwanese traditional desserts, set meals, coffee and bakery products, and Chinese food products in Taiwan and internationally. Its brand portfolio includes Chatime, ZenQ Dessert, La Kaffa Coffee, Wagokoro Tonkatsu Anzu Ginza, Bake Code, Duan Chun Zhen, Osaka Ohsho Taiwan, ChuNian Shabu Shabu and Chatime Lounge. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Zhubei City, Taiwan.

name: Vigor Kobo Co., LTD.
summary: Vigor Kobo Co.,Ltd. develops, produces, and sells Chinese cakes and pastries in Taiwan and internationally. It offers pineapple, red-in-green mini, chestnut mini, black stick mini, milk sun, cheese honey, and taro mini cakes, as well as beef jerky. The company provides its products through its stores. Vigor Kobo Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ezfly International Travel Agent Co., Ltd.
summary: Ezfly International Travel Agent Co., Ltd. operates as an online travel agency in Taiwan. The company offers ticket purchase and booking services; and sells domestic air tickets, foreign individual air tickets, and foreign group air tickets. It also provides domestic and international reservation, group travel, mini tour, group and airline free travel, and themed tickets, as well as foreign dynamic packaging free travel, themed project travel, domestic high-speed rail holiday travel, domestic bus travel, various European and Japanese railway ticket, visa, and other travel products. The company offers its services through its ezfly.com website. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Hoya Resort Hotel Group
summary: Hoya Resort Hotel Group operates hotels, resorts, and spas in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Beinan, Taiwan.

name: Mr. Onion International Co., Ltd
summary: Mr. Onion International Co., Ltd provides catering services in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Renjie Oldsichuan Catering Management Consultant Co., Ltd.
summary: Renjie Oldsichuan Catering Management Consultant Co., Ltd. operates a chain of catering facilities in Harbin, Mainland China, and Taiwan. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Richmond International Travel & Tours Co.,Ltd
summary: Richmond International Travel & Tours Co.,Ltd provides travel transportation services under the Shan Fu Tourism brand. It offers passenger services, such as passport visa, Wi-fi rental, translator/headset, and tourism encyclopedia; and professional services, such as outbound, inbound, and national tourism, as well as ticket ordering service. The company offers its products through an e-commerce platform. Richmond International Travel & Tours Co.,Ltd was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Life Travel & Tourist Service Co., Ltd.
summary: Life Travel & Tourist Service Co., Ltd. provides group tourism products and services to domestic and foreign tourists in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD.
summary: Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD. operates a hotel in Taiwan. The company operates the Orchard Park Hotel, an international tourist hotel with business, holiday, and transit functionalities in Taoyuan's Aerotropolis. Its hotel includes 187 guestrooms, such as deluxe king, executive rooms, Washitsu suites, executive suites, park view suites, and orchard suites. The company also provides Hee Yuet Lau Chinese restaurant, Orchard Caf√É¬©, Hanamizuki Japanese cuisine, Atrium Bar, Oasis club, banquet hall, conference room, shopping street, and business center services, as well as ball room, meeting room, pavilion, and spa services. Hotel Orchard Park CO., LTD. was founded in 2009 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Tofu Restaurant Co., Ltd.
summary: Tofu Restaurant Co., Ltd engages in the chain restaurant business in Taiwan. It is also involved in the food manufacturing business. Tofu Restaurant Co., Ltd was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Bafang Yunji International Company Limited
summary: Bafang Yunji International Company Limited operates and franchises restaurants under the BAFANG YUNJI name. The company operates approximately 700 stores in Taiwan; and 100 stores in Hong Kong. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kura Sushi Asia Co., Ltd.
summary: Kura Sushi Asia Co., Ltd. operates sushi restaurant in Taiwan. Its restaurants offer sushi, warship, hand roll, volume, and side meal products, as well as desserts and drinks. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: YoungQin International Co., Ltd.
summary: YoungQin International Co., Ltd. operates restaurants under the MWD brand name. It also operates retail stores that offer fried chicken products under the Fried Chicken Master name. The company has operations in Taiwan and internationally. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Lian Fa International Dining Business Corp.
summary: Lian Fa International Dining Business Corporation operates various restaurants. It operates restaurants under the brands of Sharetea, Mamak, and Kampung. The company is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Munsin Garment Corporation
summary: Munsin Garment Corporation manufactures and trades in various knitwear garments in Taiwan. The company offers golf apparel, lightweight sportswear, professional bicycles, equestrian sports products, casual wear, cue bags, handbags, protective accessories, special clothing, sneakers, shirts, trousers, and sporting products, as well as jogging, tennis, and football series products. It is also involved in the product distribution, import, and export businesses. Munsin Garment Corporation provides its products under the Munsingwear, Le coq sportif, Felix Buhler, McGREGOR, HAZZYS, ACUPUNCTURE, NARA CAMICIE, Eminento, As know as de base, POU DOU DOU, and Danskin brands. The company was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited
summary: Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited researches, develops, manufactures, and sells various baby apparel and supplies in Taiwan and internationally. It operates through General Merchandise Retailing and Restaurant Entertainment segments. The company offers children's clothing, and baby and children's products, including maternity products, breastfeeding supplies, weaning products, cleaning and care products, cotton-fiber products, inner wear, etc. under the Piyopiyo, Abby Bear, and Kaeru brand names. It also provides catering services; franchises Piyo CASA family restaurant; and leases plant. Cayman Tung Ling Co., Limited was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: The Eslite Spectrum Corporation
summary: The Eslite Spectrum Corporation operates department stores and shopping malls in Taiwan. It also provides real estate analysis, investment planning, and operation management services. The company engages in the engineering service, catering supplies, retail store and equipment businesses; operation of retail outlets; and supply of professional kitchen/laundry equipment, hotel supplies, exquisite cuisine, wine cellars, and catering stores. Further, it operates a hotel under the Songyan √Ç¬ëEslite Travel' name. The company operates 43 stores. It provides its planning, design, sales, installation, and after sales services to international tourist hotels and fast food chain stores, coffee chain stores, Chinese and Western restaurants, clubs, sky kitchens, hospitals, and staff restaurants. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan. The Eslite Spectrum Corporation is a subsidiary of The Eslite Co., Ltd.

name: Redhorse Group Co.Ltd.
summary: Redhorse Group Co.Ltd. engages in the gift sales, and education and entertainment business operations in Japan and internationally . It operates through three segments: Souvenir Sales, E-commerce Sales, and Other. The company provides support to direct trading between suppliers and restaurants under the OWL brand name; souvenirs; disaster prevention consulting services that offer storage batteries during a disaster; and green drinks, supplement to deal with the sleeping environment, as well as operates game/esports facility, and guesthouses and hostels. In addition, it is involved in the communication, e-commerce, real estate, hometown tax, and regional industry support and revitalization businesses. Redhorse Group Co.Ltd. was founded in 1964 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.

name: Gseven Co., Ltd.
summary: Gseven Co., Ltd. sells consumer electronic products in Taiwan. The company offers audio, TV projection, health and beauty, digital, and life style products, as well as horn and air conditioning systems, Home theaters, and household and kitchen appliances. It also sells its products through department store counters and outlets. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Bedding World Co., Ltd.
summary: Bedding World Co., Ltd. engages in the wholesale and retail of furniture, bedding, kitchen utensils, and decorative products in Taiwan. It primarily offers mattresses and beddings. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Jing-Jan Retail Business Co., Ltd.
summary: Jing-Jan Retail Business Co., Ltd. owns and operates a shopping mall. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan. Jing-Jan Retail Business Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Radium Life Technology Co., Ltd.

name: Bausen Inc.
summary: Bausen Inc. provides home improvement materials in Taiwan and internationally. It offers hardwood flooring, engineered flooring, laminate flooring, and WPC composite flooring products; and floor coverings, moldings, cabinet systems, marble and stone countertops, and home improvement materials and accessories. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Astro Corporation
summary: Astro Corporation develops, produces, and operates digital games, systems, and software and hardware for gaming and lottery products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers various self-service betting halls, monitor centers, and lottery games; casino and multi player games; cabinets; and lottery, VLT, and casino management systems. It also provides digital entertainment and casual software machine rental and point of sales customization, as well as product outsourcing services. The company is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Oasis Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Oasis Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and produces light emitting diode (LED) and related components worldwide. The company offers digit LED, surface mount device (SMD) LED, dot matrix, and light bar display products; chip and PLCC type SMD LED products; LED lamps; and indoor lighting products, including light tubes. It also provides commercial lighting products, including spot lights, downlights, track lights, cabinet lights, and street lights; high power LED products; printed circuit board (PCB) products; and plastic molds and injections, and PCB and LED packaging products. The company sells is product under the Oasistek brand name. Taiwan Oasis Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Phonic Corporation
summary: Phonic Corporation manufactures and sells professional audio products in the United States, Hong Kong, Guatemala, Turkey, Chile, and internationally. It offers speakers, including intelligent audio systems, mobile PA systems, studio monitors, line arrays, and PA speakers; analog, digital, and contractor amplifiers; analog, digital, and powered mixers; wireless/conference systems, microphones, and antenna AMP systems; test instruments; signal processors; and automatic audio and video equipment. The company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Adda Corporation
summary: Adda Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells electronic thermal management products primarily for the information technology industry worldwide. The company offers CPU cooler modules, blower fans, DC axial-flow/blower fans, AC axial-flow fans, and waterproof fans; thermal modules; and accessories, such as metal finger guards and plastic filters. Adda Corporation was incorporated in 1978 and is based in Pingtung, Taiwan.

name: Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd.
summary: Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd. operates as a professional consumer electronic IC application design company in Taiwan. It offers Wi-Fi cam solutions, baby monitors, and products for consumer applications, as well as supplies electronic components. The company also provides various products for game applications consisting of fit life, TV game, and gogo TV; and multimedia applications comprising car black box, mobile media player, MP3 player, TV box, PMP/learning aids, and boombox. It also markets its products in the United States, Japan, Europe, Mainland China, etc. Teamphon Energy Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Channel Well Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Channel Well Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells power supply products worldwide. It offers PC and IPC power supply, industrial power supply, wireless charging transmitter and receiver, LED lighting driver/power, enclosed switching power, and open frame power products, as well as telecom power systems, wireless chargers/power banks, adapters, USB chargers, power cables/electronic wires, magnetic components, heat sinks, and electric vehicle chargers. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: LandMark Optoelectronics Corporation
summary: LandMark Optoelectronics Corporation produces and supplies gallium arsenide (GaAS) and indium phosphide (InP) based epitaxial wafers for optical communication, industrial application, and special-purpose usages in Taiwan, the United States, Mainland China, and internationally. It offers InP laser diode (LD) epi wafers for use in LDs used for optics communications; photo-detector epi wafers for use in photo detectors, avalanched detectors, and laser efficiency monitoring for optics communications; and GaAs LD epi wafers for use in high-efficiency laser manufacturing, bar code scanners, GPS systems, 3D sensors, detectors for Lidar autonomous cars, aesthetic medicine machines, and information center communication equipment, as well as provides optical semi-conductors, LDs, and InAlGaP/AlGalnAs. In addition, the company provides Zn-diffusion services for photo detectors; and grating forming and regrowth services for distributed feedback, as well as selected area growth services. LandMark Optoelectronics Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Chinese Gamer International Corporation
summary: Chinese Gamer International Corporation operates as an online game research and development company in Taiwan. It provides mobile and online game services. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Newretail Co., Ltd
summary: Newretail Co., Ltd operates as an Internet company in Taiwan. The company offers foreign trade e-commerce services; virtual hosting, and other basic services; and search engine and digital marketing services, as well as electronic information supply services to foreign trade manufacturers. It engages in the production and installation of computer web pages, web search optimization login, keyword marketing, and computer advertising design and agency services; and clothes business. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs and sells computer software and hardware. It also engages in trading activities; and provision of game software and information software programming services. The company was formerly known as Wayi International Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. in June 2000. Wayi International Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Axiomtek Co., Ltd.
summary: Axiomtek Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells PC-based industrial computer products and peripherals worldwide. The company offers industrial PCs, single board computers, system on modules, fanless and rugged embedded systems, intelligent transportation systems, industrial Internet of Things gateway, industrial EtherCAT master solution, touch panel computers, medical panel computers, digital signage solutions, and network appliances products. It also provides road application platform, digital electronic signage, transportation application platform, industrial Internet of Things gateway, touch tablets, etc. The company's products are used in industrial automation, outdoor information booths, renewable energy, traffic control, shipbuilding, medical care, and other application markets. In addition, it develops software packages for AMS smart remote monitoring programs and data collection used in smart factories, smart energy, green energy, and other industries; and cloud application server and network security application platform products for future big data cloud applications. Axiomtek Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Hotron Precision Electronic Industrial Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hotron Precision Electronic Industrial Co.,Ltd. manufactures and supplies various wires and cables for signal transmission, telecommunication, IT, power, auto, medical appliances, and other industries in Taiwan. It offers electronic, electric, and other wires and cables. The company also provides copper rods, wires, and fine wires; tooling for metal press/plastic injection; metal pressed work products; insulation composite Mylar Al. foils; and various wire cables and PC board connectors. In addition, it offers terminals, wire assemblies, and molds; PVC plastic formulations and pellets; and plastic extrusion and injection products. Hotron Precision Electronic Industrial Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Howteh Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Howteh Technology Co., Ltd. provides active and passive components, and equipment in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers connector, FFC, thunderbolt cable, MEMS, coaxial cable, conversion line, USB type C, audio amplifier, and LED controller products, as well as power management, radio frequency, and touch components. It also provides printed circuit boards and optoelectronic equipment. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Tecstar Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Tecstar Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of inductors in Taiwan. It offers multilayer chip beads and inductors, including multilayer ferrite chip beads, multilayer chip inductors, and multilayer common mode filters; SMD power inductors and EMI beads, such as SMD power inductors, SMD common mode chokes, and wound chip beads and inductors; and Ni-Zn soft ferrite cores that include EMI suppression ferrite cores and SMD power inductor cores. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Megawin Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Megawin Technology Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, designs and sells ICs primarily in Taiwan. The company offers 8051 MCU and Cortex-M0 products; and USB products, including full speed MCUs, USB keyboards/mouses/joysticks, USB bridges, and charge ICs. It also provides firmware tool kits, such as ICE, writer, and ISP programmer. The company was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Jhubei City, Taiwan.

name: UltraChip Inc.
summary: UltraChip Inc. operates as a fabless IC company in the mobile multimedia IC industry. It researches and develops, manufactures, and sells LCD display driver ICs. The company offers professional display products for consumers, automotive, and industrial sectors. It also provides bistable display products comprising pure driver and Tcon, segment type driver, and single chip products; and motor products, such as BLDC control, motor driver, and high and low side driver ICs. The company offers its products for factory automation control, medical equipment, automotive devices, mobile devices, etc. It operates in Taiwan, China, the United States, Japan, and internationally. UltraChip Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: ThinFlex Corporation
summary: ThinFlex Corporation manufactures and sells flexible copper clad laminates (FCCL) and related materials in Asia, Europe, and the Americas. The company offers thin, high heat resistant, high transmittance/transparency, and asymmetric FCCL; black/white/phosphate free coverlays; composite coverlays; high-shield nano materials; composite stiffener films; RCC materials; and polyimide related laminates. It serves IC packaging industry. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. ThinFlex Corporation is a subsidiary of Arisawa Mfg. Co., Ltd.

name: Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd.
summary: Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd. provides IT infrastructure and integration services in Taiwan. The company offers computer system products, including servers, workstations, notebooks, pads, and printer systems; and storage and big data integration services, as well as designs, builds, integrates, and sells thin client systems. It also provides network products, such as firewall and intrusion detection systems, building green IDC, switch hubs, routers, network interface cards, and wireless network products, as well as international system management and planning and digital surveillance systems. In addition, the company offers security software, file and database audit software, anti-virus, anti-hacker, SPAM, VM ware, and back-up software; building private cloud; and BYOD solutions, as well as integrates and sells encrypting file system and file management software. Further, it provides various professional services comprising maintenance contract, on-site maintenance, IT consultation, project management, and cloud rental and security services. Jetwell Computer Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Syncomm Technology Corp.
summary: Syncomm Technology Corp. operates as a fabless semiconductor company worldwide. It offers portable products, wireless SOC integrating audio and data processors, and wireless digital modules for use in smart TVs, computers, and mobile devices, as well as PC peripheral, console gaming, portable accessory, and home audio applications. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Advanced Ceramic X Corporation
summary: Advanced Ceramic X Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells RF front-end devices and modules for wireless communication applications in Taiwan, China, the United States, Hong Kong, and internationally. It offers antenna switch modules; antennas; low pass, high pass, and band pass filters, as well as filter arrays; diplexers, triplexers, and saw-triplexers; baluns and baluns filters; couplers and couplers filters; power dividers; high frequency inductors; Bluetooth modules; and RF chip ceramic devices. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu County, Taiwan.

name: SysJust Co., Ltd.
summary: SysJust Co., Ltd. operates as a financial technology company in Taiwan. It offers various platforms, including XQ Global Winner, XS strategy radar, and XQ mobile platform; WQ new VIP viewing room; MoneyDJ; Lok Fu Finance channel for data analysis and reading on smart phones, tablets, and computers; and database. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Browave Corporation
summary: Browave Corporation operates as an original equipment manufacturing/original design manufacturing development, production, and sales company in the optical fiber communication industry in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include compact coarse wavelength division multiplexers and demultiplexers; splitter modules; add/drop filters; amplifier components consisting of isolators and gain flattening filters; fused biconic taper WBC/WDM coupler and planar lightwave circuit splitters; fan-out cabling systems, adapters, and patchcords/pigtails; MPO/MTP cables; and fiber arrays, collimators, and pigtails. The company also provides optical devices and optical module products, such as isolators, couplers, DWDM, IPD, EDFA, ROSA, BOSA, etc. Its products are used in long haul communications network, metropolitan area network, central office fiber-to-the-home, and cloud data center applications. In addition, the company provides contract manufacturing services. Browave Corporation was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: ASIX Electronics Corporation
summary: ASIX Electronics Corporation, an IC Design company, supplies fabless semiconductors with focus on networking, communication, and connectivity applications. The company provides industrial, SuperSpeed USB, and Non-PCI/SPI embedded Ethernet ICs, as well as interface ICs; and RS-232/RS-485 UART transceivers and USB KVM Switch/Wi-Fi/Ethernet SoCs. It offers its products for smart factory, industrial automation, industrial IoT, smart home and office, PC and peripheral, interface connectivity, and USB KVM switch applications. ASIX Electronics Corporation was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Xin Chio Global Co., Ltd.
summary: Xin Chio Global Co., Ltd. engages in the sale of packaging materials. It provides tapes, electronic packaging materials, buffer packaging materials, plastic bags, packaging machines, paper packaging products, and others. The company is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Medigen Biotechnology Corp.
summary: Medigen Biotechnology Corp. focuses on the development of therapies for liver diseases and cancers in Taiwan. It offers cell therapies, such as MAGICELL-NK, which are natural killer cells; and MAGICELL-GDT, which are T cells. The company develops PI-88 (MUPAFOSTAT), which has completed Phase II clinical trial for use as an adjuvant therapy for HCC after curative surgery; and Phase III trial for the adjuvant treatment of patients with hepatitis virus related hepatocellular carcinoma after surgical resection. It also provides OBP-301 that is in a Phase I clinical trials for the treatment of esophageal cancer, and Phase II clinical trials for the treatment of esophageal and gastric cancer. In addition, the company develops human native mAbs for therapeutic applications related to infectious diseases; and molecular diagnostics, vaccine, and generic drugs. Medigen Biotechnology Corp. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Gongin Precision Ind. Co., Ltd
summary: Gongin Precision Ind. Co., Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells IC assembly molds and tools in Taiwan. It offers auto mold chase, and MGP and conventional molds; and wafer fabrication equipment components, such as standard and critical/clean room module components, subsystem assembly and test components, and supply chain and system level assembly and testing components. The company also provides display equipment components, including electros, reactors, ground shields, frames, floating masks, chambers, nozzles, TCP/COF, and test fixtures. In addition, it offers landing gear actuators; engine components comprising combustion and transition liners, compressor vanes and retainer rings, hula seals, and other engine hot section sheet metal parts; motion control components, such as servo valve body/housing, servo valve components, relief valve-hydraulics, and actuators; and machined components for the aerospace industry. Further, the company provides micro turbine and combustion generator components, and micro turbine engines; and servo valves for industrial machinery, vehicles, and aviation applications. Gongin Precision Ind. Co., Ltd was founded in 1978 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: MicroBase Technology Corp.
summary: MicroBase Technology Corp. provides drug delivery systems to patients and healthcare professionals. It specializes in Laser LIGA, a non-silicon-based micromachining technology that is used in the manufacture and development of miniaturized devices and micron-scale parts. The company provides vibrating mesh nebulizers under the Pocket Air name for the home care and hospital sectors; and micro-infusion skin care products under the PharMatrix name. MicroBase Technology Corp. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells electronic parts and materials. It offers SMD transformer wire racks, bakelite transformer wire racks, plastic transformer wire racks, plastic bakelite engineering products, intelligent parking equipment, artificial intelligence algorithms, and smart parking equipment, as well as integrated chip design services. The company also engages in the tourism business. Hold Jinn Electronics Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: High-Tek Harness Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: High-Tek Harness Enterprise Co., Ltd. produces and sells various computer parts and communication equipment. The company offers electronic wires, coaxial cables, and wires. It also engages in the steel structure and engineering projects, and paper businesses. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Sagittarius Life Science Corp
summary: Sagittarius Life Science Corporation operates as a biotechnology research company. It engages in the development of Chinese herbal medicine technology platform for the treatment of various diseases. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Kingstate Electronics Corp.
summary: Kingstate Electronics Corp. manufactures and sells acoustic products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers various products, including piezo buzzers, magnetic buzzers, micro speakers, dynamic receivers, Bluetooth speakers, and electret condenser microphones; and audio products, such as earphones, wired and wireless headphones, Bluetooth headphones, sports headphones, gaming headphones, TWS products, wireless speakers, and PSAP products; speaker module/mic module products; and personal sound amplifiers, etc. The company also provides OEM/ODM smart devices, including personal safety and wireless alarms, VoIP systems, anti-lost devices, smart doorbells, and IP speakers. The company offers its products for use in telecommunications, consumer electronics, information technology, home appliances, automotive, security, medical, and industrial equipment related industries. Kingstate Electronics Corp. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells transformers and inductors in Taiwan and internationally. It offers low frequency, LLC, flyback, LED, and flat wire transformers; and standard reactors. The company also provides FT, T, UU, and ET series common mode chokes; iron, DR, and R core chokes, as well as PFC and high current chokes. Its products are used in LCD monitors and TVs, cell phones, personal computers, TVs, and information appliances. Yao Sheng Electronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Dynapack International Technology Corporation
summary: Dynapack International Technology Corporation designs, manufactures, and supplies portable battery packs in Taiwan. The company offers its products for various applications, including notebook/ultrabook PCs, tablet PCs/e-books, smartphones, handy scanners, 2-way radios, power banks, cable modems, server UPSs, and e-bike batteries. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Mildef Crete Inc.
summary: Mildef Crete Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells computer systems worldwide. It provides notebook, tablet, and handheld PCs. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Argosy Research Inc.
summary: Argosy Research Inc. produces and sells electronic connectors and system products. The company's products include electronic connectors, such as USB3.1 type-C, DDR3/4/5, M.2(NGFF), mini PCIe, LVDS, RF coaxial, battery, FAKRA, etc.; antenna and nut metal stamping parts; and injection/molding parts. Argosy Research Inc. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Aethertek technology co., Ltd
summary: Aethertek technology co. Ltd designs, manufactures, and sells automation machinery related equipment in Taiwan. The company was formerly known as Service & Quality Group Co., Ltd. Aethertek technology co. Ltd was founded in 1992 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: MetaTech (AP) Inc.
summary: MetaTech (AP) Inc. engages in the wholesale and retail of electronic products and equipment in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, and Southeast Asia. The company offers semiconductor components and consumer products, communication products, and connectors. It also provides genetic testing products for the non-invasive tumors, lung cancer, and familial and colorectal cancer; and regenerative medicines. In addition, the company offers travel and reinvestment services. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Topower Co., Ltd.
summary: Topower Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells auto parts, power supply and LED products, and auto lamps in Taiwan. It offers auto parts, such as car and truck parts, and auto accessories; ATX and IPC power supply products; and LED products, including bulbs, candle lights, downlights, T bars, mini bulbs, spotlights, and tubes, as well as auto and truck lamps, and LED universal lights. The company was formerly known as Topower Computer Industrial Co., Ltd. Topower Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: PixArt Imaging Inc.
summary: PixArt Imaging Inc. researches, designs, produces, and sells CMOS image sensors and related ICs in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, Japan, and internationally. The company offers optical mouse sensor, optical track sensor, and finger navigation products; and multiple object tracking, optical motion tracking, gesture recognition, and ambient light and proximity sensing products, as well as CMOS camera SOC products. It also provides photoplethysmography sensors, computer vision, capacitive touch products, and customized ASIC sensors; wireless audio SOC/true wireless stereo IC products; Bluetooth low energy products; and RF chips. The company's products are used in computers and peripherals, smart homes, offices and classrooms, wearables and hearables, gaming controllers, automotive, surveillance and cameras, commercial and others, automation navigation, and health management. It is also involved in the investment and technical support activities. PixArt Imaging Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: RDC Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
summary: RDC Semiconductor Co., Ltd. designs and develops IC for high-end and low power bit microprocessors in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers Emkore DE and Emkore DS processor platforms for embedded commercial applications, such as digital electronic signage, automatic teller machines, smart vending machines, human-machine interfaces, thin computers, and terminal sales systems; and RDC IAD processor platform for mobile networking applications in consumer electronics, and embedded markets. It also provides RDC 32-bit microcontrollers for various applications, including industrial control, automation, NAT routers, home gateway and access points, industrial PCs, thin client applications, and others; RDC16-bit microcontrollers for general embedded market applications, such as industrial controls, control automation, terminals, signal generators, and projectors; and RDC NPU to equipment manufacturers. In addition, the company offers RDC ASIC that provides clients with comprehensive services and industrial application solutions; low power system-on-chip for programmable automation controller, embedded board solutions, data concentrator, and industrial automation control system applications; and multi-function I/O peripheral controllers and PCI express/PCI interfaces expansions. Further, it provides 8-bit MCU IP that is used for DSC, CF card, pattern recognition, LCD monitor controller, USB device controller, scanner controller, MP3 controller, modem controller, and voice recognition applications. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Jiin Ming Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiin Ming Industry Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells products related to metal/plastic body parts and components. The company primarily offers parts and components of notebook computers, LCD monitors, LCD TVs, and other 3C products. Its products comprise LCD display components, including bezels, back covers, support brackets, and reflectors; notebook components, such as frames, bottoms, and shieldings; flat panel display components comprising bezels, middle frames, panel brackets, and covers; and 3C product components, including MP3 covers/components, heat spreaders, and multimedia products. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Sentronic International Corp.
summary: Sentronic International Corp. provides semiconductor components, liquid crystal displays, optical pickups, light-emitting diodes, micro motors, decentralized components, etc. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: TrueLight Corporation
summary: TrueLight Corporation designs, develops, and supplies optical components in Asia. The company offers high-bandwidth semiconductor lasers, photodiode components and submodules, optical engines and cables, vertical cavity surface emitting lasers light source for cloud\data center, 5G mobile internet base station interconnections, and proximity/flood illumination/3D sensing applications in smartphones. It serves optical fiber transceiver, internet equipment, and smartphone module manufacturers. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Haiwan International Development Co., Ltd
summary: Haiwan International Development Co., Ltd engages in the development and leasing of residential buildings. It is also involved in the hotel business; and real estate trading activities. The company was formerly known as Haewan International Development Co., Ltd and changed its name to Haiwan International Development Co., Ltd. in 2014. Haiwan International Development Co., Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: ADATA Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: ADATA Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells memory and storage solutions. It offers DRAM modules, solid state drives, USB flash drives, memory cards and readers, power banks, and cables and accessories; external storage products; and wireless, car, and wall chargers, as well as PC system and components, keyboard and mouse, audio products, and accessories. The company also provides industrial SSD cards, and disk on module/USB/embedded products for use in automation, point of sale, digital signage, network video recorder, kiosk, data centers, in-car systems, multifunction printers, casino gaming machines, and aerospace applications. In addition, it offers commercial and industrial lighting products; and powertrain products, such as axial flux motors, air-cooled motors, liquid-cooled motors, and motor controllers. ADATA Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ardentec Corporation
summary: Ardentec Corporation provides semiconductor testing solutions in memory, logic, and mixed-signal ICs (integrated circuits) to integrated device manufacturers, pure play wafer foundry companies, and fabless design companies. The company offers testing services comprising engineering services before mass production, such as test engineering consultations and recommendations for design, test plan and test program development, test program cross-platform conversion, complete product characterization, and laser program development and analysis; and mass production engineering services consisting of suggestions and services of test time reduction, yield analysis and enhancement, laser repair yield analysis and improvement, timely retrieval of test data on secured Internet, test program management system, test data analysis and periodical report provision, and outlier management services, as well as stable testing services. It also provides probe card design and consultant, outsourced manufacturing, and maintenance and system management for repair record and tracking services; wafer level chip scale packaging backend process services; and wafer probing platforms. In addition, the company offers certification, and quality system and assurance structure services, as well as quality, information security, and hazardous substance free policy services; and IT policy, IT service architecture, and testing information services. Further, it provides testing and assembly services; electronic ICs, diodes, transistors, and semiconductor devices; IC devices testing and trimming services; ICs, module, and component testing services; and manufactures electronic components. Additionally, the company offers burn in testing of wafer types; wafer testing for LCD driver ICs and analog ICs; and wafer and final testing of radio frequency ICs. It operates in the United States, Taiwan, Singapore, Korea, China, and internationally. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
summary: Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and testing of integrated circuits in Taiwan. The company operates through two divisions, Testing and Packaging. It offers wafer sort, final and post test, engineering support, and test platforms services; copper pillar bump, wafer level chip scale package, lead free bump, plating bump / ball drop, and backside metallization services; die processing services, wafer thinning, singulation, and flip chip packaging services; and failure analysis and reliability test services. The company was formerly known as Stats ChipPac Taiwan Semiconductor Corp. and changed its name to Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. in June 2015. Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan. Winstek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Singapore Merchants Bloomeria Limited.

name: T-Flex Techvest PCB Co., Ltd.
summary: T-Flex Techvest PCB Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of FPC and PCB products in worldwide. The company provides original equipment manufacturing services for inner and outer layer printed circuit board lamination; and PCB inner layer optical inspection. Its products are used in portable device, camera module, auto CCD, key pad, cell phone, and LCM module applications, as well as applied in mobile phone, communication, mother, TFT-LCD, high density interconnection boards; and computer peripheral and consumer products, which include note book. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Microtips Technology Inc.
summary: Microtips Technology Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells LCD modules, PCB assemblies, and professional audio and video design and assembly products worldwide. The company offers character, graphic, and TFT LCD modules for industrial control, medical devices, telecommunication, and new emerging products. It also provides musical instruments, including sounds effects testing machines; sound amplifiers for professional recording studios and concerts; digital musical instruments for audio studios, pubs, and clubs; and digital audio processors, live sound recorders, multi-channel mixers, sound effects, machine DSP amps, etc. In addition, the company offers finger printer modules and diaper sensors; and wireless chargers and modules, such as wireless transmitters and receivers under the AirFuel, AirON, and WiChargi brands. Further, it provides custom designed resonators, and PRU and PTU modules for power and ID form factor applications comprising wearable devices, smartphones, handheld devices, tablets, laptops, vehicles, home appliances, etc. Additionally, the company offers ODM/OEM services for audio and video products; and engineering services that include product development, electrical and mechanical engineering, tooling design, prototype engineering, manufacturing process engineering, and quality engineering, as well as valued-added design, electronics manufacturing, and logistics services. Microtips Technology Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kworld Computer Co.,Ltd
summary: Kworld Computer Co., Ltd provides digital entertainment products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers gaming earphones; and wall and car chargers, as well as TV/video drivers, analog TV tuner cards, and hybrid TV tuner sticks. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Silicon Touch Technology Inc.
summary: Silicon Touch Technology Inc. designs, develops, produces, and sells analogue and digital ICs. The company offers motor, brushless fan motor, CD/DVD ROM motor, stepping motor, and LED display driving IC, as well as power and power supply monitoring, optoelectronic communication and image processing, and optoelectronic interface ICs. It provides its products in the Americas, Europe, Japan, Korea, South Africa, and China. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Donpon Precision Inc.
summary: Donpon Precision Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells automotive electronic products and plastic precision components in Taiwan and Mainland China. The company is involved in mold design, manufacturing, plastic molding, painting and printing, and assembly and processing of professional OEM electrical equipment. It provides automotive electronic products, such as rear-view camera and mirror, HUD, steering wheel switches, audio panel, auto parts molds, air filters, chargers, and trim products, as well as safety products. The company offers camera, backlight module, headphones, power chargers, and mobile phone accessories; and touch glass products, including auto monitors, and mobile phone, tablet PC, and laptop application products. Donpon Precision Inc. was founded in 1995 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Megaforce Company Limited
summary: Megaforce Company Limited engages in the research and development of opto-mechatronics and plastic components in Taiwan, China, Mexico, and the United States. The company engages in precise plastic injection molding, micro-precision structure mold development, electronic assembly, and spray printing activities. It also offers dental electromechanical integration products, surgical systems, medical integration products through Internet of Things, and medical machinery products, as well as medical teaching courses. In addition, the company provides surface treatment, post process, and assembly services; and liquid silicone rubber molding and DFM products. The company's products are used in advanced computer gaming, high-end home entertainment equipment, vehicle components, medical appliances, and aerospace equipment, as well as in computer, communication, and consumer electronics products. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Univacco Technology Inc.
summary: Univacco Technology Inc. manufactures and sells stamping foil products and optoelectronics materials worldwide. The company offers various decorative and functional foils, which include hot stamping, cold, holographic, and digital foils. The company also provides optoelectronics materials, including clean and PET protective films, diffuser, SMD cover tapes, medical films, and OEM for coating. The company provides its products for wine, beer, and spirits label and packaging; food, drink, and confectionery packaging; tobacco/cigarette packaging; greeting cards and printed media; artificial leather book covers; persona care; cosmetics and perfumes; pharmaceuticals; and clothing and textile applications. It markets its products under the UNIVACCO brand. The company was formerly known as Tai Leng Industry Co., Ltd and changed its name to Univacco Technology Inc. in 2002. Univacco Technology Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: RoyalTek Company Ltd.
summary: RoyalTek Company Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells global positioning system (GPS) products worldwide. Its products primarily include audio video navigation systems, portable navigation devices, driving assistance systems, driving video recorders, electronic accessories for automobiles, and engine boards for GPS. The company also offers ODM/OEM services for car electronics and driver assistance systems. It serves automotive, navigation, safety, leisure, sports, multimedia, mountaineering, tourism, and other industries. RoyalTek Company Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Chialin Precision Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chialin Precision Industrial Co., Ltd. designs, processes, manufactures, and sells stamping dies and other related parts, precision terminals, and hardware parts in Taiwan. The company's products include bandolier pins, mobile and computer connectors, lamp and piranha lead frames, SMD lead frames, and antennas, as well as other products, such as EMI spring finger and shielding case. It is also involved in the development and leasing of houses and buildings. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Feei Cherng Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Feei Cherng Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets active/passive electronic components in Taiwan and Internationally. The company's products include MOSFETs, LAN transformers, and polymer caps, as well as diodes, NTC thermistors, MLCC, and crystals. It also distributes. The company offers its products for use in N/B, M/B, smart phones, mobiles, and GPS system applications. Feei Cherng Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Joinsoon Electronics Manufacturing CO., LTD.
summary: Joinsoon Electronics Manufacturing CO., LTD. designs, manufactures, and sells interconnection products worldwide. The company offers precision components, including antennas, cables, and connectors, as well as noninvasive consumable cables, customized cable assemblies, fly-lights, infrared surveillance camera cable assemblies, and CDRW and multimedia cables. It also provides electronics products, such as storage, VoIP and HDMI series, and OEM and ODM products. In addition, the company offers healthcare management products comprising infrared ear and digital thermometers. Further, it provides product consultation and technical support services that include product design and development, procurement and sourcing, and manufacturing and engineering support, as well as design manufacturing services; and electronics manufacturing services. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Celxpert Energy Corporation
summary: Celxpert Energy Corporation produces and sells battery packs in Taiwan. Its products are used in notebook and tablet, network product, smart phone, power tool, E-bike/E-Moto, and energy storage and UPS battery packs. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Auras Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Auras Technology Co., Ltd. engages in manufacturing, processing, and retailing electronic materials, computer heat dissipation modules, and other related products in China, Taiwan, Korea, Ireland, and internationally. The company offers coolers, heat sinks, cooling modules, heat pipes, fans, etc. primarily for applications in notebooks, desktops, servers, pads and workstations, mobiles, graphic cards, etc. It also provides server, motherboard, and graphics card cooling modules; all-in-one workstations and DVD player cooling modules; and cooling products for home appliances, such as DVD and Blu-ray players, as well as LED lighting applications. In addition, the company offers heat flow consulting services. Auras Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Casing Macron Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Casing Macron Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and sells computing products. It offers PC chassis and switching power supply products; peripheral devices, such as card readers, mouse, speakers, and barebone systems; and PC cases, including slim, mini tower, middle tower, mini ITX, server, and gamming PC cases. The company also provides water filter systems and temperature drinking water devices. In addition, it offers OEM and ODM services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Cincon Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Cincon Electronics Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, sells switch mode power conversion products to the communications, computer, industrial, medical, consumer, and lighting markets worldwide. Its products include single and multiple output DC-DC converters from 1W to 750W, single and multiple output AC adapters from 5W to 150W, open frame AC-DC power supplies from 5W to 700W, and LED power supplies from 15W to 150W. The company also provides modified standard and custom power conversion products. In addition, it offers accessories; and operates iDALI, an app for digital lighting control solution. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Tekcore Co., Ltd
summary: Tekcore Co., Ltd produces and sells LED wafers and chips in Taiwan. It offers standard LEDs, and power and flip chips. The company provides high brightness chips in green, blue, red, yellow, orange, and ultraviolet wavelengths. Its products are used in various applications, including large scale displays and billboards; optic fiber cables; indicator lights; LCD and projection backlighting; low light environments; miniaturized light sources; cell phones, cameras, and other small electronic displays; TV remotes and infrared mouses; signal lights; interior and exterior solid state lighting and other illuminations; and vehicle lights. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Nantou City, Taiwan.

name: Dexin Corporation
summary: Dexin Corporation manufactures and sells IT cordless solutions and high-level devices in Taiwan. The company offers audio and entertainment products, including Bluetooth headsets and speakers, gaming headsets, and audiophile headphones; and computer peripherals and consumer electronic devices, such as office and gaming mouse products, keyboards, and game controllers. It also provides industrial design, research and development, product engineering and manufacturing, and other custom and project design services. Dexin Corporation was founded in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Microcosm Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Microcosm Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and supplies upstream materials for the electronic industry. It offers PSPI-Brina, a high precision photosensitive developing type Polyimide material; liquid and film type colorless polyimide material for OLED display screens, and other colorless and flexible required electronic products; and high frequency series products.
