The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Sunnic Technology & Merchandise Inc
summary: Sunnic Technology & Merchandise Inc. provides image processing and optoelectronic products in Taiwan. It offers products ranging from semiconductors, solutions and modules, and systems to factory automation equipment. The company also provides solutions for exterior, mechanism, software, hardware, and firmware designs, as well as one-stop shopping services. Its product research and development covers range of products and applications that include CCD and CMOS analog and digital HD smart cameras for image capture and blue-ray; H.264 IP set top box and IP smart TV box for image storage; HD smart displays and Internet TV for image display; and Wi-Fi, RF, and 3GPP for video conferencing and image transmission. The company was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Ability Opto-Electronics Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ability Opto-Electronics Technology Co.,Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of professional optical lenses in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers various optical lens products, including scanners, projectors, digital cameras, digital video recorders, multi-function printers, cell phone cameras, laptops, tablets, IP-cameras, monitors, automotive lens, etc.; and CCM/NB products, as well as lens for automotive, digital surveillance, special, professional, and other applications. It also provides technical services of precision optical lens. The company was formerly known as SHIAN-JINN Precision Optical Co., Ltd and changed its name to Ability Opto-Electronics Technology Co.,Ltd. in 2001. Ability Opto-Electronics Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: FOCI Fiber Optic Communications, Inc.
summary: FOCI Fiber Optic Communications, Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets fiber optic components and integrated modules for communication networks in Taiwan. It offers interconnects, such as connector/adaptor parts, pigtails/patchcords, and patchpanels; couplers/splitters, attenuators, and wavelength division multiplexing (WDM) products; filter WDMs, CWDMs, DWDMs, and filter devices; optical isolators and circulators, including micro optic devices; optical transceivers and active optical cables; and USB 3.0 AOC cables, sub-assemblies, pigtails/receptacles, and detectors. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Radiant Innovation Inc.
summary: Radiant Innovation Inc. designs and develops infrared technology products. It offers medical infrared thermometers, industrial use infrared thermometers, and CO2 monitors. The company also provides infrared ear and forehead thermometers, multi-function thermometers, disposable probe covers, and TMS products. Radiant Innovation Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Xintec Inc.
summary: Xintec Inc. operates as a three dimensional (3D) wafer level chip scale packaging company in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, and Asia. The company offers optical sensor chip-scale package technology for cellular phones, notebooks, gesture sensors, and laser intensity sensor for blue-ray and pico projectors; PPI and 3D Package technologies for use in integrated passive devices, power management IC and analogue IC, cellular phone RF IC, and capacitive couplers; and Micro-Electro-Mechanical Systems (MEMS) and sensor packaging for ink printer heads, motion sensors, temperature and humidity sensors, pressure sensors, identification sensors, pico-projector heads, silicon microphones, and bio sensors. It also provides design and modeling services for its technologies. Xintec Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Topco Technologies Corp.
summary: Topco Technologies Corp. engages in the import and export of chemical material related commodities in Taiwan, Mainland China, and internationally. It offers silicone related products, including silicone fluid, defoaming and release agent, foam stabilizer, fiber treatment, paint additives, resin, coupling agent, oil, rubber, PSA, powder, and grease, as well as paper release agent, HTV, liquid injection molding system, RTV I, RTV II, sealant, MS-RTV, thermal pad and LED application material, and AF coating agent. The company also provides various adhesives, such as construction structural adhesives; EXELAST; surface treatment equipment; matsumoto microsphere; poreflon membrane; touch panel related materials; poly tetra fluoroethylene films; and other products. In addition, it offers environmental catalysts; micro-capsule foam materials; silicate and anti-static agents; cosmetic raw materials and finished products; gunze fluorine sleeves; UV curing glues; atmospheric plasma; VUV washing machines; and conductive polymers and thermal materials, as well as other trade products. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Sunflex Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunflex Tech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells flexible printed circuit boards (FPCB) in Taiwan. The company offers rigid flex, multi-layer, double side, single side double access, and single side FPCBs. Its products are used in touch panels, liquid crystal modules, computer accessories, light bars, and automotive electronics. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Remotek Corporation
summary: Remotek Corporation engages in the research, design, production, and sale of radio coverage solutions for 2G, 3G, and 4G mobile radio networks worldwide. The company offers digital repeaters, including PICO ICS, ICS, digital fiber optic, and digital band adjustable repeaters; distributed antenna systems, such as fiber optic repeaters and cable boosters; and off air solutions comprising low and medium power repeaters, high power repeaters, channel selective repeaters, and frequency shifting repeaters. It also provides operation and maintenance system, a management system for controlling and monitoring repeaters remotely; and accessories, such as antennas, couplers, splitters, combiners, dummy loads, coaxial cables, and connectors. In addition, the company offers RF components and related services. It serves providers of mobile communication. Remotek Corporation was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Wholetech System Hitech Limited
summary: Wholetech System Hitech Limited provides turnkey and system integration services in Taiwan. It offers bulk gas, specialty gas supply, hookup turnkey and consultant, and gas hook-up systems; clean room, MEP, process exhaust, pure water treatment, fire, and cooling systems; and vacuum piping systems, vacuum piping fittings, vacuum ball valves, and deposit improvement engineering services. The company also provides gas cabinets and racks, and VMP/P systems; monitoring hardware and software, such as GIS, HPM, FMCS, and heating jackets; scrubbers; and automation engineering software, custom application software, and mobile IoT smart facility management system. In addition, it provides wet process equipment and chemical supply systems comprising semiconductor, LED, solar energy, and LCD panels. The company was formerly known as Wholetech Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Wholetech System Hitech Limited in 2001. Wholetech System Hitech Limited was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Tai Shing Electronics Components Corporation
summary: Tai Shing Electronics Components Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, researches, designs, manufactures, and sells solenoids, and solenoid valve and relay products in Asia, Europe, the Americas, and internationally. The company offers linear DC solenoid products comprising open frame, permanent, and tubular solenoids; holding, rotary DC, and customized solenoids; water, air, and oil valves; brakes; signal, power, automotive, and SSR relays; crystals, oscillators, and sensors; and lathes, stamping parts and molds, plastic injection parts and molds, lead wire processing, powder metallurgy, forging, tube processing, and other services, as well as parts, including bearings, springs, magnets, and filters. It also provides electromagnets, electromagnetic values, metal valves, other fabricated metal products, electric appliances, audiovisual electric products, wired communication equipment and apparatuses, telecommunication equipment and apparatuses, electronic parts and components, computers and computing peripheral equipment, and cleaning products used in the manufacturing industry. Further, it engages in international trade; manufacture and import of restrained telecom radio frequency equipment; and other business activities. Tai Shing Electronics Components Corporation was incorporated in 1984 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Promaster Technology Corp.
summary: Promaster Technology Corp. distributes general purpose, communication and multimedia products for communication and consumer markets. The company's products are used in desktop and server PCs, notebook PCs, smart phones, LCD TVs, PDA, graphic cards, and audio/video I/O products; networking products, such as LAN, ADSL router and cable modems, and telecom products; and wireless products, including cellular phones, wireless handheld devices, WLAN and Bluetooth, and GPS. The company was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Chitec Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chitec Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of specialty chemicals for applications in electronics, medicine, automotive, construction, and other industries worldwide. It offers UV absorbers and light stabilizers under the Chiguard name; flame retardants under the Zuran name; antioxidants under the Revonox/Deox name; photoinitiators under the Chivacure/R-gen name; and anti-reversion agents, antiozoants, optical brighteners, and auxiliary thermal stabilizers under the Chitex name. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ACULA Technology Corp.
summary: ACULA Technology Corp. provides video solutions and services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers closed-circuit television (CCTV) monitors; combo DVR/NVR products; medical displays; IP monitors with POE; IP public view monitors with POE; industrial monitors-touch monitors/point of sale (POS); digital signage/public information display products; and high-brightness monitors. The company also provides OEM/ODM display products. It offers CCTV products for use in apartment complexes, airports, bars, casinos, daycares, schools, parks, fast food restaurants, hotels, night clubs, parking lots, office buildings, shopping malls, train/bus stations, and warehouses, as well as for home owners; and POS products for food service, hospitality, retail, and public markets. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Advanced Analog Technology, Inc.
summary: Advanced Analog Technology, Inc. designs, develops, and sells power management ICs in Taiwan. It provides multifunctional PMICs, such as TFT LCDs, AMOLEDs, DSC/DVs, and portable devices; boost, buck, buck-boost, and inverting switching regulators; WLED drivers consisting of backlights and lighting products; and battery management products comprising battery chargers and battery protection products. The company also offers audio amps, GPMs, LDOs, level shifters, motor drivers, OP amps/buffers, RESETs, and photoflash products. Its products are used in DSC/DV/drive recorder, PND, and discrete and integrated LCD panel applications. Advanced Analog Technology, Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Unique Opto-Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Unique Optical Industrial Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, processes, and trades in various optical glasses, optical lenses, lens blanks, stubble blanks, and prism blanks in Taiwan and internationally. Its products are used in cameras, camcorders, telescopes, microscopes, condensers, projectors, fax machines, copiers, scanners, monitors, digital cameras, measuring instruments, military observation equipment, medical endoscopes, camera phones, and optical communication products. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Nantou, Taiwan.

name: Niching Industrial Corporation
summary: Niching Industrial Corporation markets and sells semiconductor, flat panel display, light-emitting diode (LED), green energy, and nanotechnology products worldwide. The company provides PCB for solid-state drives and memory modules, substrates for IC packaging, capillary wedges, die collet needles, special gas, dispensing nozzles, and die attach films, as well as reclaim, Al coating, dummy, and daisy chain wafers. It also offers screen printing silver paste, Nano imprint silver paste, gravure off set silver paste, low-temperature sintering Ag paste, and low temp adhesive silver paste, as well as printing paste for laser etching and silver ink; chip trays, ABS reels, sputtering targets, and emboss spacers for the LCD industry; and LED tabs and lead frames for the LED industry. In addition, the company provides adhesives for temporary bonding, metal springs for VCM, CPD dryers, and Nano porous materials, substrate for stretchable and flexible modules, and wireless power charging coils. Further, it manufactures and sells touch Nano silver products. Niching Industrial Corporation was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Utechzone Co., Ltd.
summary: Utechzone Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells automatic optical inspection systems and equipment in Taiwan, China, Japan, and internationally. It offers printed circuit board inspection, flat panel display inspection, semiconductor inspection, and other inspection products, as well as IC Substrate and LCD; eye-tracking system; security system; and interactive media system. Utechzone Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Skardin Industrial Corporation
summary: Skardin Industrial Corporation, a consumer electronics manufacturing company, manufactures, supplies, and exports set top box and broadband industry solutions in Taiwan and internationally. It offers STB platforms, smart home products, WIFI speakers, hybrid soundbase and sound bar audio systems, and software/middleware products. The company also provides electronics manufacturing services. Skardin Industrial Corporation was founded in 1982 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Avalue Technology Inc.
summary: Avalue Technology Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells embedded computing solutions in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers industrial and embedded motherboards; industrial PC/computers, such as embedded, transportation, rackmount, and ARM based systems; and panel PCs, including industrial, medical, and open frame panel PCs, as well as industrial touch monitors, audio and video extenders, peripherals and accessories, and panel and touch technologies. It also provides computer-on-module products for critical or industrial applications; point of sale (POS) terminals, which includes desktop and compact POS; medical tablets, and semi rugged tablet and accessories; device management software; E ink solutions, such as public display, healthcare IoT, and E ink technologies solutions; ODM services; and intelligent solutions. The company's products are used in healthcare, retail, gaming, manufacturing, and transportation applications. Avalue Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Forcecon Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Forcecon Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of thermal management products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers DC axial and blower fans, thermal module active and passive products, vapor chambers, and heat pipes for use in computers, VGA, LED lightings, servers, automobiles, smart-phones, and bio-technology science fields. It serves ODM and OEM customers. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Solteam Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Solteam Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of modular parts and components for power tool, home appliance, automotive, medical, and IT industries worldwide. It offers switches, inlets/outlets, adapters, battery holders, controller modules, EV parts, surrounding/other products, aquarium peripherals, optical products, and medical devices. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Eclat Forever Machinery Co., Ltd.
summary: Eclat Forever Machinery Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and production of production equipment for touch panels, liquid crystal displays, plasma display panels, printed circuit boards, and other related equipment in Taiwan and internationally. It offers display production equipment, including touch panel solutions, cleaning equipment, development equipment, and etching and stripping equipment; automated logistics equipment consisting of substrate automated equipment and automated coating solutions; automated glass and film roll-to roll unwinding and rewinding equipment, as well as film-tearing laminating equipment; and exposure equipment, such as UV LED automatic and semi-automatic exposure machines. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Single Well Industrial Corporation
summary: Single Well Industrial Corporation designs, produces, and sells molds and auto machines in Taiwan, Japan, and internationally. The company offers semi-conductor and LED molding, IC molding, deflashing, trimming, and forming dies, as well as parts of dies, including overhauling on molding dies. It also provides deflash/trim/singulator auto machines, test products, handlers, tapings, auto loaders, solder dippings, epoxy dispensing products, insert tubes, manu press, and parts. In addition, the company offers package molds, such as resistors/diodes and sim/flash drives; and automated machineries, including photo couplers, high powers, semiconductors, LEDs, and IRMs, as well as engages in solar energy business. It serves manufacturers of electronic parts and semi-conductors. Single Well Industrial Corporation was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Universal Microwave Technology, Inc.
summary: Universal Microwave Technology, Inc. designs, develops, and manufactures custom microwave/mm-wave devices, sub-systems, and antennas for broadband wireless communications. The company's products comprise diplexers, filters, couplers, OMT products, Eband/millimeter-wave products, distributed antenna systems, hanger clamp sets, Ku/Ka band OMT and filter assemblies, waveguide components, circulators/isolators, cable assemblies, flexible waveguides, antennas, die-casting and machined parts, and remote mount kits. Its products are used in point-to-point, cellular, VSAT, WiMAX, and LTE applications. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Keelung City, Taiwan.

name: Usun Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Usun Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the flat panel display, customization equipment, intelligent manufacturing system integration, and PCB/FPC industrial automation businesses in Taiwan. It provides dense unpackers; automated handling systems; tap cleaners; polarizers/E papers/OCA/LOCA laminators; PR/OC/PI slit coaters; and LCM+B/L module auto assembly lines. The company also offers mask production equipment, timber industry equipment, de-mura+gamma turing automatic detection equipment, laser scanning system, AVI materials loading and unloading machine, goods retrieval equipment, open cap and remove film machine, auto laminators, automatic sole edge grinding machines, lithium battery production equipment, and LENS mounts. In addition, it provides pallet based automatic storage systems, bin storage systems, warehousing management systems, and sorting systems; and PCB and CCL auto assembly systems, laminated steel auto cleaners, and CCL auto testing and cutting systems, as well as article holders. Usun Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: GlobalSat WorldCom Corporation
summary: GlobalSat WorldCom Corporation manufactures and sells GPS receivers and module makers worldwide. It offers sports and outdoor products, such as Bike Computer, GPS Watch, Heart Rate Monitor, Triathlon Watch, and Wrist Band GPS cycling; and tracking devices, including asset tracker, AVL tracker, personal tracker, animal tracker. The company also provides IoT/M2M products comprising LoRaWAN devices, NB-loT Sigfox, LoRa M.O.S.T; accessories, which include GPS modules, GPS engine boards, GPS data loggers, wireless locators, and GPS active antennas. In addition, it provides customization services of electronic designs, system integration, and software development to meet the project requirements. The company's products are bundled into the clients' system products, such as tablet PCs, notebooks, and smartphones. It primarily exports its products to Europe and North America, as well as sells its products in other regions through channel distributors. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ways Technical Corp., Ltd.
summary: Ways Technical Corp., Ltd. engages in the various processing services and professional material development. It offers plastic, metal, and assembly center injection equipment and other products; tooling equipment; surface treatment injection molding; SMT products; and organic photovoltaics products. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Dayuan, Taiwan.

name: Simula Technology Inc.
summary: Simula Technology Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells connectors, cables, and accessories in Taiwan, China, Europe, the United States, Asia, and Europe. It offers audio and DC jacks; solutions for wearable devices, such as pogo pin and pad, magnetic pogo connections, and wireless charging magnets and coil modules; USB products; plugs, receptacles, and cable assemblies; fleet asset management interconnect solutions; and customized solutions. Its product applications include consumer electronics, fleet telematics, medical and healthcare, and industrial and outdoor applications. Simula Technology Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Huang Long Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Huang Long Development Co.,Ltd. manufactures electronic components in Taiwan. It is also involved in the development, leasing, and sale of residential buildings; and real estate trading business. The company was formerly known as Neng Tyi Precision Industries Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Huang Long Development Co.,Ltd. in June 2018. Huang Long Development Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1981 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ADO Optronics Corporation
summary: ADO Optronics Corporation provides lighting products in Taiwan. It offers commercial lighting, indoor and outdoor LED lighting, and plastic injection products. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Jhen Vei Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Jhen Vei Electronic Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of a range of wires and cables. The company offers USB, DC, DP, DVI, VGA, audio, and RCA cables; and wire harness and internet safety products. Its products are used for transmitting power or signals on PC, notebook computers, tablets, smart phones, portable navigation devices, smart home devices, household appliances, vehicular equipment, industrial instrument, camcorders, TVs or stereos, speakers, and USB and other electronic devices. The company also provides network security services to communications, corporations, education, and gaming industries. Jhen Vei Electronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: DataVan International Corporation
summary: DataVan International Corporation provides POS solutions worldwide. The company offers POS terminals, embedded box PCs, touch monitors, touch systems, kiosks, and POS peripherals comprise cash drawers, thermal printers, and system attachments. It offers solutions for the retail and foodservice industries. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Toplus Global Co., Ltd.
summary: Toplus Global Co., Ltd. engages in the food and beverage business in Taiwan. It operates 3 seafood restaurants under the DingXian brand; and 8 wedding halls and 1 marine manor under the AmazingHall brand. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: EFUN Technology Co.,Ltd
summary: EFUN Technology Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and sells various optical products in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products include quantum- dot films, high-brightness 2D/3D home projection screens, ITO transparent conductive films, surface structure diffusion films, anti-fog films, anti-blue light films, anti- electromagnetic interference films, anti-reflective films, water blocking films, non-conductive vacuum metallization coatings, screen protectors, and nano silver antibacterial films, as well as anti-bacterial, anti-splash, and anti-epidemic protective gears. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Alltop Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: As of February 26, 2021,  operates as a subsidiary of Pan Jit International Inc.

name: Macroblock, Inc.
summary: Macroblock, Inc. supplies LED drivers for display, backlighting, and lighting applications worldwide. The company's products include display, local dimming backlight, RGB lighting, automotive lighting and display, DC/DC controller and DC/DC convertor, isolated and non-isolated AC/DC controller, and linear regulator LED driver ICs. It also provides Hawkeye solution platform, a LED display solution; and micro-LED solutions. In addition, the company offers IOT technology solutions, including facial recognition, business intelligence analytics, and content management system solutions for the shopping mall, retail, and supermarket sectors. Macroblock, Inc. was incorporated in 1999 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: eMemory Technology Inc.
summary: eMemory Technology Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells flash memory integrated circuits. It offers NeoBit, a programmable logic device that embeds into various CMOS processes, including logic, mixed-mode, bipolar-CMOS-DMOS (BCD), analog, radio frequency (RF), and high-voltage (HV); and NeoFuse, a small-form-factor logic non-volatile memory technology for use in IDs, production record, encryption code, and ROM replacement, as well as analog trimming, function selection, and parameter setting applications. It also used in set-top boxes, digital TV, CMOS imaging sensors, application processors, baseband processors, LCD drivers, and power management ICs. The company also provides NeoEE, a single-poly embedded memory device for application in users preference setting in IC cards, code storage in MCUs and RFICs, configuration settings in NFC controllers, fuse devices in memory redundancy designs, and parameter trimming for analog/RF/HV/BCD circuits; and NeoMTP, a single-poly embedded memory technology for USB type-C, wireless charger, touch panels, P-Gamma, MCUs, etc. In addition, it offers NeoPUF, a hardware security technology device for Internet of Things (IoT) applications; EcoBit, an embedded logic multiple-time programmable solution for passive RFID tags, lower power sensors, battery-saving mobile ICs, and other IoT chips; Green platform for code storage in microcontrollers or speech ICs; and MagnaChip EEPROM, an IP block device for code storage in microcontrollers, and RFICs, parameter trimming for analog/RF/HV circuits. It serves semiconductor foundries, integrated devices manufacturers, and fabless design houses in Taiwan and internationally. eMemory Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Shian Yih Electronic Industry Co.,Ltd
summary: Shian Yih Electronic Industry Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells light emitting diode (LED) back light modules. It provides small to medium size LED back light modules, motorcycle and vehicle LED headlight modules, light guide films, and plastic injection molding products, as well as LED packaging, design, and fabrication services. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Podak Co., LTD.
summary: Podak Co., LTD. operates as a sales agent in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers active and passive components, such as polymer solid, aluminum electrolytic, plastic, and gold capacitors, as well as variable resistors, inductors, power choke coils, diodes, transistors, chip fuses, integrated circuits, batteries, remote controls, motors, and other products. It also provides car electronic components, Blu-ray storage, power capacitor, smart energy saving, automatic equipment, and CO2 heat pumps, as well as high-definition closed-circuit television, consumer monitoring, and camera module solutions. Podak Co., LTD. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Thermaltake Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Thermaltake Technology Co., Ltd. provides entertainment, e-sports, technology, and lifestyle products worldwide. It offers cases, power supplies, and coolers under the Thermaltake brand; keyboards, headsets, mice, and accessories under the Tt eSPORTS brand name; and mobile accessories under the LUXA2 brand. The company also operates an e-shopping site under the Tt Buy brand name. It serves its customers through distributors and retailers. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Cypress Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Cypress Technology Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells AV and multimedia products. The company provides matrixes, splitters, switchers, extenders, scalers, video and audio products, control systems, and other products. Its products are primarily designed for signal management for home theater integration, AV signal distribution within mega stores, video production, video picture enhancement or signal format conversion, distribution, and switching. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: USERJOY Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: USERJOY Technology Co., Ltd. researches, develops, and sells online and mobile games software in Taiwan and internationally. It offers PC, massively multiplayer online, web, home console, AR/VR, and other games. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Jarllytec Co. , Ltd.
summary: Jarllytec Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells various hinges in Taiwan, China, the United States, Thailand, and internationally. It offers hinges for NB, LCD, LCD TVs, cell phones, PDAs, office equipment, in-car handheld type products, 3C products, medical equipment, fiber optic connectors, fiber optic patchcords, RF connectors, fiber optic splitters, fiber optic attenuators, fiber optic terminators, and couplers/WDMs, as well as metal injection/MIM. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Shih Her Technologies Inc.
summary: Shih Her Technologies Inc. provides precision clean and reborn treatment for semiconductor, photoelectricity, and solar energy's manufacturing equipment parts. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Tung Thih Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Tung Thih Electronic Co., Ltd. manufactures and supplies automotive electronics in Taiwan, Asia, Europe, the United States, Australia, and internationally. It offers ultrasonic parking assistance systems, vehicle anti-theft devices, car door lock actuators, interior rear mirror systems, car video systems, wireless tire pressure monitor systems, body control modules, and vehicle electric peripherals and services. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: iROC Co., Ltd.
summary: iROC Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, and sale of natural products in Japan. The company offers drinking water under the VACHI; skin care products under the QINGSKIN; and chicken essence under the DDDrops brand names. It serves customers through online shops and distributors. The company was formerly known as Skymedi Corporation. iROC Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: eGalax_eMPIA Technology Inc.
summary: eGalax_eMPIA Technology Inc. provides touch panel solutions. The company offers projected capacitive IC and controller solutions, resistive touch solutions, surface capacitive touch controllers, surface acoustic wave touch sensors and controllers, and accessories. It serves the industrial, commercial, gaming, medical, banking, military, transportation, and consumer electronic sectors. eGalax_eMPIA Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Senao Networks, Inc.
summary: Senao Networks, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, design, manufacture, and sale of wireless communication products in Taiwan. It offers enterprise wireless products, including indoor access points, outdoor PTP/PTMP, and 5G/LTE edge computing gateway; data center switches, enterprise and SMB ethernet switches, and network appliances; and outdoor fixed dome and motorized vari-focal bullet IP camera, and indoor environmental monitoring. The company also provides power supplies, such as redundant power, open frame module, and PoE injectors; voice communication comprising PSTN and VoIP systems; cloud networks; and network edge accelerator. It sells its products under the Senao and EnGenius brand names. Senao Networks, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: AEWIN Technologies Co.,Ltd.
summary: AEWIN Technologies Co.,Ltd. provides network platform products and solutions in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers network appliances; general purpose and edge computing servers, and workstation products; network expansion modules; and other modules, as well as provides ODM/OEM services. Its products are used for network computing, software-defined wide area network, network functions virtualization infrastructure, multi-access edge computing/edge AI, and 5G/vRAN applications. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ETREND Hightech Corp.
summary: ETREND Hightech Corp. engages in testing and processing electronic components in Taiwan. It offers IC and wafer testing services. The company is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Otsuka Information Technology Corp.
summary: Otsuka Information Technology Corp. agency sales of 3D computer engineering drawing CAID/CAD/CAM/CAE/PDM design software, system application consulting, online guidance, talent training, and other services in Taiwan and China. The company develops HyperPDM, a product information management system; and information security system integration applications that protect design, research, and development data. It serves manufacturing, construction, media and entertainment, information security/cloud/big data/AI industries. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Otsuka Information Technology Corp. is a subsidiary of Otsuka Corporation.

name: UVAT Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: UVAT Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the design and development of physical vapor deposition equipment and coating machines in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers sputtering equipment for use in touch panel, solar cells, LED, biotechnology, semiconductor, surface decoration coating, functional coating, and plasma treatment fields. The company also provides OEM coating services comprising appearance coatings, such as surface decorative coating, non conductive vacuum metallization/NMVM, color coating, and optical coating; and functional film coatings, including electromagnetic interference coating, anti-reflective coating, AF/AS coating, IC carrier, heat dissipating substrates, and barrier layer, as well as offers coating services for the LED industry. In addition, it provides coating services for touch screen industry consisting of indium-tin-oxide and touch module circuits; and biotechnology industry, including bio sensors, as well as offers other anti-finger print film coating services. UVAT Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Zen Voce Corporation
summary: Zen Voce Corporation manufactures and sells optoelectronic and semiconductor dicing saws, and assembly and testing products. It engages in the design and manufacture of IC packaging machine and bumping; wafer cutting and cleaning machines; and board cutting and cleaning machines. The company also designs and manufactures test products, such as wafer test probe card PCBs; IC test HIFIX and CHANG kits; SOCKET IC test products; IC handlers; and SOCKET IC burn-in test products, as well as offers dicing and jig saws, tapes, and ball mount tooling products. It serves semiconductors, optoelectronics, microelectronics, and LCD equipment industries. The company was formerly known as Trutek Cooperation. Zen Voce Corporation was founded in 1999 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Materials Analysis Technology Inc.
summary: Materials Analysis Technology Inc. provides laboratory services in the areas of materials analysis, failure analysis, and reliability testing in Taiwan, China, Japan, Singapore, Malaysia, and internationally. The company offers reliability, non-destructive, electrical failure, materials, surface, and total solutions, as well as circuit edit and sample preparation solutions. Its products are used for various applications in IC, LED, biological and Nano, solar cell, and other industries. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Raydium Semiconductor Corporation
summary: Raydium Semiconductor Corporation provides integrated circuit (IC) solutions in Taiwan and internationally. It offers driver IC, power IC, touch control IC, and power management and timing controller IC solutions for artificial intelligence, Internet of Things, smart TVs, professional gaming, computer information, automotive, and industrial control products, as well as mobile and wearable devices. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Avertronics Inc.
summary: Avertronics Inc. engages in the contract manufacturing of connectors and wire-harnesses in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides automotive wire harness modules, cables, and connectors; e-bike/e-scooter battery connectors; and renewable energy solutions, such as solar energy generator and storage products, and mobile solar lighting tower. It also offers fitness and flywheel wire harnesses, as well as electric scooter for seniors; and board to board modules, high power/high current wire harnesses, PCBA modules, sensor and protecting components, and breakers. In addition, the company provides SST temperature and automobile sensors, as well as electricity breaker for the robotics industry and Internet of Things. Avertronics Inc. was founded in 1986 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: AimCore Technology Co., Ltd
summary: AimCore Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a sputtering company in Taiwan and internationally. It offers touch panel ITO glass, TN/STN LCD ITO glass, black matrix glass, and color filter top ITO glass for applications in LCD panels, touch panels, and organic ELD panels. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Transtouch Technology Inc.
summary: Transtouch Technology Inc. produces and sells touch panels in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers 4-wires and 5-wires resistive touch panels, multi-point resistive touch panels and capacitive touch panels. Its products are used in HMI and multifunction printers; POS and ATMs; military and aviation; automotive industry; medical and marine applications; and gaming devices. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Arima Lasers Corporation
summary: Arima Lasers Corporation manufactures and sells laser diodes in Taiwan. The company's products are used in various applications, including optical disk drives, optical communication networks, laser mouse, laser display, photodynamic therapy, laser printers, bar code scanners, distance measurements, levelers, etc. It also offers laser modules; high power products; surface mount device of laser diode; and OEM services, such as die bonding, in process quality check, wire bonding, cap sealing, auto laser marking, and testing services. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Ablerex Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ablerex Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells uninterruptible power supplies (UPS) and power quality devices for use in industrial and informatics applications in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers energy storage systems; photovoltaic devices; UPS products and accessories; modular and standalone active power filters; automatic transfer switches; and battery monitoring systems. It also manufactures and sells solar energy equipment, as well as provides maintenance and technical services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Gravitytai Co.,Ltd.
summary: Gravitytai Co.,Ltd. manufactures and distributes indium tin oxide (ITO) conductive films. Its products are used in the manufacture of touch panels of mobile phones, personal digital assistants, and other consumer electronic products, as well as navigation systems, laptops, keyboards, and other areas. The company distributes its products in Taiwan, Mainland China, South Korea, and Japan. Gravitytai Co.,Ltd. is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Newmax Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Newmax Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture, sale, and design of photographic/optical equipment, electronic parts/components, and electrical machinery/supplies in China, Taiwan, Japan, and Vietnam. It manufactures and sells optics mirror and plastic lens to optical equipment manufacturers and computer peripheral digital imaging manufacturers. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Chernan Metal Industrial Corp.
summary: Chernan Metal Industrial Corp. manufactures and sells tin and tin wire products in Taiwan. It also offers solder paste and flux products; copper and nickel; and germanium. The company was formerly known as Tunghui Tin Industry. Chernan Metal Industrial Corp. was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Papago Inc.
summary: Papago Inc. produces and sells vehicle communication devices in Taiwan and internationally. It offers driving recorders; GPS satellite navigation products, such as handheld navigation, car navigation, and car mounted android machine products; electronic rearview mirrors; wireless tire pressure detectors; electronic signage; smart life products; and face recognition solutions. The company offers its products online, as well as through retail stores. Papago Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Epoch Chemtronics Corp.
summary: Epoch Chemtronics Corp. manufactures and sells backlight modules in Taiwan. It offers LED products, including panel, down, integrated, task, shelf, and art panel lights. The company's products are used in a range of applications, such as GPS, smart phones, tablets, and industrial computers. It markets and sells its products under the Epoch Lighting brand name. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Unitel High Technology Corporation
summary: Unitel High Technology Corporation produces and sells custom rubber and plastic parts for use in the commercial and industrial electronic products worldwide. The company offers rubber molding products, such as foot pads, earphone covers, microphone covers, waterproof rings, internal mechanism gaskets, self-adhesive rubber etc.; plastic single and double injection products, including buttons, doors, thrust sliding cover, battery cover switch, headphone jack protection cover etc.; button products; and metal, plastic, and rubber heterogeneous material combination products used for mobile phones, laptops, cameras, and other 3C products. The company was formerly known as Unitel Rubber Corporation and changed its name to Unitel High Technology Corporation in June 2006. Unitel High Technology Corporation was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Unitech Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Unitech Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells automatic identification and data capture technologies worldwide. It provides mobile computer products, such as rugged smartphones, touch computers, industrial PDAs, handheld terminals, enterprise tablets, healthcare mobile computers, wearable computers, touch computers, and mobile clinical assistant; barcode scanners that include linear imager, 2D imager, laser, wireless, pocket, ESD safe, healthcare, and wearable scanners, as well as pen and slot readers; and RFID products, such as reader modules, mobile readers, handheld readers, fixed readers, portable/pocket readers, and antennas. The company also offers intelligent integrated terminals that include IP based biometric terminal; and software solutions, such as MoboLink, a device and data exchange management software, as well as StageGO solutions, a barcode-based device staging solution. It serves its customers in the fields of retail, field services, governments, healthcare, hospitality, logistics and transportation, warehousing, and manufacturing. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Unitech Electronics Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Unitech Computer Co., Ltd.

name: Bison Electronics Inc.
summary: Bison Electronics Inc. engages in the manufacture and sale of camera modules and computer peripheral related products in Taiwan. Its products are used in imaging products, such as video camera modules for notebook computers, industrial handheld display products, home care, automotive image related products, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: ThinTech Materials Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: ThinTech Materials Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sell alloys and optoelectronics materials in Taiwan, Mainland China, Japan, Europe, and the North America. Its products include sputtering targets for flat panel display planar, optical data storage, decorative and functional coating, passive component, optical element, and semi-conductive; and thin film targets for solar cell applications. It also offers flat panel display rotary sputtering targets; alloy metal powders for vacuum induction gas atomization; nickel alloy c-hook for coil wire pickling; sputtering target bonding services; precious metal refining and sales services; analytical services; and metal powder for 3D printing, as well as acid and alkali-resistance alloy, and titanium for cooking/tableware. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Array Inc.
summary: Array Inc. engages in the research, manufacturing, and sale of application delivery controllers, high-end SSL VPN systems, remote desktop access solutions, and application acceleration and WAN optimization controllers. The company also offers network functions platform; and Zentry for modernizing secure access, which helps customers migrate to zero trust security model from perimeter model, such as firewall and VPN. It operates in the Unites States, India, Japan, China, and internationally. Array Inc. was incorporated in 2008 and is based in Milpitas, California. Array Inc. is a subsidiary of Softstar Entertainment Inc.

name: Optivision Technology, Inc.
summary: Optivision Technology, Inc. designs and develops optical films in Taiwan. The company offers components of the backlight modules. Its products are used in LCD backlight modules of various sizes, such as TVs, VCDs, players, projectors, etc.; notebooks, monitors, digital cameras, PDAs, tablets, and other products; mobile phones, car navigation products, etc.; electronic watches, calculators, etc.; and industrial, medical, flight, and other instruments. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Eris Technology Corporation
summary: Eris Technology Corporation manufactures, tests, and sells rectifier diodes, wafers, and light-emitting diodes in Taiwan, Asia, Europe, and the United States. The company offers a range of diodes, including schottky barrier, hyper fast, fast and super-fast recovery, high efficiency, general purpose, ultra-fast, and bridge rectifiers; and diodes for solar modules, transient voltage suppressors, zener diodes, current regulative diodes, small signal diodes, and ESD protection devices. It also provides soldering pads; and manufacturing services for various products using different manufacturing modes. In addition, the company wholesales electronic components. Its products have applications in networking products, LED lamps, solar junction boxes, LED drivers, smart phone chargers, automotive products, USBs, power supply products, and lithium batteries. The company offers its products primarily to original equipment companies. Eris Technology Corporation was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Eris Technology Corporation is a subsidiary of Diodes Incorporated.

name: Ushine Photonics Corporation
summary: Ushine Photonics Corporation produces and supplies indium tin oxide (ITO) film products. The company offers ITO-films for resistive touch panels and projective capacitive touch panels; low resistivity TCO-films; optical clear adhesives; and anti-static protective films, as well as converting services. Its products are used in touch panels, flexible displays, flexible solar cells, and other products. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Zhubei City, Taiwan.

name: Gudeng Precision Industrial Co., Ltd
summary: Gudeng Precision Industrial Co., Ltd provides technology services worldwide. The company offers mask handling solutions, such as ultraviolet reticle POD, reticle SMIF POD, and mask package; and wafer handling solutions, including front opening unified POD, multi-application carriers, FOUP, wafer cassettes, shipping boxes, and cassette boxes. It also provides equipment comprising mask cleaners and purge stations; and cleaning services, mask management and tracking systems, and mask accessories. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tradetool Auto Co., Ltd.
summary: Tradetool Auto Co., Ltd. develops and sells automotive optics, metal stamping, and welding parts in Taiwan. The company offers automotive metal parts, such as metal parts stamping, metal component welding, and stamping die products. It also provides automotive optics parts, including display optical injection component; LED headlight lens and lens core; and head up displays (HUD) comprising HUD freeform mirror injection and coating, HUD freeform mirrors, HUD combiners, and VR lens. The company was formerly known as Jeng Shiang Precision Ind. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Tradetool Auto Co., Ltd. in May 2016. Tradetool Auto Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. provides online games and community space. The company was formerly known as Macrowell Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. in August 2009. MacroWell OMG Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: HLJ Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HLJ Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells photoelectric semiconductors. The company offers epitaxial wafer, optical communication, light-sensor, and lighting products for proximity sensor, high-speed optical fiber communication, gesture recognition, optical sensor, laser monitor, time of flight, long distance night vision surveillance system, and optical communication applications. It also provides foundry and design services. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: U.D.Electronic Corp.
summary: U.D. Electronic Corp. manufactures and sells electronic components worldwide. Its products include RJ45 ICM connectors, pure connectors, LAN filters, and I/O connectors, consumer cables, surge protection devices, audio modules and dongles, and USB to RJ45 dongles, as well as automotive electronics, such as common mode filters and USB connectors. The company offers its products under the UDEJack trademark for the telecommunications, data communications, computer, industrial, and medical markets. The company was incorporated in 2005 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Episil Holding Inc.
summary: Episil Holding Inc. engages in the epitaxial wafer foundry, power semiconductor, and analog integrated circuit businesses in Taiwan. The company was formerly known as Episil Technologies Inc. Episil Holding Inc. was founded in 1985 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Trigold Holdings Limited
summary: Trigold Holdings Limited, through its subsidiaries, sells computers and its peripherals in Taiwan and Mainland China. It also operates B2C and O2O businesses, and amusement parks. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan. Trigold Holdings Limited is a subsidiary of WPG Holdings Limited.

name: ACON Holding Inc.
summary: ACON Holding Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells electronic components for IT, digital home applications, handheld devices, etc. The company was founded in 2017 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Yung Zip Chemical Ind. Co., Ltd.
summary: Yung Zip Chemical Ind. Co., Ltd., a bulk drug manufacturing company, supplies active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs), API intermediates, and specialty chemicals worldwide. It offers antihypertensive, antiviral, iron chelator, anti-inflammatory, analgesic, antipyretic, anti-fungal, schizophrenia, genital herpes outbreak, hypnotic, and sedative products. The company also offers excipients, such as sodium starch glycolate; and custom research and manufacturing services. The company was founded in 1978 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: TTY Biopharm Company Limited
summary: TTY Biopharm Company Limited, a pharmaceutical company, develops and markets branded generics in Taiwan and internationally. It offers oncology drugs, such as Lipo-Dox, Lonsurf, UFUR, TS-1, Pexeda, Gemmis, Oxalip, Irino, Epicin, Tynen, Anazo, Folina, Folina inj, Thado, Andason, Ivic, Asadin, Leavdo, Painkyl, Megest, Episil, Otril, and Zobonic for anti-cancer therapies. The company also provides anti-infection drugs, including Brosym, Colimycin, Cubicin, Lipo-AB, Metacin, Cepiro, and FlucelvaxQuad. In addition, it offers healthcare related drugs, such as Algitab, Alginos, Bio-Cal Plus, and Sulfin for gastrointestinal, bone, and metabolic healthcare. The company also holds a license to develop and commercialize Remimazolam, an ultra-short-acting intravenous benzodiazepine sedative/anesthetic. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Bioteque Corporation
summary: Bioteque Corporation manufactures and sells medical devices in Asia, South America, North America, and internationally. The company provides medical disposables for use in hemodialysis access, endovascular treatment, and other fields. It also offers dialysis products, including hemodialysis bloodlines, A.V.F. needles, and hemodialysis catheters; interventional radiology products, such as pigtail drainage catheter sets, introducer sets, connecting tubes, drainage bags, and radiopaque dilators; urology products comprising ureteral stent sets and urine collection bags; and IV administration products, such as PVC IV infusion bags, PVC bags, and twist-off ports. In addition, the company provides respiratory care products, such as closed suction catheters, and endotracheal tubes; vascular access products comprising angiographic catheters, PTA balloon dilatation catheters, sheath introducers, guidewires, high pressure connecting tubes, PTCA balloon dilatation catheter-rapid exchange products, manifolds, and Y connectors; and medical components, including dialyzer connectors and caps, recirculating connectors with cap, rotating luer lock connectors, pump and T connectors, injection sites, female luers, and luer lock and chamber caps. Bioteque Corporation was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Synmosa Biopharma Corporation
summary: Synmosa Biopharma Corporation, a specialty pharmaceutical company, researches and develops, manufactures, markets, and distributes pharmaceutical and healthcare products under the Synmosa brand in Taiwan. It offers its products in various therapeutic areas, including cardiovascular, respiratory, urology, sex hormone, and oncology. The company provides its products in various forms, such as effervescent tablets, granules, nasal sprays, metered dosed inhalers, and other forms. It also offers contract manufacturing services. The company also exports its products to South Africa, China, Hong Kong, Thailand, Singapore, Malaysia, Vietnam, Myanmar, Cambodia, Peru, Costa Rica, and Nicaragua. Synmosa Biopharma Corporation was incorporated in 1980 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: BenQ Medical Technology Corporation
summary: BenQ Medical Technology Corporation provides medical equipment, consumables, and solutions for various medical institutions and professionals worldwide. It offers operating tables, surgical lights, ultrasound systems, medical and protective masks, medical display monitors, and IQOR integrated systems. The company was formerly known as Trident Medical Corp. and changed its name to BenQ Medical Technology Corporation in June 2011. BenQ Medical Technology Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: General Biologicals Corporation
summary: General Biologicals Corporation engages in manufacturing and selling in-vitro diagnostic devices and pharmaceuticals in Taiwan and internationally. It offers real-time PCR products, including IVD kits and genesis products for breast cancer; ELISA Products comprising KIWI products; RIA products for gastrin, hepatitis, and thyroid, as well as vitamin products; rapid tests consisting of blood glucose monitoring systems, and cardiac and tumor markers, as well as products related to drug abuse, fertility hormones, and infectious diseases; lab ware products; and raw materials that comprise antibodies and antigens. The company also provides protein drugs for oral candidiasis; and point of care products for liver fibrosis and breast cancer indications. In addition, it offers products for use in clinics and laboratories for preventives and cancer diagnosis, including skin and oral care, breast cancer and liver related, and advanced cancer diagnosis products, as well as healthcare and education services. General Biologicals Corporation was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Rossmax International Ltd.
summary: Rossmax International Ltd. develops and supplies healthcare products and solutions in Taiwan. The company offers activity monitor, a device for monitoring and tracking fitness-related metrics, such as distance walked or run, counting steps, and calories burned; body fat monitors that are used to measure body fat, body mass index, lean mass, muscle mass, and water ratio along with body weight; blood pressure monitors; sphygmomanometer, a device that measures blood pressure; stethoscope, an acoustic medical device for auscultation, or listening to the internal sounds; handheld pulse oximeter monitors to measure the amount of oxygen carried in the body; non-contact telephoto thermometers; and blood glucose monitoring system, a medical device for determining the approximate concentration of glucose in the blood. It also provides nebulizer, a drug delivery device used to administer medication; suction unit, a machine used to remove mucus and other bodily fluids; aero spacer, a device used to increase the ease of administering aerosolized medication; peak flow meter, a device used to monitor a person's ability to breathe out air; heating pad for therapy; and anti-decubitus mattresses. In addition, the company operates rossmax healthstyle app, which offers distributors the possibility to manage their store locations, product promotions, and local events; and health station for pharmacies, doctors, and public places. It provides healthcare products in the fields of cardiovascular, diabetes, respiratory, fever, and wound healing diseases. The company also exports its products. Rossmax International Ltd. was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Pacific Hospital Supply Co., Ltd
summary: Pacific Hospital Supply Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures, processes, and sells medical disposable products and equipment in Taiwan. The company's disposable medical devices include tubings, bags, bottles, closed wound drainage systems, surgical suction instruments, respiratory therapy products, and other products. It also provides medical gas systems, such as medical gas outlets, secondary equipment, accessories, and pipeline equipment, as well as pipeline system design and maintenance services. Pacific Hospital Supply Co., Ltd. offers its products for health care industry clients. The company also exports its products to approximately 80 countries and regions. Pacific Hospital Supply Co., Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Tien Liang BioTech Co., Ltd.
summary: Tien Liang BioTech Co., Ltd. produces and sells pharmaceutical products in Taiwan and internationally. The company pills for cough, lumbar bone soreness cloth, and stool and gastric problems, as well as liver, bladder, bone pain. It also provides hair removal and skin cream; pain coagulation gel and spray; alcohol, cranberry, and deep-sea oil capsules; pumpkin seed oil; soaps; and liqueur amine-based acid. Tien Liang BioTech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1960 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Microbio Co., Ltd.
summary: Microbio Co., Ltd. develops and sells various therapeutics in Taiwan. It offers nutritional supplements, skin care products, and organic agricultural products. The company also provides MS-20 for ameliorating fatigue and appetite loss associated with cancer chemotherapy; and Herbiron, which reveals symptoms of iron deficiency anemia and menstrual discomfort. Its pre-clinical stage products include SNS01, SNA02, and SNA-03 to treat various types of cancers, as well as SNA-07 for cancer immune therapy; and SNP-630 to treat non-alcoholic steatohepatitis. The company's Phase I clinical trial products consist of OB-318, an anti-cancer drug; MB-110 for the treatment of hepatitis C; SNP-810, an acetaminophen; FB317 to treat moderate-to-severe allergic asthma and chronic idiopathic urticaria; and FB704A for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis, cancer, and cytokine storms. In addition, it offers FB825, which is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of atopic dermatitis, allergic asthma, hyper IgE syndrome, and food allergy. Additionally, the company's Phase III clinical trial products comprise ON101 to treat diabetic foot ulcer; and MB-6 that acts as an adjuvant for metastatic colorectal cancer. Further, the company's discovery stage pipeline includes FB121 for AIDS; SNA01 to treat PD-1 related cancer; SNA02 for cancer immune therapy; and SNS01 for recurrent metastatic non-small cell lung cancer. Microbio Co., Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: United Orthopedic Corporation
summary: United Orthopedic Corporation engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of orthopedic implants and orthopedic surgical instruments. It offers orthopedic surgical equipment and its manufacturing equipment; and special metal and plastics materials, as well as education, service, and support for surgeons and hospital. The company's products portfolio includes artificial hip joints, including partial hip joints, joints for large trochanteric fracture, Moore hip prosthesis, and customized artificial hip joints for individual tumor patients; artificial knee joint, such as artificial knee replacement joint, revision knee replacement system, restricted artificial knee joints, and customized artificial knee joints for individual tumor patients; and spine products consisting of vertebral fixation devices. It Corporation also provides injury and other orthopedic products comprise orthopedic internal fixation, bone plates, bone nails, bone pins, and bone screws; and OEM products, such as orthopedic internal fixation. In addition, the imports and exports its products. It serves in Taiwan, Asia, the United States, Europe, Africa, and Australia. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. United Orthopedic Corporation is a subsidiary of Chi-Yi Investment Co. Ltd.

name: United Orthopedic Corporation
summary: United Orthopedic Corporation engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of orthopedic implants and orthopedic surgical instruments. It offers orthopedic surgical equipment and its manufacturing equipment; and special metal and plastics materials, as well as education, service, and support for surgeons and hospital. The company's products portfolio includes artificial hip joints, including partial hip joints, joints for large trochanteric fracture, Moore hip prosthesis, and customized artificial hip joints for individual tumor patients; artificial knee joint, such as artificial knee replacement joint, revision knee replacement system, restricted artificial knee joints, and customized artificial knee joints for individual tumor patients; and spine products consisting of vertebral fixation devices. It Corporation also provides injury and other orthopedic products comprise orthopedic internal fixation, bone plates, bone nails, bone pins, and bone screws; and OEM products, such as orthopedic internal fixation. In addition, the imports and exports its products. It serves in Taiwan, Asia, the United States, Europe, Africa, and Australia. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. United Orthopedic Corporation is a subsidiary of Chi-Yi Investment Co. Ltd.

name: Genovate Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Genovate Biotechnology Co., Ltd. operates as a specialty pharmaceutical company in Taiwan. It offers central nervous system drugs, cardiovascular system drugs, musculoskeletal system drugs, immune preparation drugs, anti-infective agents, anticancer drugs, anti-viral drugs, respiratory drugs, genitourinary system drugs, and gastrointestinal drugs. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: DR.Chip Biotechnology Incorporation
summary: DR. Chip Biotechnology Incorporation designs, manufactures, and sells biochips and other related products. The company's products include food safety examination systems, human diagnosis arrays systems, agriculture examination systems, food examination arrays systems, and laboratory instruments, as well as DNA kits. It also offers laboratory planning, design, and other services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Ma Kuang Healthcare Holding Limited
summary: Kuang Healthcare Holding Limited, an investment holding company, provides medical services in Taiwan. The company offers TCM healthcare services, such as TCM orthopedic, weight management, pain management, examination, and TCM aftercare services; and TCM consultation, acupuncture, TuiNa therapy, cupping, Gua Sha/Scrapping, and TDP lamp services. It also provides Chinese medicinal powders, healthcare products, and Chinese proprietary medicines. The company operates 20 TCM clinics and TuiNa centres. Kuang Healthcare Holding Limited was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in George Town, the Cayman Islands.

name: TaiMed Biologics Inc.
summary: TaiMed Biologics Inc., a biotechnology company, develops health-care products. The company develops and markets TMB-355, a humanized monoclonal antibody intravenous infusion for the treatment of HIV-1 infection. It is also developing TMB-355, a humanized monoclonal antibody intramuscular injection, which is in Phase II clinical trial for treating HIV-1; TMB-355, humanized monoclonal antibody intravenous push that is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of HIV-1 infection; TMB-365, an anti-CD4 recombinant humanized monoclonal antibody, which is in Phase I clinical trial for treating HIV infections; TMB-Bispecific, a bispecific neutralizing antibody that is in Phase I clinical trial to treat HIV infections; and TMB-ADC, an antibody√Ç¬ñdrug conjugate for treating HIV infection, as well as VRC07-523LS, a neutralizing HIV-1 antibody. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Unicon Optical Co., Ltd.
summary: Unicon Optical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells contact lenses primarily for ODM/OEM market in Taiwan. The company offers disposable contact, coating design color, aspheric, and silicone lenses. It also exports its products to Japan, China, Germany, the Netherlands, Italy, Poland, Russia, Canada, India, South Africa, and Singapore. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Strength Master Fitness Tech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Strength Master Fitness Tech Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells fitness equipment in Taiwan. The company offers treadmills, exercise and recumbent bikes, and elliptical trainers. It also provides Interactive Health Partner, a medically-based system; and Fit Plus(Fit +) App and FitPlus(BLE) App, which moves various functions on treadmills and bike consoles to phones or tablets. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Liposome Company, Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Liposome Company, Ltd., a clinical-stage specialty pharmaceutical company, engages in the development and commercialization of nanomedicines that combine its proprietary lipid-assembled drug delivery platform with approved active pharmaceutical ingredients (APIs). The BioSeizer lipid formulation technology is designed to enable local sustained release and fast onset of APIs at the site of disease or injury with enhanced pharmacokinetic (PK) control by customization of lipid layers; and NanoX active drug loading technology enables the potential for reduced dosing frequency and enhanced distribution of liposome-encapsulated APIs to the desired site. Its lead product candidate is TLC599, an intraarticular injectable BioSeizer formulation of the API steroid dexamethasone sodium phosphate (DSP), which is in Phase III clinical trial for the treatment of knee osteoarthritis pain. The company's product candidates also comprise TLC590, a non-opioid BioSeizer formulation of the API ropivacaine that has completed Phase II clinical trial to treat post-surgical pain; TLC399, a multilamellar and multivesicular BioSeizer formulation of DSP, which is in Phase II clinical trial for ophthalmology indications; TLC178, an API that is in Phase I/II dose escalation trial to treat rhabdomyosarcoma; and TLC19 that is in Phase I clinical trial to treat COVID-19.Taiwan Liposome Company, Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Kino Co., Ltd.
summary: Kino Co., Ltd. engages in the development and selling of healthcare and beauty products in Malaysia, Singapore, China, Taiwan, and internationally. It operates through Functional Drinks, Health Care Products, Food Service and Entertainment, Performing arts, and Others segments. The company offers nutraceutical products, including health related enhancement functional drinks, as well as health pads and herbal tea under the Kinohimitsu brand; and facial mask, cleanser, slimming cream, and other skincare products under the Activa and Xpertise brands. It is also involved in the business of restaurant and entertainment, conduction of artistic performance activities, production and brokerage, and sale of tickets. In addition, the company engages in the production of fine metal accessories. The company sells its products through pharmacies, departmental chains, hypermarkets, and health and beauty stores. It operates a network of approximately 5,000 physical channels. The company was formerly known as Kino Biotech Co., Ltd. The company was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Camana Bay, the Cayman Islands.

name: TaiGen Biopharmaceuticals Holdings Limited
summary: TaiGen Biopharmaceuticals Holdings Limited, a pharmaceutical company, develops novel therapeutics for infectious diseases and other indications worldwide. The company develops Taigexyn (Nemonoxacin), a non-fluorinated quinolone antibiotic for the treatment of bacterial infections. It is also developing Taigexyn for treating community-acquired pneumonia and diabetic foot infection; Burixafor, a stem cell mobilizer for stem cell transplantation and chemosenzitization; TG-1000, an influenza antiviral drug for treating influenza A, B; and Furaprevir, a hepatitis C virus protease inhibitor for the treatment of chronic hepatitis C. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Genetics Generation Advancement Corp.
summary: Genetics Generation Advancement Corp. provides genetic testing and informatics services in Taiwan, Asia, Europe, and the Americas. The company offers pre-implantation stage, prenatal stage, newborn medical examination, health management, reproductive medicine, obstetrics and gynecology, neonatology and pediatrics, allergy/immunology/rheumatology, gastroenterology and hepatology, oncology, cardiology, and medical research testing services, as well as counseling services for clinicians and patients to identify genetic risks, genetic testing options, interpret the implications of the test results, and help patients make informed healthcare decisions. It also provides bioinformatics and computational life sciences, materials sciences, laboratory informatics, and enterprise quality management system services. The company was formerly known as Genesis Genetics Asia Corp. and changed its name to Genetics Generation Advancement Corp. in February 2016. Genetics Generation Advancement Corp. was founded in 2008 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Bioptik Technology Incorporation
summary: Bioptik Technology Incorporation researches, develops, produces, and sells medical devices and reagents in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers EasyMate blood glucose monitoring systems; blood glucose/cholesterol/uric acid monitoring systems and its strips; and hyaluronic acid skin care products. It also provides skin care products and dietary supplements, as well as biodiesel products. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Zhunan, Taiwan.

name: PharmaEngine, Inc.
summary: PharmaEngine, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the development of drugs and therapeutic drugs for treating cancer diseases in Taiwan and Europe. It is developing ONIVYDE for patients with gemcitabine-treated metastatic pancreatic cancer; PEP06, which is in Phase I stage for the treatment of cancer; and PEP07, an oral small molecule drug, which is in preclinical development stage to regulate DNA damage response. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: INTAI Technology Corporation
summary: INTAI Technology Corporation manufactures and sells precision hardware products for the automotive, aerospace, precision hardware, medical device, and electronic communication industries in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides standard and customized precision fasteners. It also offers medical components for endoscopic minimally invasive surgery, breast biopsy device, and disposable and reusable device applications; and orthopedic implants, such as thoracolumbar sets, cervical sets, pedical screws, peek and titanium cages, trauma screws and plates, and surgical instruments. In addition, the company provides RF and microwave products. INTAI Technology Corporation was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Savior Lifetec Corporation
summary: Savior Lifetec Corporation, a specialty injectable company, produces and supplies sterile APIs and finished dosage formulations. The company offers imipenem and cilastatin sodium, an antibacterial agent for intravenous infusion; and meropenem, a beta-lactamase resistant carbapenem antibiotic for parenteral administration. It also provides ertapenem, a form of carbapenem for use on gram-negative and gram-positive anaerobes and aerobic. The company's pipeline products include SLC-006 for prostate cancer endometriosis uterine leiomyoma; and sterile paliperidone palmitate API for the treatment of schizophrenia. Savior Lifetec Corporation was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Miaoli County, Taiwan.

name: GlycoNex Incorporation
summary: GlycoNex Incorporation engages in the development of cancer drugs using glycosphingolipid antigen and human monoclonal antibody technologies in Taiwan. The company's development pipeline for the treatment of solid tumors includes GNX102, a humanized monoclonal antibody, currently under phase 1 clinical stage; GNX201, an antibody drug currently under preclinical stage; GNX203, glycan-directed antibody drug currently under the lead optimization stage; and GNX1021, a first-in-class antibodydrug conjugate currently under preclinical stage. It is also involved in the development of SPD (Denosumab), a humanized IgG2 antibody that is in phase 3 clinical trial for the treatment of osteoporosis and cancer bone metastases. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: GeneReach Biotechnology Corp.
summary: GeneReach Biotechnology Corp. develops, manufactures, and markets products for applied nucleic acid detection technology primarily in Taiwan. The company offers pathogen detection platforms, including equipment and reagents; and animal use medicines, biotechnology services, medical materials and equipment, and precision instruments. Its products are used in aquaculture, agriculture, food, companion animal, livestock, and human health industries. The company also provides polymerase chain reaction training programs, molecular diagnostic technical solutions, laboratory installation services, OEM/ODM contract manufacturing services, and research collaboration services. GeneReach Biotechnology Corp. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: InnoPharmax Inc.
summary: InnoPharmax Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company, develops and commercializes products for the treatment of infectious diseases, immunology, oncology, and other specialties in Taiwan.
