The company offers anti-infection agents, including Bestnem, an imipenem and cilastatin sodium solution that is used intravenous in the treatment of various infections caused by susceptible organisms, such as lower respiratory tract, skin and skin structure, intra-abdominal, gynecologic, or bone and joint infections; and various complicated or uncomplicated urinary tract infections, septicemia, or endocarditis caused by susceptible organisms. It also provides gadopentetate dimeglumine, a contrast medium for magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the body after intravenous administration; and gadodiamide, a contrast medium for cranial and spinal MRI, as well as for general MRI of the body after intravenous administration. In addition, the company offers oncology agents comprising Innomustine for the treatment of hodgkin's disease, non-hodgkin's lymphoma, and plasmocytoma, as well as chronic lymphocytic leukemia and breast cancer; and immunological agents that include Cyclosporine A, an immuno-suppresant with a low aqueous solubility used for the inhibition of graft rejection in organ transplant recipients, as well as inpheno tablets. Further, it is developing oncology, cardiovascular, CNS, urology, and contrast agents, as well as agents for metabolic disorders and drugs for rare diseases. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan. InnoPharmax Inc. is a subsidiary of Synmosa Biopharma Corporation.

name: Arich Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Arich Enterprise Co., Ltd. provides medical sales and promotion, and logistics services in Taiwan. It promotes prescription drugs and over the counter products in drug stores; and medicines to specific specialties in hospitals, clinics, and drug stores. The company also conducts public seminars, promotional activities, long-term educational program, RTD meetings, in-store displays, anti-counterfeit activities, and medical seminars; and offers channel coverage, inventory control system, order follow-up techniques, and market research analysis. Further, the company offers various supply chain services, including international bond, registration, hospital pricing service, warehouse management, transportation and distribution, account receivable management, information linkage, and drug price submission; logistics services consisting of inventory control, quality control procedure, GMP, and bonded warehouse storage; and value-added services, such as re-labeling, temperature-controlled delivery, handling of returned goods/disposable items, batch-tracking management, customer complaints handling, and delivery systems. The company serves medical centers, area hospitals, district hospitals, and general practitioners, as well as chain stores and hyper markets, drug stores, and wholesalers. Arich Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: OBI Pharma, Inc.
summary: OBI Pharma, Inc., a bio-pharma company, develops and licenses therapeutic agents for unmet medical needs against cancer in Taiwan. It offers Adagloxad Simolenin (OBI-822), a breast cancer active immunity anti-cancer drug, which is in Phase III for generating antibody against tumor carbohydrate antigen Globo H; OBI-833, an immunity anti-cancer drug, which completed Phase I clinical trial for treating and tracking lung cancer; OBI-866 SSEA-4, an active immuno-oncology drug; OBI-888, a passive immunotherapy monoclonal antibody, which is under Phase I/II human clinical trial targeting Globo H; OBI-999, an antibody drug conjugate that is in Phase II human clinical trial; OBI-898 SSEA4, a passive immunity monoclonal antibody that is in preclinical stage; OBI-998 SSEA4,an antibody small molecule drug complex, which targets toxic drugs to malignant tumors; OBI-3424, a micromolecule chemotherapy prodrug that is in Phase I clinical trial; and OBI-858, a clostridium botulinum toxin. The company was founded in 2002 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: MedFirst Healthcare Services, Inc.
summary: MedFirst Healthcare Services, Inc. engages in the sale of medical supplies in Taiwan and China. It offers diabetes care, respiratory care, incontinence care, wound dressing, stoma care, pain care, protective gear, home healthcare, and special nutrition products, as well as medical instruments. The company also offers healthcare products consist of beauty care, makeup, and food products, as well as daily supplies and medical books; biomedical products, including health food and drugs; and management consultancy services. In addition, it operates as a contractor for medical supply sales department of hospitals; and agent for foreign medical supplies brand. Further, the company is involved in the management of hospital shopping malls. It sells products through its retail stores and online. MedFirst Healthcare Services, Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: AmCad BioMed Corporation
summary: AmCad BioMed Corporation develops computer-assisted detection and diagnosis (CAD) software devices primarily in Taiwan. Its products include AmCAD-UT Detection, a CAD device for ultrasound images of thyroid nodules; and AmCAD-UO, a solution for obstructive sleep apnea detection. The company is also developing AmCAD-CA, a software designed for analyzing digital cytological images; AmCAD-US, a software device for visualizing and quantifying statistical distributions of backscattered signals echoed by tissue compositions in the body from FDA-cleared ultrasound systems; and AmCAD-UV, a software device that is used for quantifying and classifying the ultrasonic color intensity data acquired from FDA-cleared ultrasound systems and displaying the noise-reduced color-coded pulsatile signals. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Pharmadax Inc.
summary: Pharmadax Inc. engages in the pharmaceutical research and development business in Taiwan, the Unites States, China, and internationally. It primarily focuses on the development of oral solid controlled-release technology pellets. The company offers Glyburide, Quetiapine Fumarate ER, and Metoprolol Succinate ER tablets, as well as contract development and/or contract manufacturing services for solid orals. It provides its products for a range of therapeutic areas, including schizophrenia, hypertension, diabetes, cold, Parkinson's disease, ADHD, chronic hepatitis, overactive bladder, and muscle relaxant. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: SynCore Biotechnology Co.,Ltd
summary: SynCore Biotechnology Co.,Ltd, a biopharmaceutical company, engages in the research and development, manufacture, and marketing of drugs in the areas of oncology, ophthalmology, dermatology, and infectious diseases in Taiwan and China. The company offers SB03-Veregen, an ointment for the treatment of patients with external genital and perianal warts; and distributes cameras under the epiCam name that is used in recording the progress of ophthalmology diseases. It is also involved in the development of SB01, an injectable anti-cancer new ingredient (NCE) that is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of head and neck cancer; SB02, an anti-cancer NCE, which is in Phase I clinical trial for use in the treatment of stomach cancer; SB04 that is in Phase II/III clinical trials for the treatment of patients with dry age-related macular degeneration; and SB05, a composition of cytostatic drug paclitaxel combined with neutral and positive lipids, which is in Phase III clinical trial for the treatment of patients with triple negative breast cancer and pancreatic cancer. The company has partnerships with Medigene AG; MacuCLEAR Inc.; Y-YBAR; Epipole Ltd.; Sinphar Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.; and The National Health Research Institutes. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Yilan, Taiwan. SynCore Biotechnology Co.,Ltd is a subsidiary of Sinphar Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.

name: Holy Stone Healthcare Co., Ltd.
summary: Holy Stone Healthcare Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, develops and sells hyaluronic acid-related therapeutic products in Taiwan. The company offers RenehaVis and SportVis, which are injectable medical devices for osteoarthritis and soft tissue injuries; TRUD, a medical device that contains a mixture of hyaluronic acid used for the treatment and prevention of ulcerative colitis in inflammatory bowel disease (IBD); and GAF, a gel for anal fissure healing. It also develops IBD98-M, an oral capsule that is in a Phase IIa trial for ulcerative colitis; CA102N, a receptor-targeted chemotherapy that is in a Phase II trial for metastatic colorectal cancer, as well as in a pre-clinical stage for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma and a discovery stage for triple-negative breast cancer; ND108E, a CNS-targeted HA conjugate that is in a pre-clinical trial for Alzheimer's disease; AMD112, a non-invasive HA-conjugated small molecule therapy that is in a pre-clinical trial for wet age-related macular degeneration and other neovascular retinal diseases; and HylCaryo, a hyaluronic acid (HA)-derived nanoparticle platform in a discovery stage. In addition, the company engages in general investment; development and sale of medical devices; biotechnology services; and patent application for pharmaceutical products. Holy Stone Healthcare Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Visgeneer Inc.
summary: Visgeneer Inc., a biotech company, develops and produces biomedical products in the fields of medical device, cosmetics/skin care, bacterial fermentation, and cancer gene identification. The company offers blood glucose and ketone, and uric acid monitoring systems. It also provides multi-active cream gels, wrinkle reducing eye creams, hydro complete emulsions, revitalizing essences, toning lotions, amino acid cleansing creams, multi-perfection firming gel creams, aqua emulsions, herbal gel lotions, anti- aging creams, brightening serums, revitalizing lotions, masks, UV shield creams, dark spot corrector pearl whitening cream, anti-acne complexes, glucosamine creams, essences, hyaluronic acid and intensive whitening essences, rejuvenating essence creams, and anti-aging time complex capsules under Coresence name. Visgeneer Inc. is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Chung Hwa Food Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chung Hwa Food Industrial Co., Ltd. produces and sells soybean processed foods in Taiwan. It offers tofu products, desserts, and hot pot ingredients. The company sells its products through a network of dealers. It also exports its products to Hong Kong. The company was formerly known as Herng Yih Food Industrial Co Ltd and changed its name to Chung Hwa Food Industrial Co., Ltd. in July 2013. Chung Hwa Food Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Fructose Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Fructose Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells syrup products in Taiwan. The company's products comprise fructose, maltose, isomalto-oligo saccharides, and maltodextrin syrups, as well as non-dairy creamers, vegetable oil powder, dextrose, and sorbitol. Its products are used in a range of applications, including beverages, dairy products, iced products, desserts, bakery food, soy sauces, health foods, candy, jams and jellies, sachima, bean fillings, chewing gums, candied fruits, biscuits, coffee, milk tea, instant drinks, toothpaste, cleaning and makeup products, and interface activators. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: SunVic Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: SunVic Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of EMI shielding laminate and flexible laminated packaging materials in Taiwan. It offers wire and cable materials, including shielding tapes; foil free edge tapes; and polyester, cotton paper, non-woven, and foam polypropylene strips. The company also provides specialized composite films, such as zipper patches; and other films, as well as vacuum-sealed and thermo-forming, and medical packaging bags. In addition, it offers EMI shielding and ESD packaging materials; industrial composite films; and other tapes. The company was formerly known as Taipei Lamination Industries Inc. and changed its name to SunVic Technology Co., Ltd. in April 2007. SunVic Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Shih-Kuen Plastics Co., Ltd.
summary: Shih-Kuen Plastics Co., Ltd. produces and supplies plastic sheets. The company offers double polished PVC sheets, including super clear, normal clear, and transparent colored; textured embossing PVC sheet, such as textured embossing, translucent textured, and semi-transparent textured; super clear laminated and colored laminated PVC sheets; and UV stabilized outdoor PVC sheets; cold crack resistant PVC sheeting; and fire flame retardant PVC sheets. Its products are used in home and office supplies, construction and industrial, outdoor PVC waterproof covers, and medical applications. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Toung Loong Textile MFG. Co., LTD.
summary: Toung Loong Textile MFG. Co., LTD. operates as a textile manufacturing company in Taiwan. It develops and produces air and draw textured, shape control twist, alpha yarn, and air textured covered yarns, as well as functional synthetic yarn dyes and sewing threads. The company was founded in 1960 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Shanyuan Co., Ltd.
summary: Shanyuan Co., Ltd. engages in the construction of residential buildings in Taiwan. It also engages in the rental of office buildings and storefronts, and other properties. The company was formerly known as Fu Chan Industrial Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shanyuan Co., Ltd. in January 2008. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: King Chou Marine Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: King Chou Marine Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells netting products for the marine industries under the King Net brand name worldwide. The company offers purse seine, trawl, Danish seine, gill and trammel, trap, and set nets; long line, twine, and rope products; marine hardware products, such as cable clamps, purse rings, snap rings, steel triangles, choker hooks, alloy galv. connecting links, strong C-rings, ring scoopers, splice needles, Samson splicing kits, chains, floats, swivels, and hooks; fish farming and cage nets; and other nets, such as safety, flower, camouflage, and melon nets. It also provides a range of sports nets for soccer, volleyball, baseball, and tennis. The company was formerly known as King Chou Fish Net Mfg. Co., Ltd. and changed its name to King Chou Marine Technology Co., Ltd. in 2002. King Chou Marine Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Ensure Global Corp., Ltd.
summary: Ensure Global Corp., Ltd. manufactures and sells spun-like fabrics and yarns in Taiwan. The company offers air and draw textured yarns; knitted fabrics; and mirror surface wiping clothes. It also provides cotton-like fabric and microfiber products. In addition, the company offers grating, twill, and interweaving products. Further, it provides wind breakers, shirts, knitting sports wears, casual pants, and durable towels. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Kwang Ming Silk Mill Co., Ltd.
summary: Kwang Ming Silk Mill Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of polyester processing yarn. The company offers composite fabrics, special functionality fabrics, synthetic fiber fabrics, and general garments materials, as well as man-made fiber products. It is also involved in real estate leasing and trading business. The company's products are used for fashion clothing, environmental protection functional fabrics, outdoor leisure fabrics, and home decoration, as well as cloth for shoe materials. The company is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: GFun Industrial Corporation
summary: GFun Industrial Corporation manufactures and sells coated and laminated functional fabrics in Taiwan. It offers various functional membranes and fabrics; and develops various types of wick, windproof, water-repellent, anti-UV, anti-bacterial, and abrasion-resistant functional fabrics. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Yao I Fabric Co., Ltd.
summary: Yao I Fabric Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells filament and spun products in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include various kinds of fishing, tennis, badminton racket, and cutting lines; industrial wires, mesh cloth chairs, pet mats, breathable beds, knitted cotton car seats, car seats with blankets, and automotive sound-absorbing cotton materials; and environmentally friendly stretch cotton, firewood, stretch cotton, and electronic supplies blankets, as well as shoes with cotton insulation class, and bedding and sofa with a stretch cotton. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc.
summary: Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells non-woven materials and special medical supplies in Taiwan and internationally. It provides electrostatic filtration materials for medical and industrial mask media, and other filtration applications; and composite nonwoven products for coolant and air filter, vacuum filter bag, HEPA and cabin filter, water filtration compound material applications. The company also offers thermal insulation products for glove, sock, shoe, hat, clothing material, and mask insulation material applications; and linen laundry and leasing, logistic, and medical supplies for hospitals. Mytrex Health Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Hakers Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Hakers Enterprise Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets garments and other related textile products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers sportswear products, including swim trunks, shorts, jackets, and trousers. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Singtex Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Singtex Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, and sale of eco-friendly functional textile products in Taiwan. It offers functional fabrics; and functional, specialty, and comfort yarns. The company was founded in 1989 is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Golden Friends Corporation
summary: Golden Friends Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells elevators, escalators, and generators in Taiwan. It operates in three segments: Sales, Maintenance, and GFC Shanghai. The company offers passenger, high speed, and home elevators, as well as escalators/moving walks and pneumatic vacuum elevators. It is also involved in sale and manufacture of elevators and parts; sale of vacuum pneumatic shuttle; and sale and installation of diesel generators. The company's products are used in offices and factories, shopping malls, hotels, mansions, hospitals, public constructions, and institutes projects. Golden Friends Corporation was founded in 1974 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan. Golden Friends Corporation is a subsidiary of Changjiang Property Co., Ltd.

name: Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd
summary: Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd operates in the mold processing industry in Taiwan and internationally. It offers double column, vertical, horizontal, high speed double column, moving cross rail double column, and gantry machining centers, as well as drilling and tapping machining centers. The company was formerly known as Kao Fong Iron Factory and changed its name to Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd. in 1972. Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd was founded in 1968 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan. Kao Fong Machinery Co., Ltd is a subsidiary of Hota Industrial Mfg. Co., Ltd.

name: Taiwan Calsonic Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Calsonic Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells car air conditioning products, electronics, and other products in Taiwan. The company offers car air conditioning systems, such as unified central panels, air conditioning controllers, driver alert systems, night vision systems, body control modules, condensers, evaporators, blowers, motors, inter coolers, water cooled radiators, and chip coolers; and engineering products, including vacuum, air, and no fuse breakers, as well as electromagnetic contractors, inverters, programmable controllers, energy saving systems, robots, control devices, and thin film extension products. It also provides power distribution equipment and industry automatic control products, as well as industrial robot/electronic process equipment. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kuen Ling Machinery Refrigerating Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuen Ling Machinery Refrigerating Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ice water mainframes and air-conditioning equipment in Taiwan and internationally. Its products include water cooled and air-cooled ice water, computer room box, hot and cold water, and condenser automatic cleaning machines; ice storage tanks; vacuum dryers; refrigeration and open screw compressor units; cooling fans and direct expansion air conditioners; and direct expansion inverter air conditioning units; and ice water cooler and condensers. The company also offers OEM and ODM services for air-conditioning equipment manufacturers. Its products are used in office buildings, commercial buildings, hospitals, and schools. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Chian Hsing Forging Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Chian Hsing Forging Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells various forged products in Taiwan. Its forged products include hardware, bicycle, motorbike, automobile, and track vehicle parts, as well as industrial engineering vehicle components and other products. The company offers auto parts comprising C.V. joints and driving elements of front wheel; inner races; inner race crosses; bearing cups, pistons, and housings; transmission parts; transmission bearing spang products; transmission joint gears; mandrils, rear axis, and core axis of the generator; air conditioning belt pulleys; bevel gears; magnetic poles and driving gears; motor brake parts; aluminum alloy forging parts that include ammonia cans for auto air-conditioners; flange bases; and pipes, excavator teethes, and tubes. It also provides assorted hardware parts, including impactors, saddles, pneumatic toolings, tone hole parts, and rod couplings, as well as parts of sports goods, which include cranks, high-pressure joints, high-tension bolts/nuts, alloy bearing forgings, and delivering tube forgings. In addition, the company offers motorcycle parts, such as gear shafts, gear blanks, start gears, transmission shafts, and ammonia cans for auto air-conditioners; starting gear and clutch gear forged work products; shaft and axle parts; and clutches, tube yokes, and chain gears. Further, it provides rail parts, which comprise tie plates. The company was formerly known as Hsieh Hsing Iron Factory and changed its name to Chian Hsing Forging Industrial Co., Ltd. in 1980. Chian Hsing Forging Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1971 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Honyi International Company Limited
summary: Honyi International Company Limited manufactures and sells plastic injection molds. The company offers precision thermoplastic injection molds for use in various applications, including automotive, home appliances, computer, consumers, communication, electronics, etc. It also provides various enclosure manufacturing services, such as tooling fabrication, injection molding, sheet metal stamping, secondary post-molding process, and final assembly services in automotive, home appliance, and information tech. applications. Honyi International Company Limited was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Shieh Yih Machinery Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Shieh Yih Machinery Industry Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells mechanical press equipment. The company offers automation press production line solutions; servo presses; straight side mechanical presses; link mechanical presses; special application presses; and C frame and solid frame mechanical presses. It serves clients in Europe, the United States, Thailand, and Mexico. The company was formerly known as Shieh Yih Chuang Ironworks Co. and changed its name to Shieh Yih Machinery Industry Co., Ltd. in 1982. Shieh Yih Machinery Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1962 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd
summary: Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd. produces and sells car and motorcycle parts in Taiwan. The company's primary products include precision stamping products, motorcycle and bicycle disc brakes, motorcycle start gears, car seat recliners, car brake parts, automotive safety shackles, and steam locomotive seats. It also provides tubes, seat belt reels, tongues, tappet and shims, frames for airbag, hand brakes, blanking gears, sectors and latches, slide stand, foot support and rest, saddles, handle bar and clamps, triple clamps, ABS phonic wheels, slope plates, bicycle parts, and engine gears and other high precision metal components. In addition, the company offers clutch and gas brake pedal, RAEV, push and pull mechanism, steering assembly, and rack and pinion, as well as medical equipment, sporting goods, and computer parts. Fine Blanking & Tool Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Shuz Tung Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Shuz Tung Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells machinery and automation equipment in Taiwan and China. The company provides pipe/tube benders, such as auto, semi-auto, and special customer pipe benders; bicycle manufacture equipment, which include pre-preparations, fork preparations, front fork processes, frame assembling's, wheel/rim makings, bike assembling's, EN testers, handlebar processes, and fixtures; and end forming machinery, such as pipe shape forming, pipe end forming, and pipe end processing machines. It also offers auto integration that include intelligent welding robots, ATV welding robot sets, intelligent handling robots, auto saddle products, and laser cuttings; hydroforming OEM for application in bicycle, gardening, lighting, transportation, and bath industries; laser welding solution; and 3D laser cutting machine. Shuz Tung Machinery Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: WINSON Machinery Co., LTD.
summary: WINSON Machinery Co., LTD. manufactures and sells machine tool, wind power, ductile iron, and grey iron castings in Taiwan. Its products include beds for grinding M/C, heads for vertical milling M/C, beds for milling M/C, beams for vertical milling M/C, tables for double-column milling M/C, beds for slant lathe, beds for lathe M/C, beds for vertical lathe, and beds for CNC lathe, as well as beams, columns, tables, and beds. The company was founded in 1980 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Magnate Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Magnate Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells aerospace components and assemblies in Taiwan. The company offers landing gears, aerospace comprehensives, engine casings, and heat exchangers. It also provides other precision machinery components and assemblies, and food industry machinery. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Man Zai Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Man Zai Industrial Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells air-conditioner components for vehicles worldwide. The company offers auto air-con modules, including condenser units, evaporator units, and heater cores; automobile and motorcycle aluminum radiators for cooling systems, such as radiator units and oil coolers; and thermal-electric cooling modules comprising thermal modules for CPU, thermal syphon modules, and liquid cooling modules, as well as water-cooled modules for use in CPU, VGA, LED, and auto-electric cooling modules. It also provides aluminum extrusion products that include fittings/brackets/pipes, racket frames, OPC drums, computer heat sinks, and bicycle frames; and air-con and refrigeration products. Man Zai Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1984 and is based in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Chaheng Precision Co., Ltd.
summary: Chaheng Precision Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells aero-engine components in Taiwan. The company offers aero-engine fan blades, compressor and combustor assemblies, and OGV diffusers; and toles, oil collectors, flow dividers, rings, thermy off plates, cones, inner barrels, fans, and dome combustion chamber baffles. It also provides aero-engine assemblies and other products, including bracket, compressor actuation linkage assy, fan bootstrap bracket, seal, manifold-low pressure turbine and machining bracket, probe, and retaining seal, as well as stationary-AIR, AFT, BRG, and 4B pressure seal. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: FineTek Co., Ltd.
summary: FineTek Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells process automation, flow metering, wireless communication technology, and tank gauging systems in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers liquid and solid point switches; liquid and solid level transmitters; flow measurement switches and transmitters; pressure level transmitters and switches; temperature transmitters and thermocouples; and grain monitoring systems, including temperature and level monitoring transmitters, multi-point temperature sensors, materials management systems, and remote control units. It also provides wireless products, such as hublinks, coordinators, routers, and end devices; pneumatic products comprising air hammers, pneumatic vibrators, diaphragm valves, dust collector systems, and air pads; safety products, such as isolated safety barriers, speed monitors, conveyer belt misalignment switches, and safety cable pull switches. In addition, the company offers digital controllers/digital meters consisting of digital display panel meters and temperature controllers. Its products and solutions are used in various industries, including cement, hydraulic, petrochemical, food and beverage, chemical, water and wastewater treatment, electronics, power generation, construction, maritime, and steel industries. FineTek Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells OEM aluminum forging products primarily in Taiwan. The company offers automotive aluminum forging parts, including brackets, control arms, suspension arms, pistons, etc. for use in suspension and cushion systems in car chassis, as well as in engine systems; and motorcycle aluminum forging parts, such as connectors, handgrips, driving arms, pistons, etc. that are used in the body structure of motorcycles, steering systems, and engine systems. It also provides other aluminum forging parts comprising storz, check handgrip, bundle, spray gun, etc. for use in fire-fighting equipment, industrial equipment, machinery industry, hand tool industry, and bicycle industry. ALFOT Technologies Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Bright Sheland International Co., Ltd.
summary: Bright Sheland International Co., Ltd. researches, develops, manufactures, markets, and sells industrial filtration and separation systems under the Filtrafine brand in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers melt-blown, wound-fine, activated carbon, membrane, high flow, and glass fiber filter cartridges, as well as pleated cartridges; and plastic-type, single round, single-bag, multi-bag, sanitary, high flow, and multi-round filter housings. It also provides filter bags and bag filter housings; modular bag housing skids; and UV disinfection and TOC reduction units, and spare parts, as well as technical support and after-sales services. The company serves chemical processing, microelectronics industry, oil and gas filtration, water treatment, food and beverage industry, and pharmaceutical industry sectors. Bright Sheland International Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ALFORMER Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: ALFORMER Industrial Co., Ltd. produces and processes aluminum products in Taiwan. Its products include aluminum and industrial extrusions, aluminum electrolysis (anode treatment), aluminum doors and windows, airtight windows, aluminum curtain walls, solar panels, frames and brackets, building materials, greenhouse project, CNC milling, and forging, as well as solar energy engineering products. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Changhua City, Taiwan.

name: Kenturn Nano. Tec. Co., Ltd.
summary: Kenturn Nano. Tec. Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, fabricates, and markets machine tool spindles in Taiwan. It offers CNC machining center, tapping center, and direct and gear drive spindles; turning center spindles, which includes belt drive-horizontal and vertical spindles; and CNC internal and external spindles. The company also provides square, ball nose, and corner radius end mills; special cutting tools; and spindle repair service. Its products are used in aerospace, automotive, locomotive, biotechnology, woodworking machines, shipbuilding, medical equipment, electronic semiconductor manufacturing, and IT industries under the KENTURN brand name. The company also exports its products. Kenturn Nano. Tec. Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is based in Changhua, Taiwan.

name: Quaser Machine Tools, Inc.
summary: Quaser Machine Tools, Inc. manufactures and sells machine tools in Europe, Asia, North America, South America, Africa, and Oceania. It offers vertical, 5-axis mill-turn, pallet, horizontal, and multi face 5 axes M/C machine tools, as well as FMC series products. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: Koge Micro Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Koge Micro Tech Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and sells various precision pumps and valves worldwide. The company offers air, vacuum, water, gear, and electromagnetic pumps; and one, two, and three-way, as well as combined and linear√Ç¬ñtype solenoid valves. It also provides rotary diaphragm, diaphragm, air linear, piezoelectric, and centrifugal pumps. In addition, the company offers OEM/ODM services. Its products are used in fuel cell, energy and environment, environmental monitoring, detection analysis, medical devices, automotive products, healthcare equipment, beauty care apparatus, and household appliance fields. Koge Micro Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Chumpower Machinery Corporation
summary: Chumpower Machinery Corp. manufactures PET blow molding molding machines in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products are used in various application, such as mineral water, carbonated beverages, seasonings, tea, fruit juice, distilled water, alcoholic beverages, cooking oil, cleaning agents, cosmetics, fizzy drinks, cosmetic cleanser, detergents, tennis ball cans, medicine bottles, heat-resisting bottles etc. The company was founded in 1981 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Ofuna Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Ofuna Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and distributes industrial machinery and equipment in Taiwan. It produces drilling machines, routing machines, and spindles. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Sogotec Precision Co., Ltd.
summary: Sogotec Precision Co., Ltd. develops and manufactures CNC machines in Taiwan. It offers printed circuit board (PCB) routing machines, PCB drilling machines, laser application machines, and automation machines. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Value Valves Co., Ltd.
summary: Value Valves Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, design, manufacture, inspection, and marketing of valves in Taiwan. The company offers butterfly, check, damper, ball, globe, gate, and customized valves. Its products are used in petroleum and petrochemical products, steel, shipbuilding, energy, water treatment, paper, air-conditioning, electronic, and other industrial fields. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Hengs Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hengs Technology Co., Ltd. provides solar monitoring system integration and related products in Taiwan. The company's design products include solar pumps, RSK systems, off-grid solar power system kits, solar outdoor lightings, and solar mounting racks; and distributed products comprise PV modules, charge controllers, inverters, batteries, solar surge arresters, and wind turbines. It also markets related solar power products, as well as markets and services industry and precision instruments; and offers warranty services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd.
summary: Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells electrical appliances in China and internationally. The company offers stand mixers, table blenders, hand blenders, cooking machines, and juice extractors, as well as electric blankets and food processors. Airlux Electrical Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Tah Kong Chemical Industrial Corporation
summary: Tah Kong Chemical Industrial Corporation manufactures, processes, and sells paints, pigments and intermediates in Taiwan, Southeast Asia, Japan, China, the United States, and Australia. The company offers PVC, PU, and polyolefin processed pigments. It also provides aqueous pigment dispersions and UV curable products; and organic pigments, which are used in ink, plastic, rubber, fiber, paint, stationery, etc. In addition, the company offers functional masterbatch that includes non-halogen flame retardant TPU compound, TPU anti-blocking and lubricant masterbatch, TPU fogging agent masterbatch, black electric conductive PE masterbatch, TPA weather resistant PE functional masterbatch, and anti-microbial PE masterbatch. Tah Kong Chemical Industrial Corporation was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Nan Tsan Co., Ltd
summary: Nan Tsan Co., Ltd, a technology company, develops intelligent robots and artificial intelligence in Taiwan. It is also involved in the production of pigments. The company focuses on the development of 5G and IoT smart home solutions. Nan Tsan Co., Ltd was founded in 1974 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Daily Polymer Corp.
summary: Daily Polymer Corp. manufactures and sells synthetic resins in Taiwan. It offers polymer materials, including solvent and water based resins for paints, unsaturated polyester resins, and paint additives; and UV curing pressure sensitive adhesives. The company also provides photo-electronic materials, such as liquid crystals and alignment materials; and conductive polymers. It also exports its products to Southeast and Middle Asia, India, Japan, Africa, and Hong Kong. Daily Polymer Corp. was founded in 1970 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Mechema Chemicals International Corp.
summary: Mechema Chemicals International Corp. supplies oxidation catalysts worldwide. The company supplies magnetic material cobalt lithium secondary batteries and materials; and specialty chemicals. It also provides PTA oxidation catalyst, CTA pretreatment, PTA M.L. recovery, and electromagnetic industry services. The company was founded in 1930 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Mycenax Biotech Inc.
summary: Mycenax Biotech Inc. develops and manufactures biopharmaceutical products from mammalian cells and microbials in Taiwan, European, and the United States markets. The company develops monoclonal antibodies, bi-specific antibodies, fc-fusion proteins, recombinant proteins, peptides, protein conjugates (non-toxin), antibody-cell conjugates, enzymes, antigen-binding fragments (Fab), single-chain variable fragments (ScFv), plasmids, DNA vaccines, and glycoproteins. It also provides process development and scale-up, GMP manufacturing, and analytical services, as well as manufacturing technologies and in-house services. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Sunmax Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunmax Biotechnology Co., Ltd., a biomedical company, develops, manufactures, and markets medical-grade collagen-based medical devices in Asia. The company offers Porcogen, a sterile purified collagen solution for medical device, tissue engineering, and research purposes; and dermal fillers, such as Sunmax collagen implant I-Plus and Sumax collagen implant I for the correction of facial defects, such as the fill up of wrinkles. It also provides Sunmax collagen dental bone graft, Sunmax collagen dental membrane, and Sunmax dental bone graft granules, which are used in the augmentation or reconstructive treatment of the alveolar ridge. In addition, the company offers Sunmax collagen bone graft matrix that provides a bone void filler that is resorbed and replaced with bone during the healing process; and skincare products comprising Sunmax 6 collagen facial cleanser, Sunmax 7 collagen essence, Sunmax 8 active collagen essence mask, Sunmax 9 collagen refining cream, Sunmax 10 collagen eye renewal cream, Sunmax 11 collagen moisturizing cream, Sunmax 15 Collagen MesoRepair, and Sunmax Collagen Peptide that are used as aftercare of dermal filler treatment. Sunmax Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: NatureWise Biotech & Medicals Corporation
summary: NatureWise Biotech & Medicals Corporation engages in the development of therapeutic drugs in Taiwan. It offers LipoCol Forte, a capsule for hypercholesterolemia and hypertriglyceridemia; PPL products comprise Taiwanese Green Propolis; and NBM-BMX an oral Softgel capsule to treat cancer. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: AViTA Corporation
summary: AViTA Corporation manufactures and sells home healthcare products for clinical and personal use. It offers various OEM/ODM solutions. The company's products include non-contact thermometers, infrared/forehead thermometers, arm and wrist type blood pressure monitors, and electronic lice combs. AViTA Corporation was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: TaiDoc Technology Corporation
summary: TaiDoc Technology Corporation manufactures and markets medical devices worldwide. It offers diagnostics products, including blood glucose and multiple parameters monitoring systems, point of care testing devices, lancet and lancing devices, and vet health care products comprise blood glucose and calcium meters, non-contact forehead thermometers, and blood ketone meters; and medical devices, such as nebulizers, thermometers, blood pressure monitors, vital sign monitors, medical kiosk, pulse oximeters, and weight scale. The company also provides telehealth remote monitoring devices and smartphone applications; and Covid-19 antigen rapid test kits. In addition, it offers services for regulatory professionals, as well as in the areas of clinical suggestions, engineering resources, and manufacturing systems. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tatung Fine Chemicals Co.
summary: Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. develops, manufactures, and sells nano-products in Taiwan. The company offers aqueous concentrated pigment dispersions for ink-jet inks and photo-catalyst paints. It also provides lithium iron phosphate, a cathode material for high power lithium ion batteries, as well as vanish, ink, TiO, and acrylic CED products. The company was formerly known as Tatung Coatings Company and changed its name to Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. in 2003. Tatung Fine Chemicals Co. was founded in 1970 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Jetbest Corporation
summary: Jetbest Corporation researches and develops, manufactures, and sells inkjet printing products in Taiwan. The company offers various inks, such as UV inks; and wide format inks, including eco solvent pigments, mild solvent pigments, water dyes and pigments, oil-based dyes and pigments. It also provides textile inks comprising dye sublimation and disperse inks, resin pigments, and reactive dyes; magic inks; desktop inks; nano and resin-free colorants; and bulk systems consisting of refilled cartridges. The company also distributes its products approximately in 80 countries. Jetbest Corporation was founded in 2004 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Oneness Biotech Co., Ltd.
summary: Oneness Biotech Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, and sale of new drugs, pharmaceuticals, and health products in Taiwan. It offers Fespixon cream for diabetic foot ulcers, and Bonvadis, a wound care medical device. The company develops ON101, has completed clinical trials for treating chronic diabetic foot ulcers. It is also developing FB825, which is in Phase II a clinical trial for treating atopic dermatitis and allergic asthma; FB704A that has received US FDA Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of rheumatoid arthritis and inhibiting tumor angiogenesis; SNS812, for the treatment of COVID that is in Phase II clinical trials; and SNS851 for weight loss and metabolism diseases. In addition, the company engages in the agricultural product cultivation and organic food sales business; and sale of agricultural products. Oneness Biotech Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Cowealth Medical Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Cowealth Medical Holding Co., Ltd. operates as a medical distribution company primarily in the diagnostic clinical laboratory field in Greater China market. It also specializes in reagent, cross-strait hospital department cooperation, and radiotherapy fields. In addition, the company undertakes the Summit project, which consolidates outside procurement of diagnostic reagents at prices as before; and provides related with related logistics management services. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Shanghai, China.

name: INternational CArbide Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: INternational CArbide Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells firestop products in Taiwan. The company offers firestop system, such as fire barrier caulks, fire barrier silicone sealants, moldable firestop and firestop putty products, intumescent strips, fire barrier foams, firestop bricks, firestop sheets, mortar, fireproof blankets, and coated firestop boards/coatings. It also provides elastomeric fire caulks, putty pads, fireproof paints for wood, intumescent coating, high intumescent lamination, firestop tapes, smoke and acoustic sealants, and spray products, as well as fireproof protections for cable/electrical systems. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Ample Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ample Electronic Technology Co.,Ltd. produces and sells thick-film conductors in Taiwan. It offers pastes for terminal and internal electrodes of passive components, copper and silver paste products, and solar cells; and conductive silver pastes for touch panels, membrane switches, and LED and IC packages. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd.
summary: Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells UV curable inks, coatings, and adhesives in Taiwan. It offers UV curable printing inks for IC chips, optical discs, plastics, and paper products; UV curable adhesives for bonding needs of metal, glass, and other materials that are applied in handicraft and electronic industries; and UV curable coatings for use in plastic flexible tubes and paper spot varnish for screen print, etc. The company provides its products under the PANOVA, PANCURE, PANOLEN, and RADITHO names. Pancolour Ink Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Cherng Tay Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Cherng Tay Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells adhesives in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers hot melt adhesive products for packaging, bookbinding, assembly, and footwear applications; waterproofing materials, including waterproofing membranes and glues; and reactive hot melt adhesives. Cherng Tay Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Ingentec Corporation
summary: Ingentec Corporation manufactures and supplies fine chemicals and high pressure gas containers to semiconductor front end, semiconductor package, and flat panel display processes. The company offers laser gas; silicon wafer related products, such as quartz crucibles, and polished and reclaim wafers; and specialty gas and wet chemical related products, including PSA argon gas recovery and purification systems, specialty gas, and texturing chemical. It also offers special materials and tools comprising chillers, LED metal clad substrates, mass flow meters and controllers, pigment, sputtering target materials, and thermal spray coatings powder; and solar cell related products, such as platelet calcined alumina, laser machine for PERC and boron dope, SiC powder, slurry recycle systems, solar quartz crucibles, and tungsten seed cables. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Zhunan, Taiwan.

name: VHQ Media Holdings Ltd
summary: VHQ Media Holdings Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the multimedia innovation and creativity, post production, visual effects, and related services for TV advertising, TV drama, online drama, movies, and animation in Taiwan and internationally. The company operates in four segment: Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and Beijing. It is involved in the content development and performance optimization business; provision of post production services for commercials and feature films; and multimedia shooting and planning for dramas and movies. VHQ Media Holdings Ltd was founded in 1987 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Da Lue International Holding Company Limited
summary: Da Lue International Holding Company Limited, an investment holding company, provides various wedding services in China. The company offers wedding planning, witnesses ceremony, and wedding dress rental services, as well as wedding photography and video, and other wedding-related services; and wedding banquet, and conference and exhibition services It is also involved in the rental and sale of clothing and flowers, operation of hotels, and real estate business. In addition, the company offers catering and catering management services; and technology development, technical consulting, and other services in the field of network technology. The company's brand portfolio includes Victoria Wedding Club, Coloration LISA Wedding Photography, Taiwan North Suoluo Wedding Photography, Jennifer Wedding Photography, Princess Wedding Photography, Pujue Hotel, and Vienna Hotel. Da Lue International Holding Company Limited was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd.
summary: ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. engages in the television program production and screenwriting, film production and distribution, and art performing activities in Taiwan and China. It also provides drama series, as well as engages in the literary and artistic creation, corporate image planning, actor brokerage, and graphic system businesses. In addition, it is involved in the investment consulting, business management consulting, and business information consulting activities. The company was formerly known as Shenghua Entertainment Production Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. in June 2012. ShengHua Entertainment Communication co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Tainet Communication System Corp.
summary: Tainet Communication System Corp. provides carrier class access equipment to telecom carriers, service operators, and business users worldwide. The company offers Ethernet access devices, VoIP gateway products, xDSL and analog modems, PON, optical transceivers, and interface converters. It also provides copper over fiber connectivity, VoIP gateway communication, xDSL Ethernet, and TDM over IP communication solutions. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: G&E Herbal Biotechnology Co., Ltd.
summary: G&E Herbal Biotechnology Co., Ltd., a biotechnology company, focuses on the development and commercialization of novel botanical extraction technology and products in Taiwan. It offers hepato protective agent capsules for the treatment of chronic liver inflammation, cirrhosis, hepatitis, and other liver diseases; botanical anti-aging cosmetic products; and SR-100 skin repair gel. The company also provides botanical healthcare products, such as Astragali Radix for physical strength; Goji for eyes; and Prosta capsule for regulating physiological functions and boosting metabolism, as well as offers adult products. In addition, it is developing Solarise injection for the treatment of gynecological, head, and neck cancer; Apocin capsule for the treatment of lung/breast cancer; and SR-T100 Gel. Further, the company manufactures technology development for various dietary supplements, as well as provides technical advisory services to other biotechnology organizations. G&E Herbal Biotechnology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Force MOS Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Force MOS Technology Co., LTD. engages in the design, development, and sale of MOSFETs and analog ICs in Taiwan. It offers bipolar transistors; diodes and rectifiers; and power management products for light electric vehicles technology and brushless DC motor control applications. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: HTM International Holding Ltd.
summary: HTM International Holding Ltd. engages in the production and sale of precision molds, computer notebook accessories, hi-fi systems accessories, office automation products, and home audio products and related parts. It offers PC components, including gas injection products; PC peripherals, such as portable hard disk covers and CD boxes; and speakers. The company also provides biomass energy products. It operates in Taiwan, Europe, the United States, Japan, and China. HTM International Holding Ltd. was founded in 1989 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: JMicron Technology Corp.
summary: JMicron Technology Corp. operates as an IC design company in Taiwan and internationally. The company designs high-speed data and signal interfaces, such as 3.1 5Gbps, USB 3.2 10Gbps and USB 3.2 20Gbps to connect them to SATA/PCIe/UFS; PCIe interface to SATA interface; and SATA 1.5Gbps/SATA 3Gbps/SATA 6Gbps, and SATA port multiplier/port selector, as well as bridge controllers for SATA to PATA interface. It also provides external data storage products, such as single bay controllers for USB 2.0/USB 3.0/USB 3.1/USB 3.2 host interfaces; dual-/multi-bay bridge controllers for external multiple-bay HDDs, RAID, and SATA port multipliers and port selectors; storage device controllers; and universal flash storage products. In addition, the company offers hard disk drive duplicators and surveillance storage systems, and NAS devices with RAID functionality. JMicron Technology Corp. is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Ubright Optronics Corporation
summary: Ubright Optronics Corporation manufactures and sells optoelectronics LCD backlight module components for the display industry in Taiwan. It offers prism, multi function, and quantum dot films for backlight displays; polarizer protection and anti-glare films for LCD displays; 3D curve display protection films for OLED displays; anti-static protection, in process panel protection, hard coat, masking protection, and optical clear adhesive films for touch panels; anti-glare films for E paper products; and ceramic window films for windows. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan. Ubright Optronics Corporation is a subsidiary of Shinkong Synthetic Fibers Corporation.

name: Crystalwise Technology Inc.
summary: Crystalwise Technology Inc. manufactures and sells hard substrates in Taiwan. The company offers CMOS, GaAs, and CZ wafers, as well as various types of substrates. Its products include sapphire substrate used for blue-light/green-light LED; substrates used for surface acoustic wave filter devices; sapphire cover glasses for smart phones and smart watches, as well as sapphire camera lens and sapphire finger sensor lens; sapphire function, power, volume, etc. keys for phone; sapphire window and heat spread substrates for LED products; and other type of substrate used in optronic and semiconductor industries. The company serves semiconductor, optoelectronics, optical fiber communications, wireless communications, and other industries. Crystalwise Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Sentelic Corporation
summary: Sentelic Corporation operates as an IC design company in Taiwan, China, and Japan. The company offers mixed-signal, ASIC, firmware/software, and multi-media processing services; fan motor drive control IC's for servers, communication equipment, cloud data centers, and 5G base stations; and cooling fans for servers, telecommunication switching equipment, gaming graphics cards, and mining hardware. Sentelic Corporation was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Cayenne Entertainment Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Cayenne Entertainment Technology Co., Ltd. provides various casual gaming services to online entertainment community in Taiwan. It also provides information software, data processing, and advertising services. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Mutto Optronics Corporation
summary: Mutto Optronics Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells stainless steel kitchen utensils and refined cutlery sets in the United States, China, Taiwan, and internationally. It is also involved in OEM/ODM knife manufacturing businesses; and investment activities. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Feature Integration Technology Inc.
summary: Feature Integration Technology Inc. designs, markets, and commercializes ICs and controllers. It offers I/O controllers and I/F management products, such as eSPI/LPC/USB/PCIE I/F controllers; super hardware monitors + SIOs; hardware keyboard controllers; USB consumer IR receiver ICs for Windows Vista/Windows 7; power saving (EUP) SIOs and controllers; transceivers and buffers; SIOs with microcontrollers (uSIO); and bus controllers and transceivers. The company also provides environment sensors and glue logic ICs, including environment sensors and fan controllers, pure logic ICs, performance controllers, and real time clocks; power management and ACPI controllers, such as ACPI, switching, and multi-phase linear controllers; micro-processors; LED driver ICs; interface and connectivity products; and USB type-C and power delivery products, as well as USB fast charging products. It offers its IC products for various applications in personal computers, computer peripherals, digital consumer electronic products, and information appliance products. The company sells its products through professional IC distributors. Feature Integration Technology Inc. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation
summary: Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation operates as an information technology (IT) service provider to Fortune 500 companies worldwide. It provides R&D as a service, which include talents outsourcing consultancy, research and production service, and team building service; software development, testing, and operation and maintenance services; and business process outsourcing services. The company also offers product globalization services; and software localization, localization testing, translation, and desktop publishing services. In addition, it provides cloud service, mobile, mobile payment, enterprise resource planning, and SmartRobot solutions; data warehousing/big data implementation and consulting, and Internet advertising data analysis services; application management services. The company serves banking, insurance, telecom, automobile, healthcare, retail, and manufacturing industries. Wistron Information Technology & Services Corporation was founded in 1992 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Parade Technologies, Ltd.
summary: Parade Technologies, Ltd., a fabless semiconductor company, designs, develops, and sells high-speed interface standards, and touch controller and display processing integrated circuit (IC) chips for products used in computers, consumer electronics, and display panels. The company offers display port LCD timing controllers, embedded display port timing controllers, display port format converters, display port transmitters and receivers, and scalers with display port and high definition multimedia interface (HDMI) inputs; high-speed interface solutions; display port based solutions; display port repeater and switch products, including serial advanced technology architecture, PCI express, HDMI/DVI, and universal serial bus products; source drivers; and truetouch controllers, and touch and display driver integrations, as well as mixed-signal ICs. It operates in South Korea, China, Taiwan, Japan, and internationally. Parade Technologies, Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in George Town, Cayman Islands.

name: IntelliEPI Inc. (Cayman)
summary: IntelliEPI Inc. (Cayman) manufactures and sells epitaxy-based compound semiconductor epitaxy wafers to the electronics and optoelectronics industries worldwide. The company utilizes its proprietary real time in situ growth monitoring technology on molecular beam epitaxy (MBE) systems for the manufacturing of epi-wafers on gallium arsenide (GaAs) and indium phosphide (InP) substrates. Its GaAs based products include pseudo-morpic high electron mobility transistors and MHEMT products; and InP based products comprise hetero-junction bi-polar transistors, HEMT, RTT, and RTD. The company also provides Sb based products, such as type II SLS photodetectors, GaAsSb-base InP HBT, and epi-ready GaSb substrates; and mismatched Epi products comprising III-V on Si, III-V on Ge, and high in content InGaAs on Si. In addition, it offers opto-electronics, including avalanche photo diodes, lasers, high-speed high-frequency surface-emitting lasers, optical receivers, quantum well infrared photodetectors, modulators, and quantum cascade lasers, as well as infrared light detectors. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tons Lightology Inc.
summary: Tons Lightology Inc., together with its subsidiaries, designs and manufactures commercial lighting products in Taiwan, rest of Asia, Europe, Oceania, and internationally. The company offers light-emitting diode, high-intensity discharge, fluorescent, and halogen lighting products. Its indoor lighting products include tracks and structures, luminaires for tracks, recessed downlights, frameless and adjustable downlights, assemblies, surface-mounted ceiling lights, pendant lights, wall lights, display spotlights, linear lights, task lights, and micro track lights. The company's outdoor lighting products comprise outdoor downlights, outdoor ceiling lights, outdoor wall lights, in-ground lights, projectors, flood lights, bollards, and outdoor accessories. Its products are used for architectural, retail display, residential, entertainment, outdoor area and commercial/industrial lighting applications. Tons Lightology Inc. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: LuxNet Corporation
summary: LuxNet Corporation designs, develops, and manufactures optical semiconductor devices and packaged optical components in Taiwan. The company provides laser and photo diode chips, transmitters, receivers, and optical sub-assemblies. Its products are used in high speed voice video and data communications for networking, storage, and cable TV, as well as optical communication applications. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Jorjin Technologies Inc.
summary: Jorjin Technologies Inc. provides modular processing, sensing, and wireless connectivity solutions worldwide. It also offers wireless system in package, application processor, imaging, and audio visual modules, as well as modules for the Internet of things; and driver software, as well as design-in support services. In addition, the company distributes a range of components, such as barcode scanning modules, filters, TCXOs, chip antennas, and EMI shielding components, as well as 2, 3, and 4G modems. It serves wearable consumer electronics, automotive infotainment, cloud connected devices, and industrial mobile computing markets. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Godex International Co., Ltd
summary: Godex International Co., Ltd, an engineering company, designs, manufactures, and sells barcode printing products worldwide. The company offers desktop, industrial, and mobile printers; scanners; label stands; and wax, wax/resin, resin, and near edge ribbons. It also provides label design and printing software under the GoRibbon, GoLabel, GoLabel PDF, and QLabel, GoAPP, and GoUtility names. The company's products are used in healthcare, retail, logistics and transportation, manufacturing, government, travel and leisure, and special material applications. It distributes its products through a network of value add resellers. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: GCS Holdings, Inc.
summary: GCS Holdings, Inc., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures compound semiconductor wafer and foundry related services in China, the United States, Taiwan, and internationally. It also manufactures and sells optoelectronics technology products and optical chips, as well as grants royalty rights for intellectual property. In addition, the company develops, manufactures, and sells mobile phone radio frequency, filter, optical communication chip, power management, and optical fiber products, as well as positive, intrinsic, negative components, and avalanche photo diodes for telecommunication systems and data communication networks; and engages in manufacturing, retailing, and wholesaling telecommunication devices and electronic components. Further, it provides product design, outsourcing management, and research development services. The company serves wireless devices and fiber-optic communication providers. GCS Holdings, Inc. was founded in 1997 and is based in George Town, the Cayman Islands.

name: Litemax Electronics Inc.
summary: Litemax Electronics Inc., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of LCD panels and monitors in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers industrial computing products, such as embedded box, rugged panel, modular panel transportation PCs, as well as boards and modules; industrial displays, including Spanpixel resizing and square LCDs, Durapixel sunlight readable LCDs, and Navpixel marine displays, as well as custom LCD displays; accessories comprising AD, power, HDMI daisy chain, intelligent thermal control, expansion, and AMIO boards; and AIoT solutions, such as smart display and kiosk module, and AI edge computing products. It serves the transportation, digital signage, industrial, point of sale/kiosk, rugged portable, gaming, marine, and healthcare industries. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Gloria Material Technology Corp.
summary: Gloria Material Technology Corp. manufactures and sells alloy steel and valve-parts in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products include super and titanium alloys; and high cleaning steel, alloy tool steel, high speed steel, stainless steel, quenched-tempered steel, and mold material supply products. It also provides machined parts, such as actuators, blocks, boss products, load caps, and actuator blanks; compressor spacers, seals for gas turbine, turbine blades, and transmission shafts; and copper rod rollers, dummy bar heads, guide rolls, sendzimir rolls, and rolls for slab continuous cast. In addition, the company offers air compressor rotors, bolts, couplings, cryogenic BV shafts, HPBV shafts, locking pins, parts for vacuum equipment, pump shafts, pipe fittings, plugs, turbo charger parts, wheel rings, stems, and taper pins. It serves aerospace, energy, oil and gas, water, medical, and machinery and mold industries. Gloria Material Technology Corp. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: OFCO Industrial Corporation
summary: OFCO Industrial Corporation engages in the manufacture and sale of fastener products in Taiwan. Its products include screws, nuts, bolts, and structural assemblies. The company was formerly known as Oriental Fastener Industry LTD. and changed its name to OFCO Industrial Corporation in 2004. OFCO Industrial Corporation was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Rodex Fasteners Corp.
summary: Rodex Fasteners Corp. manufactures and sells stainless steel wires and precision made screws worldwide. The company offers stainless steel wires, tapping screws, chipboard screws, machine screws, self-drilling screws, socket cap screws, socket set screws, stainless steel blind rivets, stainless steel thread cutting screws, triangular thread screws, wood screws, high-low thread screws, coarse thread screws, drywall screws, security screws, washer assembly of sems, screws for automatic line, electronic screws, JIS screws, special screws, hexagon nuts, and hexagon nylon lock nuts. Rodex Fasteners Corp. was founded in 1984 and is based in Chungli, Taiwan.

name: Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells retread tires in Taiwan. The company also offers high and low temperature tread rubber products, gums, backing products, rubber flooring products, silicone products, rubber compounds, and other rubber products. It is also involved in the provision of rubber manufacturing machines, as well as in the import and export activities. Fu Chian Tire Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1949 and is based in Yuanlin City, Taiwan.

name: NewSoft Technology Corporation
summary: NewSoft Technology Corporation provides personal, enterprise Web, and digital signage solutions worldwide. The company offers personal solutions, including digital document, digital recognition, digital images, and mobile application solutions; and enterprise Web solutions, such as customer and salary management, electronic authorization, project management, attendance, resource management, performance management, document management, and digital signage systems. It also provides custom development services, which include optical character recognition software development kits (OCR SDK); identity card recognition software development kits (IDR SDK); driver and network, and document imaging cloud applications; mobile and cloud application customization; and digital image editing and management services. The company sells its products through store outlets, online channels, hardware distributors, and enterprise and government contact windows. NewSoft Technology Corporation was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Kunyue Development Co., Ltd.
summary: Kunyue Development Co., Ltd. provides real estate development and maintenance services. The company is involved in the land development, building construction, residential development, home sales, and customer service activities. It also offers structural, hydropower, waterproof, and intimate engineering services. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: CTCI Advanced Systems Inc.
summary: CTCI Advanced Systems Inc. provides system integration services to the hydrocarbon, power, industry, transportation, and high technology markets in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides main automation contractor services in the areas of project planning, design, procurement, installation, test, commissioning, start up, and running or turnkey projects. It also offers railway electrical and mechanical (E&M) solutions, such as signaling, telecommunications, SCADA, and related information system solutions; airport and satellite E&M services for airport terminal, airfield runway, and satellite industries; and hi-tech plant E&M services for wafer, electro-optical, display glass, or bio-tech plants. In addition, the company provides process simulation and IT systems, including process optimization, energy saving and waste reduction, facility reliability, and plant safety and emergency planning products and services, as well as distributes and maintains SmartPlant P&ID intelligent solutions, plant EPC projects engineering information management solutions, and visualize plant's engineering information management solutions. Further, it offers smart water network platform integrated with GIS to manage and monitor water network; cyber security software for detecting the abnormal signs caused by equipment malfunction, operational mistake, and cyber-attack; construction safety management platform; and rotary machine predictive maintenance platform to collect sound and vibration data of rotary machines, and build baseline models to analyze machine condition. Additionally, the company distributes NovaTech D/3 DCS and batch control management systems; Intergraph Process, Power & Marine - PP&M products and solutions; AspenTech process optimization software; and Mr. Energy 50001, an energy information management system platform. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Penpower Technology LTD.
summary: Penpower Technology LTD., engages in research and development of devices with built-in intelligent human-machine interface technologies in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides handheld pen scanners and translators, pen scanners and translators for computers, and multilingual dictionary pens; wireless writing pads; embedded memory and digital memo writing pads; touch screen stylus; and business card management, voice, graphic design, and document management solutions. It also offers electronic signature solutions, as well as software services. Penpower Technology LTD. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Hyweb Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Hyweb Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of electronic government, book education, and electronic payment related software technology in China and internationally. Its products include HyCMS, a website management platform; Greeting, a paperless conference system; HyEIP, an administrative information portal; HyCase, an application review process engine; and eServices, a customer service system. The company's products also comprise HyRead, an e-book solution and mobile library-reading display machine; HyLib, a library automation system; Jumper, a library resource exploration service system; and SpaceMe, a space management solution. In addition, its products consist of HyLoyal, a bonus points management system; HyPro, a credit card/debit card system; and HyPstar, a card data preparation system. Further, the company offers UHF RFID chip tags, security detection doors, self-checking machines, automatic book borrowing and returning station systems, librarian work systems, and book searching/counting machines; and various consumer finance, retail banking, and payment solutions. Hyweb Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: YeaShin International Development Co., Ltd.
summary: YeaShin International Development Co., Ltd. engages in the business of residential and building development in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Higgstec Inc.
summary: Higgstec Inc. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, sale, and service of various touch solutions. The company offers standard and custom 5-wire resistive, and projected capacitive touch solutions, as well as PCAP touch controllers, and 5-wire resistive touch controllers and panels. Its products and solutions are used in various fields, including aviation, marine, education, medical, military, gaming arcade, IPC, vehicle, POS, ATM, cash register, house appliances, office automation, smart home appliances, security monitoring systems, etc. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Transcom, Inc.
summary: Transcom, Inc. operates as a microwave device and subsystem company in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers wideband and narrowband solid-state power amplifiers; MIC and transceiver modules; FET chips; packaged FETs; monolithic microwave integrated circuits (MMIC); hybrid ICs; directional couplers; power dividers; fixed attenuators and termination; and MIS chip capacitors. It also provides MMIC foundry services. Transcom, Inc. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Anli International Co., Ltd.
summary: Anli International Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the development, production, assembly, and sale of various precision metal stamping and magnesium aluminum die casting in China and Taiwan. The company is also involved in the design, research, and development of electronic components, vehicle components, new metal materials, machine parts, communication equipment, and computer software; manufacture of fine blanking die products; inductance components; metal finishing activities; and installation of automated equipment, as well as in CNC processing business.It also provides automotive products, optical communication products, vision system application products, household products, and other products. The company's stamped and cast metallic parts and components are used in notebook PCs, tablet PCs, desktop PCs, cell phones, wearable devices, internet communications, home appliances, and daily items. It primarily serves the computers, communications, and consumer electronics industries. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: Advanced Lithium Electrochemistry (Cayman) Co., Ltd.
summary: Advanced Lithium Electrochemistry (Cayman) Co., Ltd. researches, manufactures, and sells lithium iron phosphate Nano co-crystalline olivine materials (LFP-NCO) in China, other Asia countries, Italy, Taiwan, and internationally. The company also offers olivine-type structure lithium battery materials; and manufactures and distributes batteries, and cars and its peripherals. In addition, it manufactures and installs electricity generation, transmission, and distribution machinery. Advanced Lithium Electrochemistry (Cayman) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.
