name: Ledlink Optics, Inc.
summary: Ledlink Optics, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells optics for lighting companies and other LED manufacturers in Taiwan and internationally. The company's products include multi-lens modules, single street lenses, multi street lenses, silicone lenses, wall washer lighting lenses, color mixing lenses, waterproof lenses, elliptical beam lenses, narrow beam lenses, high-bay lighting lenses, automotive optics, V-cut lenses, ultra-thin hybrid lenses, hybrid lenses, fresnel lenses, reflectors, stage lighting lenses, and indoor lighting lenses. Its products are used in residential, commercial, street, and architectural lighting applications. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Amita Technologies Inc.
summary: Amita Technologies Inc. manufactures and sells lithium-ion polymer batteries in Taiwan. The company offers cells, soft packs, hard packs, energy storage systems, E bank products, camcorder series products, and accessories. Its batteries are used in data center UPS units, power banks, power tools, battery-powered vehicles, and energy storage systems for household appliances, commercial or industrial facilities, and smart grid. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan. Amita Technologies Inc. is a subsidiary of Energy Absolute Public Company Limited.

name: Sunplus Innovation Technology Inc.
summary: Sunplus Innovation Technology Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and markets microcontrollers and system-on-chips with embedded software solutions in Taiwan. It offers wired optical mice, wireless desktops, and MCU for HID and toy devices; and Web, NB, and IOT camera controllers. The company's products are used in human interface devices, PC external HDD/ODD drives, and PC/NB camera and industry control market segments. It also provides image data services for AI datasets, including data collection, labeling and tagging, verification, model training, 2D bounding box, line and polygonal annotation, semantic segmentation, landmark/key point annotation, other annotation services, product features tagging, queue monitoring, data transcription, emotion analysis, feedback entry, data entry-data capture, de-identification service, training, and system integration. The company is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan. Sunplus Innovation Technology Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Sunplus Technology Company Limited.

name: Brightek Optoelectronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Brightek Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells semiconductor package solutions. The company offers automotive application products, such as signal and lighting, and electronics; lighting products; and solutions for security monitoring and disinfection systems. The company was formerly known as Taiwan Brightek Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Brightek Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. in 2009. Brightek Optoelectronic Co., Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: WiseChip Semiconductor Inc.
summary: WiseChip Semiconductor Inc. researches, designs, develops, manufactures, and markets organic light emitting diodes (OLEDs) in Taiwan. Its principal products include OLED displays, full color displays, and monochrome displays; and bendable OLEDs, transparent OLEDs, matrix OLEDs, etc. used in consumer, PC peripheral, industrial, medical, automotive, and communication applications. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Chu-Nan, Taiwan.

name: Pixon Technologies Corporation
summary: Pixon Technologies Corporation manufactures and sells imaging and optical components for makers in communications, computers, and consumer electronics field in the United States, Taiwan, Asia, and internationally. The company develops optical, electronic circuit design and application software programming of linear micro lens array, linear light source, light pipe, and contact image sensor modules (CISM) products. It offers linear light guide, CIS modules, linear micro lens array, COB chip on board, and 3-in-1 modules. The company's products application includes document scanning and printing, fax, photocopiers, MFP multifunction printers, banknote counterfeit machines, lottery, electronic whiteboard, large format textile and paper printing and scanning, and other visual inspection. Pixon Technologies Corporation was founded in 1999 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: JSW Pacific Corporation
summary: JSW Pacific Corporation manufactures and sells wireless connectivity products in Taiwan. The company offers IP cameras, video doorbells, security lighting cameras, security home control products, and smart locks. It also provides hardware and software development services. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Gigastone Corporation
summary: Gigastone Corporation manufactures and sells memory modules and consumer electronics products in Taiwan. It offers microSD and SD cards; USB drives; monitor, gaming keyboard and mouse, DRAM, SSD, and type-c hubs; and mobile accessories, including wall and car chargers, cables, power banks, wireless pads, Bluetooth earphones, and microphones. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Brogent Technologies Inc.
summary: Brogent Technologies Inc., a technology company, provides digital content creation services in Taiwan. Its business primarily includes software and hardware research and development, manufacturing and system integration, theater design, and planning, and construction capabilities. The company's products include i-Ride, a flying theater built on six degrees of freedom motion platform; m-Ride, a flying theater built on the design of 180-degree rotating gondolas; d-Ride, a media based interactive dark ride solution for gaming; and GestureMagic that offers effect-driven 4D experience in gaming. It also provides v-Ride 360, a cylinder screen that provides 360-degree panorama balloon ride; t-Ride, a Jurassic age ride; and Q-Ride, an ultrarealistic ocean VR adventure. Brogent Technologies Inc. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Horng Tong Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Horng Tong Enterprise Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, manufacture, and sale of electronic connectors in Taiwan. The company offers connectors for mother boards, notebooks, and networks/antennas/RJs; AMOLED materials, sublimation machines, and cameras; and car electronics, including DVRs and AVMs, car chargers, wireless chargers, AVN and ADAS products, dash cam-mirrors, head-up displays, portable car chargers, ATL system products, and 8 in 1 control boxes. It also provides Internet of Things products, such as police devices and equipment, modems, wireless modules, emergency phones, smart crutches, and LTE Mifi products; and communication products. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: AMICCOM Electronics Corporation
summary: AMICCOM Electronics Corporation, a semiconductor company, provides RF ICs in Taiwan. The company offers 2.4 GHz, sub 1GHz, and 5.8/5.2 GHz short range devices, as well as wireless audio, Bluetooth LE/Zigbee, and satellite/LNB/DBS products. Its products are used in thermometer and voice remote control applications. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: ASPEED Technology Inc.
summary: ASPEED Technology Inc. operates as a fabless integrated circuit design company in Taiwan, China, the United States, and internationally. It offers server management product lines; PC and AV extensions; desktop virtualization infrastructures; and Cupola360, a spherical image processor for 360-degree/180-degree cameras. The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: ProLight Opto Technology Corporation
summary: ProLight Opto Technology Corporation engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of LED packaging products in Taiwan. The company offers LED products for use in entertainment, architecture, general, automotive, UV, IR, and plant growing lighting applications. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Sunfun Info Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunfun Info Co., Ltd. operates online dating and social networking services in Taiwan, the United States, Mexico, India, and the Southeast Asia. The company offers iPair, weTouch, and SweetRing websites that are dating applications; information software services; and other online platform services. It also engages in the biotechnology and healthcare business. The company was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: StrongLED Lighting Systems (Cayman) Co., Ltd.
summary: StrongLED Lighting Systems (Cayman) Co., Ltd., an investment holding, researches, develops, manufactures, and sells LED lighting equipment in China. The company offers outdoor LED lighting products, including LED flood lights, linear lights, dot pixel lights, and in-ground/underwater lights; and indoor LED lighting products, such as LED wall washers, wall grazers, linear lights, flexible strips, downlights, dot pixel lights, and module lights, as well as smart lighting products, panel lights, and pendant lights. It also provides LED lighting control systems and software; intelligent lighting controllers, touch control panels, and LED lighting circuit expanders; and LED power supplies for indoor and outdoor lighting systems. StrongLED Lighting Systems (Cayman) Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd
summary: ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd operates online trading platforms in Taiwan and internationally. It operates 8591.com.tw, which offers a virtual treasure trading platform; 591.com.tw and 591.com.hk, a real estate information network platforms; 8891.com.tw, a second-hand car trading platform; and 518.com.tw, a job search and recruitment platform. The company also operates 100.com.tw that offers design case pictures of interior design companies; marry.com.tw, a wedding service platform for wedding-related services, such as wedding photography, records, and bride secretaries; chickpt.com.tw, a part-time job finding APP; and tasker.com.tw for home task function that includes water, electricity, maintenance, and cleaning activities. ADDCN Technology Co., Ltd was incorporated in 1997 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Innodisk Corporation
summary: Innodisk Corporation provides industrial embedded flash and DRAM storage products and technologies in Taiwan. The company offers flash storage products, such as solid state drives (SSDs); SATA Slim for hand-held devices, thin clients, and industrial applications; ServerDOM for server use; CFast, a small form factor for industrial and embedded applications; and mSATA, a compliant module for space-constricted applications. Its flash storage products also include Mini PCIeDOM for server boot applications; M.2 for ultra-thin or compact systems; SATADOM compact form factor suitable for 1U server applications; nanoSSDs; compact flash cards; embedded disk cards; SD and MicroSD cards; USB and EDC; and server boot cards. The company also provides embedded DRAM modules; server memory modules; wide temperature DRAM modules; and special customized DRAM modules. In addition, it offers embedded peripherals comprising AI accelerator cards, storage expansion cards, disk arrays, display cards, and communication modules, as well as flash storage products with various interfaces and form factors. The company's products are used in the aerospace and defense embedded systems, server applications, casino gaming, and in-vehicles, as well as automation, surveillance, networking, healthcare, and retail markets. Innodisk Corporation was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: EISO Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: EISO Enterprise Co., Ltd. develops and sells PCB products. Its products are used in industrial computers, Internet communication products, cars, computer equipment, electron products, power boards, and others. The company also provides LED products for use in professional cycles; and renewable energy products. EISO Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1994 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Desiccant Technology Corporation
summary: Desiccant Technology Corporation, through its subsidiary, Shanghai Huajing Environmental Protection and Energy Saving Equipment Limited Company, produces and sells air purification and treatment equipment, plastic processing peripherals equipment, energy-saving equipment, and spare parts. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Zhongli, Taiwan.

name: Excelliance MOS Corporation
summary: Excelliance MOS Corporation operates as a power device and IC design company in Taiwan. The company is involved in the power semiconductor process development, as well as power device, IC, and system design activities. Its products include power MOSFETs, Schottky rectifiers, AC/DC and DC/DC power ICs, and LED drivers. The company's products are primarily used to the power system of electronic products, including personal computers, notebooks, pads, monitors, TVs, LED lighting, switching power, and other consumer electronics. Excelliance MOS Corporation was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: CJW International Co., Ltd.
summary: CJW International Co., Ltd. designs and sells jewelry products, and tobacco and alcohol in Taiwan. The company offers diamond, jade, and coral jewelry products. It is also involved in the wholesale and retail of beauty products. The company was founded in 1967 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Syntek Semiconductor Co., Ltd.
summary: Syntek Semiconductor Co., Ltd. operates as a fabless IC design company in Asia. It offers car DVRs/miniDVs, PC/NB camera controllers, and microcontrollers, as well as wireless solutions. The company also develops products for photo capturing and video recording applications. In addition, it offers wireless IP connected multimedia recording solutions; and system-on-chip solutions. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: KMC (Kuei Meng) International Inc.
summary: KMC (Kuei Meng) International Inc. manufactures and sells various types of chains, motorcycle components, and vehicle components in Asia, Europe, and the United States. The company offers bicycle chains, such as road bike, mountain bike, BMX, E-bike, and rust buster chain series products, as well as EcoProTech chains. It also provides motorcycle chain and gears, including standard driving, heavy duty, cam, and silent chain series products, as well as standard driving sprockets, and chain and sprocket kits. In addition, the company offers automobile timing systems and garage door openers. Further, it is involved in investing activities. The company was formerly known as CNet Technology Inc. and changed its name to KMC (Kuei Meng) International Inc. in July 2012. KMC (Kuei Meng) International Inc. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan. KMC (Kuei Meng) International Inc. is a subsidiary of KMC Transton Industries Limited.

name: Sysgration Ltd.
summary: Sysgration Ltd. provides industrial IoT, automotive electronics, energy management, and redundant power supply solutions in Taiwan. It offers integration and mobile apps to control various vehicle on-board devices; real-time and wireless location tracking technology products for animals and assets; and smart retail services to connect vending machines for real-time telemetry and user behavior analytics services. The company also provides internal and external BLE TPMS products; and commercial solar and container based solar energy storage systems. In addition, it offers battery pack products, such as power stations, EV battery packs, and UPS LIB packs; rackmount solutions comprising slim type, CRPS, flex ATX, flex RPS, narrow type, battery backup PSU, and PSII mini RPS products; and power supply and battery backup centralized solutions. The company was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Myson Century, Inc.
summary: Myson Century, Inc. provides micro-controllers (MCU), automobile IT solutions, fiber solutions, and motor control solutions in Taiwan. The company also offers dual CMOS operational amplifiers, as well as ASIC design services. Its products are used in automobile, motor control and drive, embedded networking, and optical network applications. Myson Century, Inc. was incorporated in 1990 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: United Radiant Technology Corporation
summary: United Radiant Technology Corporation manufactures and sells liquid crystal display panels and modules. The company's panels and modules include TN, WTN, STN, WSTN, FSTN, WFSTN, and TFT. It also offers LCM products, capacitive and resistive touch panels, heat dissipations, LED lighting products, electronic shelf labels, and automotive products. The company offers its products through a network of approximately 20 distributors worldwide. United Radiant Technology Corporation was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd manufactures and sells printed circuit boards (PCBs). It offers flex PCBs; and rigid PCBs, such as wireless WIFI, projector, light, and power system drive boards, as well as solar panels. The company was formerly known as Yeti Electronics Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd in June 2008. Best Friend Technology Co., Ltd was founded in 1983 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Shihlin Development Company Limited
summary: Shihlin Development Company Limited operates in real estate development business in Taiwan. It offers land development, building planning, engineering construction, and after sales services. The company is also involved in catering, hotel, leisure, and recreation business. The company was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Baotek Industrial Materials Ltd.
summary: Baotek Industrial Materials Ltd. manufactures and sells fiberglass fabrics in primarily Taiwan, China, and internationally. It offers aerospace fiberglass fabric, a reinforcement material for airplanes' internal structure; high temperature filter bag used in power and steel plants, incinerators, and cement factories; fiberglass sun shade that are use in buildings, interior designs, construction, and furniture; PTFE fabrics for use in PTFE coating areas; and electronic fiberglass fabrics. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Vate Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Vate Technology Co., Ltd. provides integrated circuit (IC) testing services in Taiwan and China. The company offers IC testing services related to the service of wafer probing and final testing; BURN IN, a test service on electrical components and final products; and LED products. It also provides chip probing test, final test, SLT system module test, CMOS image sensor testing, and back end services, as well as sells LED panel light products. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Stem, Inc.
summary: Stem, Inc. provides artificial intelligence (AI)-driven clean energy storage services. It delivers and operates smart battery storage solutions that maximize renewable energy generation and help build a resilient grid. The company's Athena, a AI-powered analytics platform software that uses artificial intelligence and machine learning to automatically switch between battery power, onsite generation, and grid power. Athena stabilizes the grid, reduces carbon emissions, and solves renewable intermittency across the network of distributed energy storage systems. The company serves customers, including Fortune 500 corporate energy users, project developers and installers, and utilities and independent power producers. Stem, Inc. was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Millbrae, California.

name: Etron Technology, Inc.
summary: Etron Technology, Inc. develops buffer memory and system-on-chips in the United States, Europe, Japan, and Asian countries. The company offers known-good-die-memory integrated circuits (ICs), specialty dynamic random access memories (DRAMs), automotive DRAMs, consumer electronic DRAMs, and industrial DRAMs; and system ICs, including USB 3.0 host and flash drive controllers, Webcam controllers, and depth map controllers. It also provides eDRAM-by-dies, DRAM design-and-dies, and DRAM design-and-die foundry services, as well as boot device solutions. The company offers its products for use in AIOT, display panel, VR/AR, robot, automobile, communication, and computer applications. Etron Technology, Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Tailyn Technologies, Inc.
summary: Tailyn Technologies, Inc. engages in the design and manufacture of turnkey solutions for communication and applications sectors in Taiwan. The company offers industrial Ethernet switches comprising unmanaged, lite managed, and managed Ethernet switches; carrier Ethernet products; wireless LAN products; and telecom products. It also provides design, joint-development, manufacturing, associated engineering, and logistic support services. The company was formerly known as Tailyn Communication Company, Ltd. and changed its name to Tailyn Technologies, Inc. in July 2013. Tailyn Technologies, Inc. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Sirtec International Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sirtec International Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells electronic product assemblies, and plastic injection and molding products in Taiwan. It offers communication products, including GPS receivers, broadband routers, and VO IPhones; computer peripheral products, such as laser toner cartridges, POS machines, and platform NAS; consumer products comprising LED TVs, HHDs, and Bluetooths; optoelectronic products, such as TFT-LCD drive cards, and LED light bars and lightings; automotive electronic products comprising head up displays, car video recorders, GPS models, and tire pressure detectors; and OEM products consisting of FPC processing, dispensers, blood glucose meters, and smart meters. The company also provides plastics products comprising cartridges, barcode scanners, car audio driver panels, modems, electronic assembly products, game controllers, health care and medical equipment, and electronic piano panels. In addition, it offers electronic plating, spray painting, printing, supersonic welding, and mold design and manufacturing services; and PCB assembly services. The company was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Lealea Hotels & Resorts Co., Ltd.
summary: Lealea Hotels & Resorts Co., Ltd. operates hotel under the LEALEA GARDEN HOTEL in Taiwan. The company was formerly known as I-Future Co., Ltd. Lealea Hotels & Resorts Co., Ltd. is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Coretronic Corporation
summary: Coretronic Corporation engages in the research, development, production, and marketing of projectors, backlights, and flat panel display related products in Taiwan and internationally. The company operates through three segments: Energy-Saving Products, Image Products and Brand, and Optical Components. It provides automobile displays, tablets, notebooks, laptops, and liquid crystal displays (LCDs) and LCD TV backlight modules; panel modules, electronic whiteboard modules, and semi-systems; and system solutions for medical, educational, ATM, point of sales, and public digital splicing displays. The company also offers digital projectors and video image signals for large-screen image projections, as well as interactive modules, smart connectors, edge blending and image warping processors, and image signal processing boxes; and imaging product solutions for computer data and projection, digital signage, screen blending, interactive experience, and smart connection for video image signals. In addition, it provides electronic components; batteries; computers and its peripheral devices; electronic materials and appliances; lighting applications; optical devices; data storage and processing equipment; and wireless communications equipment. Further, the company engages in the intelligent cloud, IT information, intelligent applications, and platform development related businesses of new media, as well as offers intelligent exercise and medical care related software and hardware products. Additionally, it provides intelligent display products and system integration solutions; image processing products; near-infrared spectrum solutions; unmanned aerial vehicle and intelligent robotics; MEMS sensors and modules; and augmented reality and mixed reality wearable display solutions. The company was formerly known as Optoma Corporation and changed its name to Coretronic Corporation in December 2001. The company was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, processing, and trade of various printed circuit boards. The company offers laminated multilayer printed circuit boards, basic circuit boards, and copper foil base boards, as well as aluminum substrates and lubricated aluminum covers. Uniplus Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1991 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Kenly Precision Industrial Co., LTD.
summary: Kenly Precision Industrial Co., LTD. manufactures and sells precision machine tools in Taiwan. The company offers molding products, including stamping molds and insert molding molds, as well as machining of jigs, tools, and parts; and photoelectric components, such as LED open tooling product. It also provides semiconductor components comprising IC heat sinks, transistor frames, diode frames, and CU clips; and electronic components consisting of connector terminals, contacts of relays and switches, and slide of variable resistors. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Albatron Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Albatron Technology Co., Ltd provides IT solutions and technology equipment for industrial and application PCs in Taiwan. It offers motherboards, graphic cards, minicomputers, and laptops; micron products, including SSD, SSD M.2, RDIMM, UDIMM, SODIMM products; and peripherals and PC components. The company also provides embedded platform products, including embedded systems, ARM boards, and android panel kits; industrial MB products, such as mini-ITX, nano-ITX, and micro ATX products, as well as industrial barebones; gaming peripherals, including headsets; and WPS Office, an office software. In addition, it offers design-in, FAE technical support, manufacturing, and repairing services. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: AVY Precision Technology INC.
summary: AVY Precision Technology INC. designs, produces, and sells camera parts in Taiwan. The company offers metal parts for cameras and mobile phones; inner structure parts, including LCD frames and laser welding assemblies; and nameplate and appearance parts, such as decorative parts, stamping plates, and flash reflector covers. It also provides multi-function printers and mechanical parts of medical equipment; electronic and auto parts comprising power cord chucks, battery plugs, metal shrapnels for relay, and gold plated shrapnels; and metal stamping parts and plastic parts. In addition, the company engages in stamping, producing, and supplying micro-motors; and designing and manufacturing molds and stamping products. AVY Precision Technology INC. was founded in 1975 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Inalways Corporation
summary: Inalways Corporation engages in the electronic and power supply components manufacturing, and medical biotechnology businesses in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides IEC connectors, receptacles, power entry modules, wire assemblies, and AC ducks and DC jacks. It also offers prescription and OTC drugs, medical devices, and health supplements. The company was formerly known as Liwei Industrial Co., Ltd and changed its name to Inalways Corporation in July 2017. Inalways Corporation was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Dimerco Data System Corporation
summary: Dimerco Data System Corporation operates as a system integrator and service provider in Taiwan. It engages in the planning and integration of software systems, and installation and maintenance of hardware equipment. The company also provides software services for financial, securities, commercial, general, banking, asset management, trust, and bond applications. In addition, it offers co-location, backup rehearsal, and Dimerco data system's cloud services; and cross-platform solutions for operating platform, virtualization, heterogeneous platform, information security, monitoring and control, database services, and data backup to fulfill enterprises' service requirements of application systems. Dimerco Data System Corporation is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Teco Image Systems Co.,Ltd.
summary: Teco Image Systems Co., Ltd. provides OEM and ODM services to imaging and communication products industries worldwide. The company is involved in the design, development, and manufacture of multi-function printing devices, plain paper facsimiles, digital copiers, and color scanners. It also offers mechanical subsystems comprising control panels and automatic document feeders; optical subsystems, such as scan units; and electronic sub-systems, including printer controller cards, printer network cards, Internet fax cards, fax controllers, and copier controllers. The company was founded in 1956 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Gallant Precision Machining Co., Ltd.
summary: Gallant Precision Machining Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, manufacture, and sale of FPD, semiconductor, intelligent automatic, and biomedical equipment in Taiwan, China, and internationally. The company provides molds and machinery, metal and mold parts, stamping and die-cast parts, and automated manufacturing systems, as well as unit equipment. Its products comprise FT-LCD / OLED / flexible OLED display process equipment, including TEG probers, and array testers, cleaners, and wet etchings; edge grinding and polarizer attachment machines, cell and in-process tester, and thinned glass surface defect inspection equipment; edge /plasma and excimer UV cleaners; panel surface inspection and burr checker system; cassette station, loader / unloader and automation, and dense packer / unpacker C/V, buffer etc.; semiconductor failure analysis testing equipment; and trim/form, auto molding, IC substrate punch, die set/kit for trim/form, fully auto panel molding systems, and auto sealing machine molds, as well as FC bump coin lamination equipment. The company also offers grain pick/place, IC bonding, IC die multi-face inspection and sorting, and heat sink covering machines; laser marking machines; substrate, strip, and panel grinders; batch etchers, stripers, developers, and cleaners; wafer surface defect inspection machine and white light interference measurement system; intelligent logistics and factory integration, solar cell automation handling, intelligent diagnosis and preventive maintenance, and robot handling and machining systems, as well as process automation equipment and lithium ion battery core seal welding and lamination device products. In addition, it engages in wholesale and retail of contact lenses and related care products. Gallant Precision Machining Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Mustang Industrial Corp.
summary: Mustang Industrial Corp. manufactures and sells progressive die molds and stamping products in Taiwan. The company provides shielding frame and cover assemblies for tuners; metal stamped frames and covers for signal shielding; and large size metal stamping products, including cover and chassis of set top box and satellite receivers, as well as heat spreaders for IC/chipsets and drawn parts in various shapes. It also offers middle size stamping parts, such as metal frames, brackets, and plates for LCD panels; small size stamping parts comprising springs and contacting fingers for EMC solution; and high precision stamping parts, including micro punching/blanking technology to replace chemical etching, as well as terminals, jumpers, contact springs, etc. Mustang Industrial Corp. was founded in 1972 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Glotech Industrial Corp.
summary: Glotech Industrial Corp. produces and sells e-glass fiber fabrics in Taiwan and internationally. It offers fiber glass fabrics and yarns that are used as composite materials. The company was formerly known as A Johnson Composite Inc. and changed its name to Glotech Industrial Corp. in May 2011. Glotech Industrial Corp. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Yangmei, Taiwan.

name: Sino Tactful Co., Ltd.
summary: Sino Tactful Co., Ltd. engages in the education business in Taiwan. It operates early childhood English education platform, K-12 English learning platform and plus cloud digital learning, and travel (study) consultant system, as well as offers AI American listening and speaking textbook. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Sino-American Silicon Products Inc.
summary: Sino-American Silicon Products Inc. researches, develops, designs, manufactures, trades, and sells semiconductor ingots and wafers, varistors, optoelectronics, and communication wafer materials. It provides CZ/FZ/NTD silicon ingots, Epi wafers, polished wafers, antimony-doped wafers, etched wafers, TVS wafers, arsenic-doped wafers, ultra-thin wafers, deep diffusion wafers, solar ingot and wafers, cells, modules, and sapphire wafers. The company also investment activities; and solar power generation business. It operates in Taiwan, Japan, Korea, rest of Asia, the United States, Europe, and internationally. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Tontek Design Technology Ltd.
summary: Tontek Design Technology Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells consumer electronics IC design products. The company offers multimedia series products, including TV game systems; 3C appliances series products, such as AD MCUs, LCD and LED drivers, infrared IR emissions, calculators, and energy-saving appliances; and health care series comprising R2F MCUs, indoor-outdoor thermometer, sports car meter, heart rate detection, and thermometer series. It also provides touch series, including capacitive touch MCUs and capacitive touch standard products; and green energy series, such as LED driver, PIR energy saving, PIC MICU, and PIR peripheral components. Tontek Design Technology Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: DynaColor, Inc.
summary: DynaColor, Inc. provides video surveillance products and automatic optical inspection systems in Taiwan. The company offers speed dome cameras, DVR products, NVR products, IP cameras, intelligent IP cameras, FA cameras and systems, and AI based surveillance systems. DynaColor, Inc. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: San Lien Technology Corp.
summary: San Lien Technology Corp. provides environment monitoring and micro vibration detection products, and system integration services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers sensor and recorder products, such as acceleration transducers, amplifiers, angle sensors, annular load cells, crackmeters, displacement transducers, inclinometer casings, load cells, network accelerometers, pressure transducers, cube visual and voice terminals, main control units, rebar strain gauges, solid load cells, spot-weldable strain gauges, strain gauges, switch boxes, tilt plates, tilt casts, tilt views, torque transducers, vibration sensors, vibration monitoring systems, weldable strain gauges, data loggers, and VW piezometers. The company was founded in 1967 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Yungshin Construction & Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Yungshin Construction & Development Co., Ltd. engages in the construction and sale of residential and commercial buildings in Taiwan. It is also involved in the sale of building materials; and rental business. In addition, the company offers interior design services. Yungshin Construction & Development Co., Ltd. is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Sunfon Construction Co., Ltd.
summary: Sunfon Construction Co., Ltd. engages in the construction of national residences. It also leases and sells commercial buildings. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Fong-Chien Construction Co.,LTD.
summary: Fong-Chien Construction Co.,LTD. engages in construction business. The company was formerly known as Hongdu Construction Co., Ltd. Fong-Chien Construction Co.,LTD. was founded in 1973 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Lungyen Life Service Corporation
summary: Lungyen Life Service Corporation provides funeral services in Taiwan. It is also involved in the development and lease of interment premises; sale and rental of residence and business buildings; invests in securities; provision of architecture and civil engineering services; and sale of cremated remains storage facilities. The company was formerly known as Dahan Development Corp. Lungyen Life Service Corporation was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Acter Group Corporation Limited
summary: Acter Group Corporation Limited provides engineering services in Taiwan, Mainland China, and internationally. It offers construction, design, and maintenance services related to air conditioning, environmental control, clean room set-up, ventilation engineering, and energy technology services. The company also trades in ice water machines and energy storing equipment, as well as offers turnkey services. In addition, it is involved in the wholesale of electronic and chemical equipment; construction and set-up of freezing and electronic equipment, and air conditioners; construction business; design and manufacture of air and liquid containers; and trade of clean rooms and air conditioners. Further, the company provides machinery trading services, as well as acts as an agent for electronic equipment importing and exporting. Additionally, it engages in the design and construction of cleanrooms, electromechanical equipment, and process pipelines for high-tech electronics and biomedical industries. Acter Group Corporation Limited was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Buima Group Inc.
summary: Buima Group Inc. engages in the research, design, development, production, and sale of metal building materials in China, rest of Asia, Europe, and internationally. The company offers metal ceiling, such as corrugated board; grid, juno, and tube ceiling; and metal mesh board, square ceiling system, and the clip in ceiling system. It also provides various ceiling grid, such as premium, cliq, buima line, smart, deco, V-grid, eco, and a-line. In addition, the company offers Xing Li, Xing Chai, and Xingde compartment systems, as well as data room decorative wall panel, metal compartment, SD steel door, decorative metal wall panel, office compartment, and glass compartment systems. Further, it engages in punching technology, high-precision leveling technology, and commodity development activities. The company's products are used in medical and biology medicines, aerospace science and technology, cloud data center, and public construction and commercial space applications, as well as engineering, commercial office buildings, and electronic factories applications. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: Jioushun Construction Co., Ltd.
summary: Jioushun Construction Co., Ltd. engages in the construction of luxury houses. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Allied Container Terminal Corp.
summary: Taiwan Allied Container Terminal Corp. engages in the container storage and warehouse rental activities. The company is involved in the concentration and decentralization of containers; container cargo unpacking, loading, and unloading; container maintenance and renovation; interlocking warehouses; and other businesses related to container terminals. It also constructs residential and commercial buildings, as well as offers tally packaging products and services. The company was founded in 1973 and is based in Keelung, Taiwan.

name: Chung Lien Transportation Co., Ltd
summary: Chung Lien Transportation Co., Ltd engages in the real estate rental business. Chung Lien Transportation Co., Ltd was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Dimerco Express Corporation
summary: Dimerco Express Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the international transportation and logistics business. The company offers air freight services, including scheduled consolidation, direct air carrier, airport-to-airport, and door-to-door delivery; ocean freight services; and sea/air and air/sea freight services. It also provides customs brokerage services, such as customs clearance services and professional solutions; and logistics and warehousing services comprising vendor managed inventory, raw materials distribution, finished goods distribution, reverse logistics, after sales logistics, distribution assortment, cross-docking, just-in-time, sequenced supply synchronized delivery management, and in-transit mixing product support services. In addition, the company offers cross-border trucking, domestic transportation, cargo insurance brokerage, and logistics supply chain management consultancy services. Further, it provides integrated value added services that include domestic and cross-border air and road freight, as well as logistics warehousing services, and regular and bonded logistics parks/centers under the China Plus name. The company serves the aerospace, auto components, cabling, communication equipment, computer and peripherals, electrical equipment, electronic equipment and instruments, machinery parts, metals and mining, paper and forest goods, construction materials, telecom parts, plastic products, semiconductors and semiconductor equipment, and tooling industries. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Janfusun Fancyworld Corp.
summary: Janfusun Fancyworld Corp. operates theme parks and holiday hotels in Taiwan. It also operates department stores, as well as an online store for ticket and reservation services. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Yunlin, Taiwan.

name: The Landis Taipei Hotel Co., Ltd
summary: The Landis Taipei Hotel Co., Ltd operates a hotel in Taipei City, Taiwan. The company operates The Landis Taipei Hotel, which offers superior and deluxe rooms, disable rooms, executive and corner suites, dining and meeting rooms, banquet halls, and wedding and travel packages, as well as fitness center, business center, and lounge facilities. It also engages in restaurant, cafe, and bar businesses. The company was founded in 1977 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Hotel Royal Chihpen
summary: Hotel Royal Chihpen operates a resort hotel in Taiwan. Its resort hotel comprises 183 guest accommodations, as well as offers recreational facilities and amenities. The company is based in Taitung, Taiwan.

name: JihSun Financial Holding Co.,Ltd.
summary: JihSun Financial Holding Co.,Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, operates as a financial holding company in Taiwan. It engages in securities brokerage, trading, underwriting, and margin purchases and short sales; and stock transaction agency and futures trading activities, as well as provides auxiliary services for futures trading and stock warrant issuance. The company also offers general deposits, loans and discounts, stocks, short term securities, financial bonds, and others, as well as government bond investment and collection, fund trust transaction, and employee investment trust services. In addition, it operates as a property and life insurance agent, as well as provides venture capital, securities investment research, and proprietary trading services. Further, the company is involved in the securities research and analysis, corporate and personal financial planning, and financing activities, as well as sale of mutual funds and other financial products. JihSun Financial Holding Co.,Ltd. was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Farglory Life Insurance Co., Ltd.
summary: Farglory Life Insurance Co., Ltd. provides insurance products and services in Taiwan. It offers life, health, injury, travel, savings, and annuity insurance products, as well as investment products. The company was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan. Farglory Life Insurance Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Farglory Group.

name: Taipei Star Bank
summary: Taipei Star Bank provides various banking products and services in Taiwan. The company accepts check deposits, demand deposits, and time deposits; and domestic foreign exchange and commercial bills. It also provides short-term, medium-term, and long-term loans; bill discounts; letters of credit; treasury bills; safe deposit box; and guarantees. In addition, the company also invests in financial, public, short-term, and corporate bonds, as well as stocks; collects and pays against agents; and purchases and sells foreign currencies cash and traveler cheque. Further, it provides warehousing, and storage and agency services. The company was formerly known as Bank of Taipei, Ltd. Taipei Star Bank is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiming Assurance Broker Co.,Ltd.
summary: Taiming Assurance Broker Co., Ltd. engages in the life and property insurance brokerage business in Taiwan. It offers personal life, injury, health, annuity, group, and investment insurance products. The company also provides fire, automobile, liability, and other property insurance. Taiming Assurance Broker Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tait Marketing & Distribution Co., Ltd.
summary: Tait Marketing & Distribution Co., Ltd. imports and trades in consumer goods in Taiwan. It offers tea, coffee, mineral water, beer, wine, liquor, and other beverages; desserts; and sugar cake/snack food products. The company also exports its products. Tait Marketing & Distribution Co., Ltd. was founded in 1845 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd. operates various convenience stores in Taiwan and internationally. The company engages in the provision of warehouse tally services; electronic information services; system integrated services; sales and services of computer software and related equipment; logistics activities; manufacturing of food; and trucking, staffing, and packaging services. In addition, it wholesales and retails books and magazines, and household merchandise. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 3,548 stores in Taiwan; and 2,801 stores in China. Taiwan FamilyMart Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: POYA International Co., Ltd.
summary: POYA International Co., Ltd. operates personal beauty and daily merchandise stores in Taiwan. The company's stores offer makeup products and cosmetics, jewelries, daily goods, snacks, fashion hosieries, hardware products, underwear and pajamas, etc. As of April 30, 2020, it has operated 239 stores. The company was formerly known as POYA Department Store Co., Ltd. and changed its name to POYA International Co., Ltd. in June 2000. POYA International Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Nan Ren Lake Leisure Amusement Co., Ltd.
summary: Nan Ren Lake Leisure Amusement Co., Ltd. provides leisure and recreation facilities in Taiwan. It operates the National Museum of Marine Biology and Aquarium, an underwater tunnel, a resort and sleepover, dining service area, and underground food shopping mall, as well as Nargo electronic mall, an online shopping platform. The company was founded in 1989 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: TaChan Securities Co.,Ltd.
summary: TaChan Securities Co.,Ltd. provides brokerage services in Taiwan. The company operates through three segments: Brokerage Department, Investment Banking Department, and Proprietary Trading Department. It offers securities lending/borrowing services, such as margin trading and short sale for the trading of securities, securities-backed lending, and unrestricted purpose loans; stock-related custody settlement, IPO subscription, bid auction, and securities borrowing and lending services; futures introducing brokerage services; and other securities investment consulting services, as well as undertakes the trading of securities, including online, mobile, and telephone order placements. The company also trades in securities comprising listed stocks, funds, and bonds for own account; manages derivatives consisting of call warrants, and securities-related futures and options; plans and counsels IPO process; guides and plans listing process of shares; plans and evaluates raising of capital and corporate financing strategy; invests and trades in emerging stocks; and promotes investment and venture capital business. In addition, it engages in the convertible bond asset swap business; trading of corporate and financial bonds, and bond transactions, and electronic bond trading systems; and reverse auction of government bonds on primary market. Further, the company provides securities investment consulting services, including accepting consignment to offer research and analysis opinions or suggestions on securities investment related matters; accepting discretionary investment; issuing securities-related products; and organizing securities-related seminars. The company was incorporated in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd.
summary: Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd. provides securities services in Taiwan. The company engages in the general brokerage of market securities and self-financing securities, stock index futures, options, and foreign securities; and securities trading business. It is also involved in the provision of securities underwriting and issuing, and financial advisory services; and futures business. In addition, the company offers bond buyout and selling services; and bond investment advisory services. Ta Ching Securities Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Avid Electronics Corp.
summary: Avid Electronics Corp. researches, develops, produces, and markets IC chip series products. The company offers audio-visual related IC products; analog IC products, such as power supply and lighting driver products; and wireless transmission system chips. It also provides external hard disk boxes, driving recorders, Bluetooth speakers, SD memory cards and flash drives, solid state hard disks, wireless charging equipment, air purification intelligent sweeping robots, LCD displays, and WIFI connection products. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Genesys Logic, Inc.
summary: Genesys Logic, Inc., a fabless IC design house, provides high-speed interface technologies. The company offers USB hub controllers; storage products, such as card reader controllers; repeater products comprising USB, PCI express, and DP redrivers; image and video products consisting of scanner controllers, fisheye image processors, and PC-cameras; silicon intellectual properties; and USB host charger controllers and other products, as well as provides support services. Its products are used in computing and display applications. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Atech OEM Inc.
summary: Atech OEM Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells magnetic components, power supply solutions, and wireless devices in Taiwan. It offers magnetic components, including signal and communication transformers, power transformers, and EMC components; power supply solutions, such as power supply units (PSUs), which includes wall-mounts, desktops, interchangeable AC pins, car chargers, PSR, high surge, AC-DC and DC-DC converters, POE power, and ODM products; open frames, telecom power products, and LED drivers; and medical and industrial PSUs; and wireless devices comprising Bluetooth modules, Bluetooth dongles/adapters, and WiFi modules. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Softstar Entertainment Inc.
summary: Softstar Entertainment Inc. develops, licenses, and sells mobile, online, and single player games in Mainland China, Taiwan, Hong Kong, and internationally. It also produces and sells peripherals and guides of computer software; and researches and develops network technologies. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ASEC International Corporation
summary: ASEC International Corporation distributes semiconductor components in the Asia Pacific. Its products are used in PC; Internet; telecommunication; MCU; electronic products; multimedia software/hardware; and energy saving and carbon reduction products, including mobile TV, LCD TV, mobile phone, wireless broadband, internet, MP3, networking and telecom appliances, MPEG encoder/decoder, set-top box, CMOS sensor, adapter, HDTV, IP phone and various multimedia software, LED lighting, and green energy products. The company was formerly known as ASEC Company and changed its name to ASEC International Corporation in 1998. ASEC International Corporation was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Xander International Corp.
summary: Xander International Corp. sells information and commercial products in Taiwan. It offers audio and video multimedia products, DIY components, computer peripherals, computer systems, network/monitoring/software products, storage devices, transaction equipment, car/outdoor products, living appliances, and combination goods. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Simplo Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Simplo Technology Co., Ltd. develops, produces, and sells battery packs worldwide. Its products include LEV power tool battery, handheld tool battery, and electric vehicle battery modules; household energy storage systems; smartphone, tablet, and laptop battery modules; power banks; wearable devices; and power banks, BT speaker, cleaning robots, wearable devices, and vacuum cleaner Li-ion battery modules. The company also provides machine parts, such as plastic moldings, injections/fixtures/films, metal stampings/trays, and die cut/busbar products; AGV products and automation equipment; and lab testing services, as well as power equipment, industrial robot controllers, machine arms, and industrial cameras. It offers its products for household appliances; and mobile devices, LEV, and EV applications, as well as for fit accessories. The company was formerly known as Simplo Company, Ltd. and changed its name to Simplo Technology Co., Ltd. in September 1998. Simplo Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: King Polytechnic Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: King Polytechnic Engineering Co., Ltd. operates as an integrated engineering and construction company in Taiwan and internationally. Its services include project planning, design, procurement, construction, commissioning, project management, and turnkey services. The company offers process, civil and structure, piping, equipment, electrical, mechanical, instrument and control, fire protection, and environmental protection work solutions for petrochemical and chemical industries. It also plans, designs, and constructs HVAC systems, cleanrooms, biological cleanrooms, air abatement systems, purified water systems, gas systems, and chemical systems, as well as provides electrical, automatic control, monitoring, fire protection, water supply and drainage, pipeline, air conditioning system, purified water system, gas system, chemical system, and hook-up services for high-tech, microelectronics, electronics, flat panel, semiconductors, optoelectronics, biotechnology, and pharmaceutical industries. In addition, the company offers planning, design, and construction services for various types of infrastructure and public work projects; and constructs green buildings, as well as constructs commercial high-rise buildings, deluxe residential buildings, five-star hotels, luxury recreation villas, and public construction projects. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: GrandTech C.G. Systems Inc.
summary: GrandTech C.G. Systems Inc. operates as a distributor of graphics, imaging, and multimedia design software. The company distributes 2D and 3D professional software products; digital printing equipment and solutions; and IT software and hardware products for enterprises, as well as IT integration and cloud services. It operates in Taiwan, Hong Kong, China, Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, and internationally. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Yeh-Chiang Technology Corp.
summary: Yeh-Chiang Technology Corp. produces and sells electronic components and materials worldwide. It operates through Heat Pipe, Lighting, and Semiconductor segments. The company's thermal components include heat pipes, vapor chambers, and loop heat pipes. Its electronic materials comprise BGA solder sphere, solder paste, and SMT and semiconductor flux products. The company also engages in the production and sale of raw alcohol, lighting equipment, semiconductor packaging wires, and solder balls; manufacture and sale of bioethanol; international trade activities; and environmental protection related business, as well as offers LED products. It serves original equipment manufacturers of computing systems and electronic devices; semiconductor companies; manufacturers using SMT processes; manufacturers requiring thermal solutions; thermal module design and manufacturing companies; and system houses that require cooling technologies. Yeh-Chiang Technology Corp. was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kenmec Mechanical Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Kenmec Mechanical Engineering Co., Ltd. engages in the planning, design, manufacturing, and sale of logistics centers and intelligent automation integration services in Taiwan. It offers storage equipment, automated packaging equipment, logistic center, material handling equipment systems, automated agriculture/farming equipment, lithium batteries, and heat conduction/heat dissipation equipment. The company was formerly known as Guang Yun Machinery Engineering Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kenmec Mechanical Engineering Co., Ltd. in March 1987. Kenmec Mechanical Engineering Co., Ltd. was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Singatron Enterprise Co.,Ltd
summary: Singatron Enterprise Co.,Ltd develops, manufactures, and supplies electrical connectors for laptop industries in Taiwan and internationally. It offers waterproof connectors, such as circular, quick lock, M5/M8, M12, USB, USB charger, RJ45, cable gland, NMEA 2000, and LEV connectors; and consumer connectors, including DC power jack, audio jack, USB2.0/USB3.0, USB3.1 Type-C, RJ/transformer, HDMI, battery, and other connectors. The company also provides professional support services. Its products are used in consumer electronics, portable devices, networking, marine electronics, outdoor displays, outdoor lighting, and communications for outdoor solutions, as well as industrial automation and light electronic vehicles. Singatron Enterprise Co.,Ltd was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: LEATEC Fine Ceramics Co., Ltd.
summary: LEATEC Fine Ceramics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chip alumina fine ceramic substrates in Taiwan. It develops high-voltage resistor, variable resistor, array, and chip resistor substrates, as well as chip array substrates. The company also offers fine ceramics, such as alumina, LED, aluminum nitride, laser machining ceramic, and lapping and polishing substrates, as well as ceramic cores and Zirconia toughened alumina; and green energy products, including junction boxes, compact combiner boxes, and tools and other products, as well as PV connectors, cables, and cable assemblies. In addition, it provides car-used electronic substrates comprising LED package, hybrid IC, and sensor substrates. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Princeton Technology Corporation
summary: Princeton Technology Corporation operates as a fabless IC design company in Taiwan. It provides IC technology for energy-saving solutions, including a series of energy-saving ballast driver ICs, LED lighting/backlight driver ICs, and brushless DC motor ICs for use in various indoor/outdoor lighting and motor control products. The company also offers display driver, multimedia audio controller, LED driver, motor driver, RF, encoder/decoder, remote control, GPS, I/O expander, power, and PFC controller ICs, as well as ASICs, microcontrollers, and automotive solutions. Its products are used in automotive dash-board and multimedia devices, portable audio players, digital TVs, home audio/video appliances, DSCs, DSLRs, monitoring cameras, and car security systems. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Singbao International Co. Ltd
summary: Singbao International Co. Ltd engages in the wholesale of Chinese medicines, western medicines, medical equipment, slimming products, and cosmetics in Taiwan and Asia. It is also involved in the research, development, production, and sale of wireless communication integrated circuits; and the operation of various beauty salons, as well as offers other services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Wanshih Electronic Co., Ltd.
summary: Wanshih Electronic Co., Ltd. operates as an OEM/ODM manufacturer of mini coaxial cable assembly for tier-one notebook computer and mobile phone companies worldwide. The company primarily provides NB and mini-coaxial cables, LCD TV cables/wire harnesses, mobile phone cables, wire harness cables, electronic components, and smart antennas/modules. Its products include external cables comprising HDMI, USB 2.0/3.0/3.1, SATA, LAN, D-SUB/DVI, RCA, VGA, BNC, automobile, lightning, and medical cables, as well as power cords; antennas, such as external Wi-Fi and LTE, built-in PCB and metal, built-in MIMO, satellite positioning, small base station, and fiberglass tube; and internal cables consisting of LVDS/eDP, consumer device, industrial, medical, and robotic cables. It also provides SMT products and assembly, such as SMT equipment comprising multi-f production, solder paste printing, 3D online solder paste, and AOI optical inspection; and various applications in automobile, consumer electronic, and 3C/AI. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Anpec Electronics Corporation
summary: Anpec Electronics Corporation designs power ICs, mixed signal ICs, and power discrete devices in Taiwan. Its primary products include power management ICs, audio amplifier ICs, LCD controller/driver ICs, hall effect ICs, and power MOSFETs. The company also provides switching regulators, lighting and display products, linear regulators, switches, LCD bias convertors, battery powered systems, DVR powered systems, audio products, analog to digital converters, battery management solutions, voltage supervisors, and motor drivers. Its products are used in various applications, including motherboards, VGA cards, notebooks, mobiles, PND systems, LCD TVs, LCD panels, fans, inverters, WLAN cards, and ATX power supply products, as well as in communication IC and micro-controller applications. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Netronix, Inc.
summary: Netronix, Inc. designs and manufactures network and e-Reader products in Taiwan and internationally. It also designs and sells ID, hardware, and software products, as well as provides electronic shelf label and electron baggage tag. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd.
summary: Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd. produces, distributes, and franchises audio and video products in Taiwan. The company engages in production, recording, publication, rental, distribution, and export/import of TV and film program DVD, BD and 4K UHD discs, and music CDs. It is also involved in the agency and sale of physical and digital copyrights of movies; operation of TSUTAYA bookstores and Wired Tokyo caf√É¬©s; and provision of catering services. In addition, the company sells stationery products and delicatessen. Deltamac(Taiwan) Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Sporton International Inc.
summary: Sporton International Inc. provides product testing and certification services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers mobile device services, including design consultation, training, testing, and certification that allow its customers to acquire certificates and promote products. The company also provides EMC compatibility, safety, radio device, cellphone handset, and NCC testing and certification services, as well as customization services; and sells anti magnetic components. Sporton International Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Chipbond Technology Corporation
summary: Chipbond Technology Corporation, together with its subsidiaries, provides services for backend assembly processing of LCD driver integrated circuits (ICs) in Taiwan, the United States, and internationally. The company offers turnkey services, which comprise bumping manufacturing services, including gold, solder, and copper bumping services; redistribution layer services; wafer surface processing services, such as back side metal and dielectric layer coating process services; wafer grinding, dicing, and picking and placing services; package and testing services comprising driver and non-driver IC testing, driver IC package, and wafer level chip scale packaging services; final inspection and failure analysis services; and chip tray design and manufacturing services. It also invests in, develops, manufactures, and sells electronic components, as well as tape automated bonding, tape carrier, and others. Chipbond Technology Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Azion Corporation
summary: Azion Corporation provides information, communication, network, telecommunications, broadband, traffic control engineering, and cloud applications services in Taiwan. The company's products include DataPilot 10, a handheld digital evidence acquisition instrument; big data platforms; Cisco data center and virtualization, Cisco cloud collaboration, and Cisco enterprise network services; information security solutions; search and exploration engine systems; storage systems; and data protection solutions. Its solutions include information and communication system integration, big data analysis and knowledge exploration, information security, digital banking and financial, and smart police solutions. It serves finance, manufacturing, retail, telecommunications, and government agencies. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: TUL Corporation
summary: TUL Corporation develops and markets hardware solutions in IT industry worldwide. The company offers gaming and embedded graphics cards, SoC based mainboards and systems, FPGA products, thunderbolt adopters, and SSD storage solutions. It serves OEMs, distributors, VARs, and system integrators. The company was formerly known as C.P. Technologies and changed its name to TUL Corporation in March 2004. TUL Corporation was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ginar Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Ginar Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells performance materials in the field of engineering thermoplastics in Asia, the Americas, Europe, and internationally. It offers MAPEX polyamide engineering plastics, such as impact modified, mineral reinforced, glass fiber reinforced, and flame retardant polyamide 6, polyamide 66, and high temperature nylon compounds for automotive, electrical/electronic, and other industries; and mineral fiber, glass fiber, and impact modifier or flame retardant APLAX polypropylene engineering plastics. The company also provides impact modification and glass fiber reinforcement or flammability KAPEX polycarbonate engineering plastics; KAPEX PC/ABS alloys for cars instrument panels and dashboards, notebook covers, and cell phones; and KAPEX green products that contain r-PET and/or r-PC, which are from post-consumer recycled products for notebook PC, desktop PC, LED TV, monitor, and OA products. In addition, it offers flame retardant high performance nylon composite engineering plastics. The company's products are used for automotive and consumer electronics applications. Ginar Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Sunfar Computer Co., Ltd
summary: Sunfar Computer Co., Ltd sells various goods for consumers in Taiwan. It offers home appliances, personal computer hardware and peripheral equipment, computer supplies and consumables, computer software and books, consumer electronics and communications, etc., as well as OA merchandise and maintenance services. The company provides its products through 64 stores and online shopping platform. Sunfar Computer Co., Ltd was founded in 1982 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Song Shang Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells magnetic components, printed circuit boards, and wire products. Its magnetic components include coils, line filters, power chokes, and transformers primarily used in the production of transformers, filters, and inductors, as well as in adapter, LED TV, LCD TV, charger, game console, desktop, monitor, printer, lighting, and communication applications. The company's printed circuit boards are used in consumable electronic products, power supplies, machinery, instruments, and automobile industries, as well as other industries. It also offers wire products for LED TV and display, car audio, battery, power supply equipment, and home appliances. The company was formerly known as K-Bridge Electronics Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. in March 2011. Song Shang Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1988 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Cipherlab Co.,Ltd.
summary: Cipherlab Co.,Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and sells automatic identification and data capture products under the CipherLab brand worldwide. The company offers windows/android and proprietary mobile computers; general purpose, business durable, and pocket sized barcode scanners; HF and UHF radio frequency identification readers; and software solutions comprising deployment and development tools, device management, browser and emulation, programming, and scanner software. It serves warehouse, transportation and logistics, field mobility, retail, manufacturing, and healthcare industries, as well as the government. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Jetway Information Co., Ltd.
summary: Jetway Information Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells motherboards and other IT products worldwide. It also provides AIO products, graphic cards, IPC boards, barebones, and chassis products. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: HwaCom Systems Inc.
summary: Hwacom Systems Inc., a broadband system integrator, supplies mobile, fixed, and IP networks related services in Taiwan and internationally. The company also supplies multimedia applications. Its product portfolio includes interactive personalized television (IPTV) set-top boxes, OTT set-top boxes, hybrid set-top boxes, and video gateways, as well as video streaming related consulting and integration services. It also provides broadband infrastructure solutions, value added services, customized network management systems, and integrated video solutions; cloud computing and data center solutions; and IPTV solutions. In addition, the company offers smart city solutions comprising video and traffic surveillance systems; intelligent transportation services; information security management services; multi-channel acquiring and network management solutions; and 3D radar reimage solution. It serves payTV operators, telecoms, and MSOs. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Powertip Technology Corporation
summary: Powertip Technology Corporation manufactures and sells small to mid-size full color TFT and monochrome displays, and touch panels worldwide. The company's offers embedded solutions, full viewing angle displays, EM touch products, TFT displays, TFT with projected capacitive touch panels, graphic and chip-on-glass LCD modules, character LCD modules, FS-LCDs, VATN/PBT LCD modules, resistive and capacitive touch panels, and evaluation boards; and surface mount technology, chip-on-board, chip-on-flex, tape automated bonding, and screen printing products. Its products are used in white goods and gas pumps/parking meters, as well as for industrial, medical, consumer, automotive, communications, and test and measurement applications. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: InterServ International Inc.
summary: InterServ International Inc. develops games worldwide. The company is involved in edutainment related activities; and the research, development, and operation of TV/PC/online/Web/mobile games. It also develops PC MMORPG, casual games, console games, and mobile games, as well as app, online, social, PC console, and Xbox360 games. InterServ International Inc. was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Welldone Company
summary: Welldone Company, together with its subsidiaries, engages in telecommunication, IC, and other access businesses primarily in Taiwan. It sells prepaid mobile SIM cards, trading of online game point cards, and foreign migrant worker remittance services. The company also engages in the mobile phone top-up services; international human resources business services project, including human resources agency, foreign caregivers, management consulting, laws and information, foreign worker translation services, abnormal incidents involving foreign workers, and conducting periodic visits to employers and foreign workers; and airport access business. In addition, it provides online games and payment services; and I-MONEY, a convenient and secure purchasing channel. Further, the company offers telecom apparatus; retails and wholesales of food and cosmetics; manufactures and wholesales of batteries and electronic components. Welldone Company was founded in 1966 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Aries Co.,Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Aries Co.,Ltd. manufactures, processes, and trades in various electronic parts in Taiwan. It is also involved in residential and building development, rental, and sales; building materials wholesale and retail, landscape and interior design, import and export trading, real estate trading and leasing, and other businesses. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Prosperity Dielectrics Co., Ltd.
summary: Prosperity Dielectrics Co., Ltd. manufactures and exports ceramic dielectric powders and multilayer ceramic chip capacitors in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, and the Asia-Pacific. Its products include ceramic dielectric powders, disc type semi-conductive capacitor elements, multilayer ceramic chip capacitors, chip resistors, diodes, inductors, and coils. The company also provides SBL elements. Its products are used in power, communications, and consumer applications; and medical, military, and measurement equipment, as well as the automotive sector. Prosperity Dielectrics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Liton Technology Corp.
summary: Liton Technology Corp. manufactures and sells etched and formed aluminum foils in Taiwan, Mainland China, Europe, the Americas, Japan, Korea, India, and Southeast Asia. The company offers middle and high voltage formed aluminum foils; low voltage formed aluminum foils; and middle and high voltage etched aluminum foils. Its products are used in industries and products, such as aerospace, high-speed rail, MRT systems, solar and wind power, computers, mobile phones, automobiles, home appliances, and industrial products. The company was formerly known as Liton Electrics Corp. and changed its name to Liton Technology Corp. in April 1998. Liton Technology Corp. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Gamania Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: Gamania Digital Entertainment Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, publishes online and mobile games in Taiwan, Hong Kong, Japan, and Korea. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Wafer Works Corporation
summary: Wafer Works Corporation engages in the manufacture and supply of silicon wafers worldwide. It offers polished silicon and epitaxial wafers, as well as single crystal ingots and doped silicon wafers used in semiconductor devices for power and digital applications. The company supplies its products through sales representatives. Wafer Works Corporation was founded in 1997 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Plastron Precision Co., Ltd.
summary: Plastron Precision Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and market of connectors in Taiwan and internationally. It offers board to board, header/socket, USB, memory card connectors, etc.; and serial ATA products, I/O connectors, and edge card connectors. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Shin Ruenn development Co., LTD
summary: Shin Ruenn development Co., LTD. engages in the development and rental of housing and buildings. It is also involved in the sale, leasing, and purchase of real estate properties. The company was formerly known as Jinglay, Inc. and changed its name to Shin Ruenn development Co., LTD. in July 2011. Shin Ruenn development Co., LTD. was founded in 1998 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Quanta Storage Inc.
summary: Quanta Storage Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells optical storage products to computer manufacturers worldwide.
