The company offers storage and peripheral products, such as NAS, DAS, USB-C power delivery and mini docks, adapters, and Wi-Fi storage products. It also provides solid state drives and intelligent automation systems; and storage manufacturing services of storage devices and systems, computer peripherals, and IoT related products. In addition, the company offers project planning, product development, technical, design, engineering mechanism, electrical engineering, logistics management, and repair and maintenance services. Quanta Storage Inc. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Yufo Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Yufo Electronics Co., Ltd. primarily manufactures and sells printed circuit boards in Taiwan and internationally. It offers computer motherboards for use in personal computers, industrial computers, and medical equipment; and high frequency impedance control printed circuit boards for use in servers, communication base station, network communication equipment, and high-precision instruments. The company was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: AverLogic Technologies, Corp.
summary: AverLogic Technologies, Corp., a fabless semiconductor company, provides application specific memory and video processing circuits worldwide. It offers video frame and line FIFOs, video surveillance controller ICs, LCD display controller ICs, video format conversion ICs, video decoder and ADC ICs, and H.264 video streaming SOCs. The company provides H.264 video streaming, video conversion, LCD display, multiple video display, video decoding, and FIFO memory solutions. It offers its products through a network of representatives and distributors. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD.
summary: TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. operates as a flash storage manufacturer in Taiwan. The company designs, manufactures, and sells portable storage products. It offers flash card readers/writers and adapters, digital photo frames, digital signage products, LCD TV player modules, fingerprint devices, and flash drives. The company was formerly known as DataFab Systems Inc. and changed its name to TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. in July 2015. TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. is headquartered in Pingzhen, Taiwan.

name: Highlight Tech Corp.
summary: Highlight Tech Corp. designs, manufactures, and sells integrated vacuum coating chamber solutions for original equipment manufacturers worldwide. It offers cylindrical, box, D shape, spherical, polygon, bell jar, large, and aluminum vacuum chambers, as well as vacuum modules and systems; vacuum chamber kits; ultra-high vacuum chambers; and vacuum valves, such as vacuum poppet valves, aluminum alloy angle valves, vacuum gate valves, vacuum butterfly valves, rectangular gate valves, pendulum valves, teflon coating vacuum valves, vacuum ball valves, vacuum check valves, vent valves, metal valves, and vacuum valve kits. The company also provides vacuum components, including elbows-tees-crosses, vacuum flanges, teflon bellows, hydroformed vacuum bellows, centering rings, vacuum clamps, adaptor fittings, vacuum viewports, vacuum feedthroughs, and vacuum accessories, as well as KF, ISO, and CF components; and vacuum pumps comprising edwards turbomolecular pumps, scroll and refurbished vacuum pumps, and Ebara dry pump repair kits. In addition, it offers sanitary fittings comprising ferrule blanks, fittings, gaskets, clamps, and adaptors, as well as sanitary valves; perfluoroelastomer O'rings; IC dispensing machines; and centrifugal vacuum mixers. Further, the company provides vacuum pump and valves overhaul services; and refurbished vacuum pump services. Highlight Tech Corp. was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Kintech Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Kintech Electronics Co. Ltd. engages in manufacturing, processing, and trading of single-sided and multi-layer printed circuit boards and electronic components in Taiwan, the United States, Europe, Japan, China, and the Southeast Asia. It offers its products for consumer and other products, communication products, PC and peripheral, industrial equipment, and servers. The company was founded in 1984 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd.
summary: C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells spring loaded probes and connectors in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers testing solutions, including high frequency testing, Kelvin contact testing, memory testing, burn-in testing, fine pitch connector testing, IC and ICT test probe, ATE connecting, general final testing, panel testing, wafer level testing, battery probe, and high current IC testing solutions. It also provides pogo pin connectors, such as standard and non-standard, single pogo pin, waterproof, ball point, magnetic, high current and frequency, and ultra-small pin connectors, as well as screw pins; female and industrial connectors; and DAC network cables. The company was formerly known as CCP Contact Probes Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd. in 1998. C.C.P. Contact Probes Co., Ltd. was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Hauman Technologies Corp.
summary: Hauman Technologies Corp. develops products and solutions for information technology, semiconductor, optoelectronics, and photovoltaic industries in Taiwan, Mainland China, and the United States. The company offers hardware and software products; and application services, including planning, marketing, sales, installation, training, system maintenance, and integration services to the government agencies, institutions of higher learning, research institutes, financial institutions, and multinational corporations. It also provides materials, equipment, and automatic packaging and testing instruments; and wafer probers, IC test handlers, underfill dispensers, package inspection solutions, ATE testers, LED probers and sorters, X-ray inspection systems, solar cell texturing and manufacturing AOI systems, ESD monitoring systems, cleaning systems, sealing machines, cutters, forming machines, machine vision systems, texturing systems, automatic inspection systems, LED and LCD process, etc. The company was formerly known as Hauman Enterprise and changed its name to Hauman Technologies Corp. in 2000. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: YFC-Boneagle Electric Co., Ltd.
summary: YFC-Boneagle Electric Co., Ltd. engages in the developing, manufacturing, and sale of power cord sets, LAN cables, patch cords, and networking accessories in Taiwan and internationally. The company provides power cables, including wires, power supply cords, cord sets, and portable hand lamps; electronic wires and cables comprising UL AWM cables and hook-up wires; and networking accessories, such as patch panels, keystone jacks, outlets, plugs, wiring connectors and blocks, and cable management products, as well as LAN cables and patch cords. It also offers fiber optic products, which comprise adapters, cables, connectors, enclosures, and patch cords; and other application and connector products. YFC-Boneagle Electric Co., Ltd. was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Soaring Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Soaring Technology Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells liquid crystal displays and lighting products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers LED bulbs and lamps, LED tubes, and LED indoor and outdoor fixtures, as well as dimmers, switches, and plugs. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Macnica Galaxy Inc.
summary: Macnica Galaxy Inc. distributes IC products and services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers software, artificial intelligence, and Internet of Things products, as well as semiconductors to customers in the cloud, Internet of Things, communication, industrial electronics, and automotive industries. The company was formerly known as Galaxy Far East Corporation and changed its name to Macnica Galaxy Inc. in July 2017. The company was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Macnica Galaxy Inc. is a subsidiary of Macnica Chungju Co., Ltd.

name: Insyde Software Corp.
summary: Insyde Software Corp. provides system firmware and software engineering services for companies in the mobile, desktop, server, and embedded systems industries worldwide. It offers client, server, and Internet of Things (IoT)/embedded solutions; developer tools; Supervyse, a systems management software; BlinkBoot UEFI Boot Loader; and mobile applications. The company also provides engineering services in the areas of project planning, design, implementation and integration, acceptance and deployment, and maintenance and field updates; and UEFI training programs. It serves mobile computing, desktop, servers, and embedded/IoT markets. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Prolific Technology Inc.
summary: Prolific Technology Inc. operates as an IC design company and ASIC design service provider for USB smart I/O, intelligent green energy saving, and mixed-mode hall sensor solutions. The company offers IC and SOC solutions for USB serial/parallel converters, USB storage products, brushless motor drivers, hall sensors, power meters, and MEMS motion sensing products. It sells its products in Taiwan, Mainland China, Japan, Korea, Canada, and the United States. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Tera Autotech Corporation
summary: Tera Autotech Corporation manufactures and sells automation equipment in Taiwan. The company offers automatic storage and logistic equipment; whole plant automated logistic equipment; automatic re-grind machines, product inspection machines, RGV machines, and lock screw machines; CNC machines, welding equipment, and chamber processing machines; and measurement equipment. It also offers drill products, including standard, micro, large, UC, and slot drills, as well as router bits. The company was formerly known as Tera Automation Corporation and changed its name to Tera Autotech Corporation in 2001. Tera Autotech Corporation was founded in 1982 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: Sung Gang Corp.Limited
summary: Sung Gang Corp.Limited engages in the information software wholesale in Taiwan. The company is also involved in the book publishing; real estate leasing; sale of electronic parts and computer peripherals; parking lot operations; financial debt purchase; and purchase of financial institutions. The company was founded in 1986 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Amigo Technology Inc.
summary: Amigo Technology Inc., an OEM/ODM company, provides various support services related to the design, manufacture, and after-sales service for networking and communication products. It offers Wi-Fi access points, such as enterprise indoor and ruggedized access points; and mesh routers. The company was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Motech Industries Inc.
summary: Motech Industries Inc. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells solar products and services in Taiwan and internationally. It provides photovoltaic (PV) cells, PV modules, PV power systems, and PV inverters. The company was formerly known as Meter International Corporation. Motech Industries Inc. was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Lanner Electronics Inc.
summary: Lanner Electronics Inc. provides design, engineering, and manufacturing services for advanced network appliances and rugged applied computing platforms for system integrators, service providers, and application developers worldwide. The company offers network appliances, such as modules and acceleration cards, white box hardware solutions, wide temperature network appliances, desktop network appliances, and rackmount network appliances; and telecom datacenter appliances consisting of cloud storage, HybridTCA, vCPE/uCPE, and video transport platforms, as well as modules and blades, and hyper-converged appliances. It also provides intelligent edge appliances, including DIN-Rail industrial gateway, edge AI appliance, embedded platform, intelligent video platform, rackmount industrial computer, rugged wireless gateway, vehicle gateway, and vehicle/rail computer; and extension modules comprising LTE radio modules. The company offers its products for use in various applications, such as network computing, telecommunication, transportation, power and energy, industrial automation, intelligent systems, software-defined wide area network, and edge AI applications. Lanner Electronics Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Thick-Film Ind. Corp
summary: Taiwan Thick-Film Ind. Corp manufactures and sells transformers, backlight modules, light emitting diode (LED) light bars, and light guide plates in Taiwan. It offers back light modules, such as in-vehicle and industrial control, tablet series, NB series, and monitors; LCM assemblies; LED light bars for consumer electronics, industrial control, medical, military, automotive, and other applications; and automotive/new energy automotive electronics that include vehicle charging station main boards, vehicle charging indicator main boards, car door lock main boards, automotive control switches, anti-pinch window lift monitor main boards, and vehicle indicator light switches. The company also provides cultural and creative business unit that provides brand licensing, product image design, cross-industry alliances and strategic alliances, creative products, 3C-related products, daily necessities, and auto supplies. Taiwan Thick-Film Ind. Corp was founded in 1982 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Jazz Hipster Corporation
summary: Jazz Hipster Corporation researches, develops, manufactures, and sells audio speakers worldwide. It offers hi-fi and multi-room speakers; and earphone/mic products. The company markets its products under the JS brand. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Youngtek Electronics Corporation
summary: Youngtek Electronics Corporation provides semiconductor back-end foundry services in Taiwan. The company engages in wafer testing, wafer grinding and cutting and die picking, IC product testing, special substrate cutting, test program development, platform conversion, engineering support, and valet shipping; and AOI automatic optical inspection of LED dies and VCSEL components, die picking inspection, visual inspection, and other post-process OEM activities. It also offers IC sorting and bonding; WLCSP die sorting packaging; label flip-chip binding; and die and LED bonding machines. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Kingland Property Corporation Ltd.
summary: Kingland Property Corporation Ltd. engages in the construction business. The company was formerly known as DSG Technology Co., Ltd. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kuen Chaang Uppertech Corp.
summary: Kuen Chaang Uppertech Corp. engages in the electronic component channel business in Taiwan. It is also involved in the semiconductor business. The company was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Wieson Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: Wieson Technologies Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells interconnect components and wireless components. It offers I/O connectors, board mount connectors, card and socket connecters, connecters and cables, cable assemblies, optical fiber components, wires, wireless modules, automotive electronics, and LED lighting products, as well as antennas. The company was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Antec Inc.
summary: Antec Inc. engages in the manufacturing and selling of computer components and accessories for the gaming, PC upgrade, and do-it-yourself markets worldwide. It offers cases and power supply products, as well as cooling products, such as case fans, and CPU liquid and air coolers. The company was formerly known as Ming Jong Technologies Co., Ltd. Antec Inc. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Fremont, California.

name: INPAQ Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: INPAQ Technology Co., Ltd. provides circuit protection components and antenna products for computing, communication, consumer electronics, and automotive electronics primarily in Taiwan, China, Korea, and North America. It offers RF antennas, such as patch, active, chip, dipole, NFC, RFID, and customized antennas, as well as automotive, wireless power charger, module system, and LTC technology products. The company also provides SMD metal oxide varistor, ESD, transient voltage suppressor, and multilayer varistor; chip ferrite bead and common mode filter; and power, general circuits, and high frequency inductors. Its products are used in phones, tablets, NBs, TVs, and set top boxes, as well as automotive and network applications. INPAQ Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Longwell Company
summary: Longwell Company, together with its subsidiaries, produces and sells electronic components and cable products in Taiwan, China, the United States, Japan, and internationally. The company offers power cords for various applications, such as computers, telecommunications, consumer electronics, and home appliances; and electronic wires and cables, insulation tubes, and heat-shrinkable tubes for use in computers, home appliances, telecommunications, and other electronics products. It also provides cable assemblies for various market sectors, including computer, communication, and consumer electronic and networking industries; connectors primarily for mobile devices, computers, and GPS; wire, AC, and DC halogen free products; and USB output, desk top, car, and wireless chargers, as well as interchangeable plugs, AC and wall-mount adapters, EV charging units, and mechanical components and plastic parts. In addition, the company offers a range of support services. Longwell Company was founded in 1972 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Analog Integrations Corporation
summary: Analog Integrations Corporation, a fabless IC company, designs, manufactures, tests, and markets analog integrated circuits in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers power conversion products, including low and ultra-low dropout linear regulators, DDR regulators, and voltage references; DC/DC converters for high power and portable applications; and LED backlights and lighting solutions. It also provides power management products, such as USB and regulatory USB power switches, and bare-bone USB switches; supervisory products; and NiMH/NiCd battery chargers, Li-ion battery protection products, and high current drivers. Its products are used in 3C applications in the areas of LCD TV, DSC, mobile phone, MP3, PMP, etc. Analog Integrations Corporation was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Tekom Technologies, Inc
summary: Tekom Technologies, Inc provides tutoring services in Taiwan. It offers national examination, correspondence, double-effect, and travel teaching products and services. The company is based in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: AcSiP Technology Corp.
summary: AcSiP Technology Corp., an Internet of Things solution company, provides wireless communication services and solutions in Taiwan. The company offers wireless connectivity solutions, including Bluetooth, NFC, Zigbee, GPS, 2G, 4G, and IoT-Wi-Fi and loT-LoRa products, as well as development kits. It also provides system integration and size shrinkage services. AcSiP Technology Corp. was founded in 2009 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Amazing Microelectronic Corp.
summary: Amazing Microelectronic Corp. provides electrostatic discharge (ESD) protection related solutions in Taiwan. It offers ESD solutions for use in industrial, automotive, and LCM panel, as well as IPC, and DVR and medical electronics applications; and EMI filters for use in LCD/camera display, multimedia card/secure digital memory card, and keypad products of mobile phones and hand held portable devices. It also provides analog switches for video, LAN, Bus, and USB applications; HDMI re-drivers and switches; and RS485/RS232 interface IC solutions for industrial and medical process control, automobile electronics, monitoring system, and building automation networks. The company was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Securitag Assembly Group Co., Ltd.
summary: Securitag Assembly Group Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells RFID transponders in Taiwan and internationally. It offers cards; keyfobs; tags; and NFC sensor-enabled tag products, as well as metal, non-metal, NFC, tamper proof, and rain RFID labels. The company also provides value-added services, such as thermal transfer printing or encoding on used chips. It serves clients in access control, healthcare, automation, logistic, industrial, entertainment, and NFC markets. Securitag Assembly Group Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: NUUO Inc.
summary: NUUO Inc. provides surveillance solutions for recording, monitoring, and third party solution integration for IP and analog cameras in Taiwan and internationally. Its NUUO Crystal Family solutions, such as NUUO NuStation, a Linux enterprise solution; NUUO Titan Pro, a Linux-based VMS solution; NUUO Network Storage solution for surveillance applications; and NUUO Crystal, a VMS solution. The company's NUUO Mainconsole Family solutions include NUUO central management system to manage large scale installations and alarms; NUUO Mainconsole, a NUUO PC based video recording server; NUUO Hybrid Appliance solution to choose a pure DVR, pure NVR, or a hybrid system; NUUO NVRmini 2 and NUUO NVRmini 3 portable NVR solutions; NUUO intelligent video surveillance solution; NUUO IP Appliance solution that provides integration between older and newer types of cameras; NUUO Report Service, which visualizes the people counting data into various graphic types; NUUO NVRSolo_Plus, a Linux embedded standalone solution; and NUUO IVS, a video analytics solution. It also offers NUUO Point of Sale (POS) solution that connects surveillance video with transaction data from POS and ATM; NUUO Facial recognition solution that connects surveillance videos with NUUO Nuface software; NUUO license plate recognition (LPR) solution, which connects surveillance videos with third party LPR solutions; and NUUO Access Control solution that connects surveillance video with access control systems from third party partners. In addition, the company offers NUUO iViewer solution to remotely monitor live video from security cameras; NUUO software development kit; NUUO Temperature Monitoring Panel; NUUO thermal detection solution; IP cameras; VZIII, a retail analytics system; and accessories. It serves retail, transportation, industrial, educational, banking, hospitality, and home markets, as well as government. NUUO Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Taomee Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Taomee Co., Ltd. provides online gaming services in Taiwan. Taiwan Taomee Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Arlitech Electronic Corp.
summary: Arlitech Electronic Corp. supplies inductors for LCD panel industry in Taiwan. It offers high current power, SMD power, DIP power, and RF inductors, as well as automotive grade and EMI suppression filters. The company also provides business items; cooling materials, such as graphene papers, thermal conductivity die-casting aluminum alloy, and graphene coating; and thermal solution designs. Its products are used in the display panel, network, industrial, entertainment, storage device, and computer applications. The company was incorporated in 2001 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: TacBright Optronics Corp.
summary: TacBright Optronics Corporation researches, develops, manufactures, and sells triacetate cellulose (TAC) films. It offers TAC films for protective film in liquid crystal displays (LCDs), as well as for sunglasses, photographic equipment filters, anti-glare goggles, car navigation, other polarizing microscopes, special medical glasses, and other purposes. The company serves LCD polarizer manufacturers in Taiwan, South Korea, Japan, and Mainland China. TacBright Optronics Corporation was founded in 2006 and is based in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc.
summary: Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc. operates as a fabless IC design company in Taiwan. The company designs, markets, and sells power discrete devices, including MOSFET and IGBT; and high voltage power ICs. The company's products are used in various applications, such as computers comprising PCs and servers, as well as power suppliers, communication equipment, handheld devices, consumer products, industrials, etc. Sinopower Semiconductor, Inc. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Ibase Gaming Inc.
summary: Ibase Gaming Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells gaming systems worldwide. It offers gaming solutions for lottery terminals, kiosks, and casino slots. The company also provides OEM and turnkey ODM solutions for terminals, cabinets, class leading PC hardware, and gaming support peripherals. Ibase Gaming Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: PharmaEssentia Corporation
summary: PharmaEssentia Corporation engages in the research, development, production, and sale of therapeutic products for the treatment of human diseases. Its products include ropeginterferon alfa-2b that is used for the treatment of polycythemia vera, essential thrombocythemia, and hepatitis B and C; and Anti-PD-1 antibody for the treatment of cancer. The company also licensed to develop Oraxol for the treatment of breast, advanced gastric, and esophageal cancer; KX01 for the treatment of psoriasis and actinic keratosis. It also focuses on the drug research and development programs in the areas of hematology, infectious disease, oncology, and dermatology. The company has a research collaboration agreement with Axis Therapeutics Limite for the development of T Cell Receptor-T therapy based on the T cell receptor affinity enhancing specific T cell therapy technology platform. PharmaEssentia Corporation was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Hycon Technology Corporation
summary: Hycon Technology Corporation designs, produces, and sells mixed signal microcontroller units, and battery management and touch panel ICs in Taiwan and China. The company offers battery management ICs, such as single cell and multi-cell, and secondary protectors, as well as balance ICs and gas gauges; mixed signal microcontroller units, including microcontroller units, data converters, digital multi-function meters, AC impedance measurement, sensor signal conditioners, low-dropout voltage regulators, LCD controllers and drivers, and application specific standard parts; and capacitive touch ICs. Its products are used in no-switch electronic scale, blood pressure monitor, PIR detector, digital multi-meter, and touch panel applications. The company provides its products under the HYCON brand name. Hycon Technology Corporation was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Intech Biopharm Corporation
summary: Intech Biopharm Corporation focuses on developing and manufacturing generic drugs to treat respiratory diseases. It owns iLEF (inhaled low ethanol formulation), a metered dose inhaler platform to treat asthma and chronic pulmonary obstructive disease; and dry powder inhaler. The company offers its products under the SYN006, SYN010, SYN007, Synflutide, Duasma, Synvent, and SYN011 names. Intech Biopharm Corporation is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Egis Technology Inc.
summary: Egis Technology Inc. engages in the IC design, research, development, testing, and sale of capacitive fingerprint sensors worldwide. It offers universal 2nd factor fingerprint dongle and mobile authentication solutions, and wearable devices. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: ATrack Technology Inc.
summary: ATrack Technology Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, and sells GPS telematics hardware in Taiwan and internationally. It offers hardwired fleet tracking devices, plug and play GPS tracking units, and IP rated tracking devices, as well as accessories. The company's products are used in cars, trucks, containers and non-powered assets, trailers, and motorcycles. ATrack Technology Inc. was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Netmarble Joybomb Inc.
summary: Netmarble Joybomb Inc. develops and publishes mobile, PC, and console games in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and Macau. The company was formerly known as JoyBomb Entertainment Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Netmarble Joybomb Inc. in December 2014. Netmarble Joybomb Inc. was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., LTD.
summary: Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., LTD. engages in the research, development, production, marketing, sale, and distribution of pharmaceutical products worldwide. It manufactures and sells generic, brand, and over-the-counter (OTC) drugs. The company is involved in contract development and manufacturing; consumer healthcare and OTC; and prescription drugs businesses. It also provides clinical and commercial manufacturing services, including solvent manufacturing; solid and liquid dosage forms; extrusion spheronization; immediate and extended release; core, sugar-coated, and film-coated tablets; fixed-dose combination products; and granules, and liquids sachet/stick pack filling. In addition, the company offers pharmaceutical development services, such as liquid and solid dosage forms, and immediate and modified release, analytical method development and validation; packaging and serialization services, which include bottle and blister packaging, and sachets; and raw materials and finished products testing, and analytical techniques services, as well as method verification, validation, and transfer. Further, it provides OTC medicines, foods and vitamins supplements; and skincare products. Additionally, the company also offers market analysis, drug and regulatory related services, price development, GDP warehousing, distribution, packaging, marketing planning, and sales services. The company's sales and distribution network comprises medical centers, hospitals, clinics, pharmacies, drug stores, CVS, and specialty channels. Bora Pharmaceuticals Co., LTD. was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: SNSplus, Inc.
summary: SNSplus, Inc. operates as a social, Web, and mobile game publisher. The company also provides live streaming service; and content production/licensing services. It operates in Taiwan, Hong Kong, Macao, Japan, Thailand, and the rest of Asia. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: WFE Technology Corp.
summary: WFE Technology Corp. manufactures and sells electrical products primarily in Taiwan. It offers power integration products; and circuit protection products, CO and outside plant products, connectors, diodes, encoders, LED shunt protectors, magnetic products, microelectronic modules, position sensors, potentiometers, resistive products, switches, transistors and thyristors, trimpot trimming potentiometers, pro audio products, and automotive products. The company also provides quartz oscillators and microchips. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Assem Technology Co., Ltd
summary: Assem Technology Co., Ltd engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of board-to-board and flexible printed circuit board connectors in Taiwan. It also offers board to board battery and USB type C connectors. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Fun Yours Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fun Yours Technology Co.,Ltd. develops online and PC games. It provides role-playing, real-time strategy, action, and puzzle games. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: ASolid Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: ASolid Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a NAND flash controller provider in Taiwan. It offers SD/microSD controllers, USB flash drive controllers, eMMC controllers, and SSD and UFD controllers. The company was founded in 2008 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: GlobalWafers Co., Ltd.
summary: GlobalWafers Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, researches, designs, develops, and manufactures, semiconductor ingots and wafers in Taiwan and internationally. It offers silicon wafer and ingots; and annealed, diffusion, epitaxial, compound, polished, and SOI wafers. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan. GlobalWafers Co., Ltd. operates as a subsidiary of Sino-American Silicon Products Inc.

name: Senhwa Biosciences, Inc.
summary: Senhwa Biosciences, Inc., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, identifies and develops therapies for the treatment of cancer. The company is developing CX-4945 that is in phase I/II clinical trial in combination with gemcitabine plus cisplatin for the treatment of patients with cholangiocarcinoma; CX-5461 AU, a phase I, open-label, dose escalation, safety, pharmacokinetic, and pharmacodynamics study of intravenously administered CX-5461 in patients with advanced hematologic malignancies; and CX-5461 CA, which is in phase I clinical trial in patients with solid tumors and breast cancer. It is also developing CX-4945-07, which is in phase I clinical trial, multi-center, open-label, treatment duration increment, expansion, safety, and pharmacodynamic study of CX-4945 administered orally twice daily to patients with advanced basal cell carcinoma; and CX-4945 PBTC-053, a pediatric brain tumor consortium that is in phase I/II clinical trial and surgical study of CX-4945 in patients with recurrent SHH medulloblastoma. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ttbio Corp.
summary: Ttbio Corp. manufactures and sells medical instruments under the TTBIO brand name in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers high and low speed hand piece products, dental spare parts, service rotors, maintenance units, and electric hand piece systems. It also provides precision machined parts and components to various industries, including medical, automotive, aerospace, computer components, security, maintenance parts, and custom machining. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Nyquest Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Nyquest Technology Co., Ltd. researches, designs, and sells integrated circuits (ICs). The company provides voice synthesizer ICs, 4-bit microcontrollers with voice/MIDI products, 8-bit microcontrollers, motor drivers, and other products. It offers LED control and drive, speech, and multi-channel speech/melody ICs; 8-Bit OTP MCU for home appliances; 8-bit MCU with LCD drivers; audio power amplifier ICs, low power LCD driver IC, high power motor driver ICs, 4-bit MCU with touch-keys and LED controllers, and 4-Bit MCU with universal remote controllers; and 32-bit MCUs. In addition, the company provides hardware and software development tools. The company offers its products through agents in Taiwan, Japan, Mainland China, Europe, Hong Kong, and the United States. Nyquest Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Nanoplus Ltd.
summary: Nanoplus Ltd. engages in the production, purification, grading, and development of nano diamond powder. The company is also involved in the research and development, and production of thermal materials for thermal dissipation. In addition, it offers environmental wastewater treatment. Further, the company provides laser processing technology solutions. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Excelsior Biopharma Inc.
summary: Excelsior Biopharma Inc. develops pharmaceutical products in Taiwan. The company offers prescription drugs, over-the-counter drugs, medical devices, healthcare food products, medical supplies, and skin products. It provides its products for the therapeutic areas, such as pediatrics, gastroenterology, neurology, cardiology, dermatology, medical toxicology, dentistry, obstetrics and gynecology, anesthesiology, orthopedics, neonatology, oncology, pulmonary medicine, nephology, and others, etc. The company also offers test kits under the Actim name to detect inflected C-reactive protein, influenza virus, colorectal cancer, acute pancreatitis, preterm birth, and early water-breaking. In addition, it provides oral care products, including oral cleansing toothpaste, mouthwash and gel; and health food and cosmetic products. Excelsior Biopharma Inc. also exports its products. The company was formerly known as Excelsior Enterprise Co., Ltd. Excelsior Biopharma Inc. was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Powertip Image Corp
summary: Powertip Image Corp engages in the manufacture of electronic components and optical instruments Taiwan and China. The company offers cellphone, NB, optical touch panel, LED illumination, and optical fiber lenses. It also provides PC and Web camera lenses. Powertip Image Corp was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Medeon Biodesign, Inc.
summary: Medeon Biodesign, Inc. develops and markets medical device solutions in Taiwan. It focuses on developing devices for minimally invasive surgeries, such as Duett, a vascular graft system; ClickClean, a solution to view throughout laparoscopic surgeries; AbClose to prevent port site herniation caused by improper closure; Mercury to widen the narrowed prostatic urethra tissue creating an open urethral lumen for normal urinary flow; PUMA, a solution to treat orthopedic extremity injuries; and Cross-Seal, a large-bore closure device. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Huikwang Corporation
summary: Huikwang Corporation manufactures and sells agrochemical in Taiwan and China. It offers insecticides, fungicides, herbicides, miticides, surfactants, and attractants for use in crop protection. The company was founded in 1965 and is based in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Hopax Chems.Mfg.Co.,Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Hopax Chems.Mfg.Co.,Ltd. produces and sells diversified chemical products in the areas of specialty chemicals, fine chemicals, and repositionable self-adhesive products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers papermaking chemicals, including dispersants, carbonless paper chemicals, paper coating chemicals, and wet end chemicals; water treatment chemicals, such as wastewater treating compounds, and chemicals for cooling water and boiler water; and combo packs, paper notes, cubes, line/assorted/pop-up notes, markers/index tabs/flags, clear notes, special and designing notes, and re-stick tape info boards/meeting pads. The company was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Chunghwa Precision Test Tech. Co., Ltd.
summary: Chunghwa Precision Test Tech. Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, engages in the testing of semiconductor components in Taiwan, China, and internationally. It also produces printed circuit boards (PCB); and markets electronic products. The company offers interposers that convert signal wiring of probe PCB and allow the probe head to receive the signal; vertical probe cards for use in test interface before wafer dicing and IC packaging; and direct docking products for use in wafer testing. It also provides load board PCBs to test yield rate after dicing, mounting, welding, and wrapped with plastics, ceramics, and metals. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: GoMax Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: GoMax Electronics, Inc. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of audio and video systems in Taiwan. It offers SDI, DVI, converter, audio, HDMI, display port, and wall plate series products; and live streaming, optical extender, A/V over IP, video processor, pattern generator, and tool kit products, as well as legacy products. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Radiation Technology, Inc.
summary: Radiation Technology, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells antennas worldwide. The company offers LTE/4G/BTS, IoT/intelligent, automotive, RFID/health care, GPS/transportation, and wireless communication antennas, as well as semi-rigid and flexible RF cable assembly products, RF connectors, wire harness, microwave devices, and other products, as well as medical, computer, and network cables. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Kingwaytek Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Kingwaytek Technology Co., Ltd. produces electronic maps and develops GIS systems in Taiwan. It offers telecommunications maps, 3D maps, and high-definition maps for self-driving cars; and Leke navigation wang quan 3D, a mobile navigation software that provides 3D map, traffic lights along the way, road markings, signs, surrounding landmarks, viaducts, and navigation guidelines under the bridge. The company also provides Leke navigation king TM series that offers professional car networking navigation software for vehicle use; and Leker interchange, a transfer and pedestrian route guidance service. In addition, it offers big data services that are used in smart traffic diversion and enhancing public transport services; Leke store; and LE bus owner service. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd.
summary: Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd. develops and sells skincare products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers cleansers, masks, toners, serums, moisturizers, and sunscreen and eye care products, as well as makeup and body products. It also provides products for acne and pores, hydration, lines and wrinkles, brightening, body care, sensitive skin, and radiant health. The company offers its products through a network of approximately 2200 sales points, as well as e-commerce sales channels. Dr. Wu Skincare Co., Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Crystalvue Medical Corporation
summary: Crystalvue Medical Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells medical devices. Its products include OCT devices, fundus cameras, chin rest devices, digital microscope cameras, tonometers, nucleic acid extraction system, polymerase chain reaction system, gastrointestinal endoscopic disposable devices, etc. The company offers automated retina cameras; FundusVue, a diagnosis instrument for ophthalmologists to inspect and record the patients' retina; and TonoVue, a diagnosis instrument to measure IOP of the patient. Crystalvue Medical Corporation was founded in 2009 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Axcen Photonics Corporation
summary: Axcen Photonics Corporation specializes in photonic integration of optical, mechanical, and electrical design of manufacturing professional-grade optical transceiver modules in Taiwan. It offers 25G SFP28, video small form factor pluggable (SFP), compact SFP, 10G SFP+, 1x9, SFP, copper SFP, bi-directional SFP with single LC receptacle, BIDI 1x9, 2x5 small form factor (SFF), gigabit Ethernet passive optical network SFF, and coarse wavelength division multiplexing SFP transceiver modules. The company was incorporated in 2002 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Calitech Co., Ltd.
summary: Calitech Co., Ltd. develops technology solutions for semiconductor, III/V, MEMS, LED, and display industries worldwide. The company offers semiconductor critical components for applications in chemical mechanical polishing fabrication equipment, etching, chemical vapor deposition, physical vapor deposition, etc. It also provides systems, such as spray solvent tools, spray acid tools, and spin rinse dryers; and electrostatic chucks for semiconductor and other industries. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Lumosa Therapeutics Co., Ltd.
summary: Lumosa Therapeutics Co., Ltd. researches and develops drugs for the neurological and inflammatory diseases in Taiwan. The company offers LT - 1001, an analgesic injection that has completed Phase II/III clinical trials for severe pain relief after surgery. It is also developing LT3001, which is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of acute ischemic stroke; LT5001 that is in Phase II clinical trial for uremic pruritus; and LT2003, which is in pre-clinical stage for the treatment of oncology. The company was incorporated in 2000 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: AMPAK Technology Inc.
summary: AMPAK Technology Inc. operates as an optical communication and wireless multimedia company in Taiwan. The company operates through two business units, Wireless Multi-Media and Optical Communication. The Wireless Multi-Media business unit offers wireless multimedia products, such as Systems in Package and wireless HDMI. The Optical Communication business unit provides Tocan packaging and testing services for optoelectronic components, as well as various solutions for the optoelectronics industry. The company serves the industrial PC, energy efficiency, audio, consumer electronics, VR, UAV, wearable, medical, and automotive markets. AMPAK Technology Inc. was founded in 2000 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: Medigen Vaccine Biologics Corporation
summary: Medigen Vaccine Biologics Corporation, a biopharmaceutical company, develops and produces vaccines and biologics for unmet medical needs in Taiwan and internationally. The company is developing A 71 to fight against EV71, a member of genus enterovirus; H5N1 and H7N9 mockup vaccines for pandemic influenza; and dengue vaccines. It is also developing biosimilar Palivizumab to prevent respiratory syncytial virus. The company has a collaboration with Dynavax Technologies Corporation to develop a vaccine candidate to protect against COVID-19; and a partnership with BlueWillow Biologics, Inc. to develop intranasal vaccine for SARS-CoV-2. Medigen Vaccine Biologics Corporation was founded in 2012 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan. Medigen Vaccine Biologics Corporation operates as a subsidiary of Medigen Biotechnology Corp.

name: Chang Wah Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Chang Wah Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells LED lead frame and molding compound materials in Taiwan. It offers LED and IC products, and premolds. The company was founded in 2009 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: TaiwanJ Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd.
summary: TaiwanJ Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd., a specialty pharmaceutical company, develops and commercializes small molecules for chronic organ inflammation of metabolic, autoimmune, and infectious etiologies in Taiwan. The company also develops JKB-122 and JKB-121; and novel chemical entities for therapy to address chronic liver diseases and allergy/asthma. Its products target diseases that include liver inflammation/liver fibrosis, non-alcoholic steatohepatitis, non-alcoholic fatty liver disease, autoimmune diseases, asthma, and atopic dermatitis. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Topview Optronics Corporation
summary: Topview Optronics Corporation designs, produces, markets, and sells surveillance cameras and peripherals worldwide. The company offers various IP cameras, as well as accessories, including pendant mount and wall mount brackets, corner mount and pole mount adaptors, parapet wall mounts, pendant and wall mount with junction boxes, and sun shields. It also provides after sales services. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: High Power Lighting Corp
summary: High Power Lighting Corp designs, manufactures, and sells LED chips and related components. Its products include UVA, UVB/UVC, IR, and color products. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Appro Photoelectron Inc.
summary: Appro Photoelectron Inc. operates as a design house for image products to enable customers to develop products in Taiwan. It offers camera module solutions, body worn cameras, and car DVR solutions; and image related products. The company also provides system integration and design, and FAE technical support services. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Chief Telecom Inc.
summary: Chief Telecom Inc. provides telecommunication services in Taiwan and internationally. It offers POP sites; IDC services, including space/cage and suite, cabinet, inter-connection, customized power, and managed services; IDC value-added services, such as managed CPE, backup, and security services; and online IDC tour comprising L.Y. and T.F. building, cable, power, security, fire alarm, and air conditioning systems, as well as cold/hot aisle arrangement systems, lobbies, network operation centers, and IDC facilities. The company also provides enterprise networking solutions comprising multi-protocol label switching virtual private network, ADSL-VPN, tunnel VPN, SSL VPN application, data managed CPE; leased line, and international private leased circuit /IEPL; and Internet access solutions services. In addition, it offers ISR wholesale voice and voice over IP services; and retail voice services for businesses communications consisting of exchange equipment, circuit connection, and cost analysis data. Further, the company provides cloud services, such as cloud computing, APP cloud, data storage, security, and value-added services; and operates chief cloud exchange, Taipei internet exchange, and submarine exchange and voice exchange centers. Additionally, it offers global carrier, digital content, e-commerce, chain store, hybrid cloud, enterprise voice, data storage integration, greater china, and global communication solutions, as well as ICT integration solutions for traveling industry. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan. Chief Telecom Inc. operates as a subsidiary of Chunghwa Telecom Co., Ltd.

name: Enimmune corporation
summary: Enimmune corporation operates as a biopharmaceutical Research and development, and marketing company in Taiwan. Its products include Tuberculin PPD RT23 SSI, an approved drug for tuberculin test to determine whether the patient is infected with tuberculosis. The company is also involved in the development of vaccines to prevent various infectious diseases, such as enterovirus, pneumonia, norovirus, dengue fever virus, Middle East respiratory syndrome coronavirus, etc. Enimmune corporation was founded in 2014 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: ThroughTek Co., Ltd.
summary: ThroughTek Co., Ltd. provides solutions for Internet of Things (IoT) cloud services platforms. The company operates Kalay Platform, which provides customized app services to help customers deploy smart products and accelerate its time-to-market, as well as integrates video surveillance equipment, smart consumer products, and various sensors to allow brand name manufacturers, telecoms providers, system integration providers, hardware manufacturers, and other service providers to offer smart solutions. Its Kalay platform offers cloud services, including point-to-point and IoT connection, account and device management, video surveillance and cloud storage, push notifications, over the air, and smart assistant services. The company serves smart home, agriculture, and connected car industries. ThroughTek Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Chuang Yi Biotech co., ltd.
summary: Chuang Yi Biotech Co., ltd. engages in the research, development, and marketing of medicines and health foods in Taiwan. The company offers products in the areas of gastrointestinal, metabolism, and regular health care, as well as allergy reducing products. Chuang Yi Biotech Co., ltd. Swas founded in 2011 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Rafael Microelectronics, Inc.
summary: Rafael Microelectronics, Inc. manufactures and sells radio frequency (RF) integrated circuits. It offers IoT connectivity products, terrestrial/cable/satellite set-top box receivers, satellite broadcast reception and distribution systems, optical communication systems, and TV receivers, as well as provides RF IP and design services. The company offers its products in Taiwan, Europe, North America, China, Korea and Japan. Rafael Microelectronics, Inc. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Onyx Healthcare Inc.
summary: Onyx Healthcare Inc., a professional medical IT company, provides medical PC solutions for the hospital/clinical IT market worldwide. It offers mobile cart computers, ubiquitous power solutions, remote management software, mobile medical tablets, surgical workstations, operating room solutions, fanless slim PPCs, medical AIO solutions, bedside infotainment, medical display solutions, MedPC box PCs, and medical slim mini-ITX MBs. The company also offers digital operation rooms, AI and robots, power management solutions, smart ward solutions, nurse stations, telecare and telemedicine, remote system management, and emergency medical services. In addition, it provides OEM/ODM services, such as planning, designing, validation, integration, production, after-sale, software, and design capability. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Onyx Healthcare Inc. is a subsidiary of ASUS Group.

name: Aplex Technology Inc.
summary: Aplex Technology Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells industrial PC products worldwide. The company provides stainless steel panel, industrial panel, embedded box, marine panel, in-vehicle panel, and ATEx panel PC products. It also offers human-machine interfaces, ATEx displays, ATEx box pc products, industrial displays and boards, and machine vision systems, as well as accessories, including storage products, power adapters and modules, converter boards, and product stands. The company provides its products for use in smart factory, surveillance, control and communication, machine vision, food and beverage automation, kiosk and ticketing, ATEX oil and gas, smart warehousing and transportation, and healthcare applications. Aplex Technology Inc. was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: PlexBio Co., Ltd.
summary: PlexBio Co., Ltd. designs, develops, and manufactures multiplexing platforms and assays to enable genetic research and clinical cancer diagnostics. It offers IntelliPlex SARS-CoV-2/Flu Kit, an in vitro diagnostic device; IntelliPlex SARS-CoV-2 Detection Kit, an automated solution for testing during the coronavirus disease; IntelliPlex Lung Cancer Panel-cfDNA, a molecular assay for mutations; IntelliPlex Lung Cancer Panel √Ç¬ñ cfRNA, which detects various variants of the ALK, ROS1, RET, NTRK1, and MET genes using cell-free RNA derived from plasma of patients with NSCLC; IntelliPlex Lung Cancer Panel, which detects various DNA mutations; IntelliPlex BRAF V600 Mutation Kit, a single well solution for mutations; IntelliPlex EGFR Mutation Kit, a molecular assay for somatic mutations; IntelliPlex KRAS Mutation Plus Kit, a solution for clinically actionable mutations; IntelliPlex NRAS Mutation Kit, a single well mutation kit; IntelliPlex PIK3CA Mutation Kit, a PCR mutation kit; IntelliPlex ALK Rearrangement Kit, a single well solution for actionable ALK gene rearrangements; IntelliPlex RET/NTRK1 Rearrangement Kit, a single well RET and NTRK1 gene rearrangement kit; IntelliPlex ROS1 Rearrangement Kit, a molecular assay for clinical actionable gene rearrangements; IntelliPlex Food Testing Kit for Dairy, a single well solution for bacteria; and pCode Coupling Buffer Set, a solution for coupling process. The company also offers IntelliPlex 1000 pCode Processor, a hybridization, washing, incubation, and labeling solution; PlexBio 100 Fluorescent Analyzer, an optical imaging system; DigiPlex Thermocycler, an instrument for PCR amplification; pCode MicroDisc, a solution for multiplexing applications; PlexBio Magnetic Stand, a solution for paramagnetic pCode precipitation; pCode Coupling Buffer Set, a solution to-use buffers; and DeXipher software for data analysis and interpretation. PlexBio Co., Ltd. was founded in 2009 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd.
summary: Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd. researches and develops, and sells beauty and skin care products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers its products under the EDN, NU+ derma, L'HERBOFLORE, and MIKOBEAUT√É¬â SPA brand names. It also operates skin care beauty therapy center. Mikobeaute International Co., Ltd. was founded in 2002 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: SyneuRx International (Taiwan) Corp.
summary: SyneuRx International (Taiwan) Corp. develops drugs for the treatment of unmet medical needs in central nervous system disorders in Taiwan. Its pipeline under clinical development includes SND11, which is in Phase IIb/III clinical trial for the treatment of adolescent schizophrenia; SND12 that is in Phase IIb/III clinical trial for therapy on refractory schizophrenia; and SND13, which is in Phase IIb/III clinical trial for the treatment of adult schizophrenia. The company is also developing SND14, which is in Phase IIb/III clinical trial to treat early dementia; SND51 that is in Phase II clinical trial for dementia and psychosis symptoms; SNG12, which is in Phase III clinical trial for the treatment of depression and suicidality; SNA1 that is in Phase II clinical trial to treat refractory depression; and SNB01, which is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of COVID-19. SyneuRx International (Taiwan) Corp. was founded in 2013 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Foresee Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd.
summary: Foresee Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd., clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, engages in the development and commercialization of drugs in Taiwan and Europe. The company's stabilized injectable formulation pipeline includes FP-001, which completed Phase III clinical study for the treatment of advanced stage prostate cancer; FP-004 that is in preclinical stage to treat opioids use disorder; FP-011 and FP-014, a long-acting sustained release dosage form for the treatment of breast cancer/prostate cancer; FP-015, for the treatment of neurological diseases; and FP-002 for the treatment of acromegaly, as well as FP-008 for the treatment of diabetic retinopathy. Its new chemical entity pipeline products consists of FP-020 to treat alport syndrome; FP-025, a selective matrix metalloproteinase-12 inhibitor, which is in Phase II clinical trial for the treatment of asthama, chronic obstructive pulmonary diseases, and emphysema or sarcoidosis; and FP-045, a small molecule mitochondrial aldehyde dehydrogenase 2 that completed Phase I clinical study for the treatment of peripheral arterial disease, fanconi anemia, and cardiorenal metabolic diseases. The company's strategic partners include Pierre Fabre Medicament Production and ScinoPharm. Foresee Pharmaceuticals Co., Ltd. was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Promate Solutions Corporation
summary: Promate Solutions Corporation designs, develops, and sells technologies for TFT LCD displays worldwide. The company offers embedded panels, panel PCs, industrial displays, and LCD products. It serves medical, automotive, vending, and marine markets. The company was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: DaBomb Protein Corp.
summary: DaBomb Protein Corp. produces and supplies plant peptides in Asia. It offers hydrolyzed soya peptide products, functional peptides, and natural lactobacillus strains under the da bomb brand. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: TaiRx, Inc.
summary: TaiRx, Inc., a pharmaceutical company, focuses on the development and commercialization of therapeutics for the treatment of cancer and other diseases. The company's products under development include CVM-1118, an oral anti-cancer drug that is Phase II clinical trial; and Rexis, an add-on injection therapy that is in Phase III clinical trials to treat patients with sepsis. Its pre-clinical products comprise TRX-711 that is used to treat secondary hyperparathyroidism; TRX-920, an oral delivery formulation; and TRX-105, a molecule developed for treating and alleviating symptoms of various colitis. The company also offers Zelnite, a drug that helps in patient's blood Se level and immune system; and focuses on development of the nodal diagnostic devices and anti-body drugs. TaiRx, Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Jason's Entertainment Co., Ltd.
summary: Jason's Entertainment Co., Ltd. produces television shows and dramas in Taiwan. The company also distributes and brokerages artists; and offers project marketing services. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Nan Juen International Co., Ltd.
summary: Nan Juen International Co., Ltd. manufactures and trades in steel-ball bearing slides and other products in Taiwan, the Americas, and internationally. The company was formerly known as Nan Juen Industrial Corporation and changed its name to Nan Juen International Co., Ltd. in September 1996. Nan Juen International Co., Ltd. in 1984 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Nan Juen International Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Repon Industrial Corporation.

name: DingZing Advanced Materials Inc.
summary: DingZing Advanced Materials Inc. researches, develops, produces, and sells composite materials and technical films for various industries in Taiwan. Its products include Provecta series of advanced technical films that provide an alternative to rubber and traditional plastic; Advanta technical films for clothing applications; Orkesta series of composite materials with a layer of hot melt film designed to replace conventional materials, such as microfiber or genuine leather; Perfola air hoses and hydration tubes; Aldura transmission and conveyor belts; and DingZing DZ seals. The company's products are used in apparel, automotive, electronic, wearable, footwear, healthcare, optical, outdoor and sport goods, and furniture and bedding applications. DingZing Advanced Materials Inc. is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation
summary: East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation manufactures and sells optical thin film filters in Taiwan and internationally. It offers narrowband filter chips for use in the telecom industry applications, as well as custom narrowband filters for non telecom applications. The company also provides broadband filter chips, including banded skip filter chips, filter components for FTTx, CWDM filter components, and gain flattening filters; and customized products, such as coated WDM on pigtail for hi isolation application, IR-cut filters for digital still cameras and CCM applications, and R/G/B filters for digital lighting processing projectors. East Tender Optoelectronics Corporation was founded in 2000 and is based in Yilan City, Taiwan.

name: EirGenix Inc.
summary: EirGenix Inc. operates as a contract development and manufacturing company Taiwan and internationally. Its services include cell line development and cell bank manufacturing, process development, analytical sciences and quality control, cGMP manufacturing, and antibody drug conjugate. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Provision Information Co.,Ltd.
summary: Provision Information Co.,Ltd. provides payment, financial application, security, and outsourcing services to the financial industry. It offers payment solutions, such as ProIBRS, an interbank remittance system; ProATM, an ATM auto-transaction system; ProEPS FEDI, an enterprise payment system/financial EDI; ProEPS FXML, an enterprise payment system/financial XML; ProCMS, a card management system for IC cards and magnetic cards; ProIB/WebATM, an Internet banking/Web ATM; and real-time gross settlement mechanism. Its payment solutions also ProTGW-TSM, a mobile payment TSM gateway; ProTGW-HCE, a mobile payment HCE gateway; ProeACH, an eACH gateway for joined banks; and digital payment solutions consisting of ProePAY, a digital payment system, as well as payment gateways. The company also provides financial application solutions, including ProFEP, a platform for developing financial transactions; ProComm, an integrated communication server; ProFCS, a collection system for financial industry; ProMIPS, an encryption kit for file transmission; ProACS, an ATM controlled system; ProAMS, an ATM management system; and ProJCIC, a joint credit inquiry system. In addition, it offers information security products comprising ProHSM, a hardware security module (HSM); ProHSM KMC, a key management console; ProMonitor, a HSM monitoring system; ProHSM HRM, a HSM resource managers; ProHSM SUIP, a secure user interface program; and ProVA, a validation authority system. Further, the company provides outsourcing services, including on-site human resource services for various industries, platforms, and job roles. Provision Information Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells plastic cards, name plates, and membrane switches worldwide. The company offers contactless and sharped, contact only IC, and dual interface IC cards, as well as card personalization services. It also provides embossed metal dome membrane switches, capacitive touch keypads, and printed circuit boards. Taiwan Name Plate Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Alcorlink Corp.
summary: Alcorlink Corp., a fabless IC design company, provides device controller and image application solutions primarily in Taiwan. It offers I/O product/image application/others, which include flash and smart card readers, USB cameras, intelligent storage solutions, hub controllers, and MFi products. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Julien's International Entertainment Group
summary: Julien's International Entertainment Group provides digital multimedia technology solutions worldwide. Its activities include theme park development and project management; digital content development, production, and distribution; floating theater and theme park equipment development; and investment in and development of Xingyu Cinema Park. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation
summary: Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation engages in the promotion of art and cultural activities in Taiwan and internationally. It provides services in the areas of music, dance, exhibition, concert, drama, physical education, parenting, lecture, film, commodity, and package goods. The company was formerly known as Yucai International Marketing Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation in July 2014. Kuang Hong Arts Management Incorporation was founded in 2004 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Ecocera Optronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Ecocera Optronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ceramics circuit boards in Taiwan. It offers direct plating copper products consisting high-power LED thermal dissipation substrates, LED thermal dissipation modules, concentrating type solar cell substrates, passive components, high power electronic components, etc. The company also provides direct bonded copper and high performance copper products. Its products are used in LED lighting, automotive lighting, mobile phone LED flash, UV, display, and other applications. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Poindus Systems Corp.
summary: Poindus Systems Corp. designs and manufactures POS terminal and touch display products worldwide. The company offers panel PCs, tablets, small and large size displays, box PCs, POS peripherals, and custom products. Its products are used in hospitality, retail, medical, and industrial applications. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Takisawa Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Takisawa Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells precision machine tools and printed circuit board drillers in Asia, Europe, the Americas, and internationally. The company offers machine tools, such as small and medium CNC lathes, and non-CNC high speed precision lathes for bicycle, motorcycle, and automobile industries, as well as parts processing plants supplying the aeronautic industry. It also provides horizontal, vertical, dual spindle, and extra heavy duty CNC lathes; high-speed precision drilling machines; and equipment sales and maintenance services. The company was founded in 1971 and is headquartered in Taoyuan City, Taiwan. Taiwan Takisawa Technology Co., Ltd. is a subsidiary of Takisawa Machine Tool Co., Ltd.

name: Cayenne's Ark Mobile Co., Ltd.
summary: Cayenne's Ark Mobile Co., Ltd. develops and sells mobile games. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: ICARES Medicus, Inc.
summary: ICARES Medicus, Inc. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of ophthalmic medical materials. The company provides nanomedical lubricious coatings and various surface treatments for implantable or interventional medical devices; intraocular lenses for the treatment of cataracts, myopia, hyperopia, presbyopia, or astigmatism; and nanomedical devices. It has operations in the United States, England, Japan, Taiwan, Spain, Hungary, China, and internationally. The company was founded in 2011 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Sofiva Genomics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Sofiva Genomics Co.,Ltd. provides genetic testing services in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers prenatal services, including thalassemia carrier screening; tests for microdeletion syndromes and single-gene abnormalities; detection of common chromosome abnormalities, selected microdeletions syndromes, and selected skeletal dysplasia genetic mutations; multiple genetic diseases detection; folate metabolism genetic screening; and spinal muscular atrophy carrier screening. It also provides cancer services, such as cancer scans; real-time monitoring of tumor dynamics; hereditary cancer related genetic tests; and hereditary women's cancer tests for breast, colon, ovarian, and endometrial cancer, as well as human papillomavirus screening. In addition, the company offers rare diseases genetic testing services; and preimplantation genetic diagnosis and NGS-based preimplantation genetic screening services. Further, it provides new-born genetic testing services comprising baby scans; hereditary sensorineural hearing loss screening; congenital central hypoventilation syndrome screening; congenital cytomegalovirus infection screening test; and atopic dermatitis genetic screening. Additionally, the company offers biochemical and chromosome testing, as well as advisory and support services. It serves expectant parents, patients with genetic disorders, and their families. Sofiva Genomics Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2012 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Techcential International Ltd
summary: Techcential International Ltd, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells American wooden bedroom furniture products. It offers 5-piece bedroom furniture, including bed frames, night stand, dresser, chest, and mirror. The company also engages in the production and manufacturing of wood pellets; processing and manufacturing of rubber wood raw materials; and wholesale of wooden restaurant furniture and children's bed furniture. It has operations in the United States, Malaysia, Canada, and internationally. Techcential International Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.

name: Gongwin Biopharm Holdings Co., Ltd.
summary: Gongwin Biopharm Holdings Co., Ltd., a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company, develops anticancer drugs. It is developing PTS302, which has completed Phase III clinical trials for the treatment of lung cancer; PTS100, which is in Phase II clinical trials for the treatment of liver cancer; PTS-02 for the treatment of adenoid cystic carcinoma; and PTS500 for the treatment of malignant pleural effusion. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: UHT Unitech Co., Ltd.
summary: UHT Unitech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells medium and high grade carbon fiber in Taiwan and internationally. Its products are used in aerospace, automotive, energy, and other sectors. The company is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Handa Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: Handa Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a specialty pharmaceutical company, focuses on the development of drugs for various diseases in the United States and China. It is developing various general delivery systems, including matrix system, reservoir system, matrix plus reservoir system, osmotic pump system, and colon delivery system. The company also develops modified release dosage forms, such as orally disintegrating tablets, modified release orally disintegrating tablets, modified release suspension systems, and ophthalmic modified release systems. In addition, it develops 505(b)2 and generic drugs. The company is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: UniPharma Co., Ltd.
summary: UniPharma Co., Ltd. engages in the brand drug development activities. The company offers adhesion reduction, neurology, cardiovascular, and anesthesia solutions; and antidotes, as well as medical devices and in vitro-diagnostic products. It also develops bio-markers for the diagnosis of neurological disease; and operates a laboratory for neurological bio-markers. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Bossdom Digiinnovation Co., Ltd.
summary: Bossdom Digiinnovation Co., Ltd. provides various content encoding services. It offers filming production, full feature post-production, VFX, animation, digital production, movie content aggregator, text localization, and digital color grading services. The company was founded in 1991 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Ever-Clear Environmental Eng. Corp.
summary: Ever-Clear Environmental Eng. Corp. engages in the evaluation, design, construction, and commissioning service of wastewater treatment and organic waste gas treatment facilities. The company is involved in the evaluation/process design/detailed design of wastewater/sludge/underground water/organic waste gas treatment; upgrade or expansion of existed wastewater or organic waste gas treatment plant; reuse of industrial wastewater; and wastewater/sludge/underground water/organic waste gas treatment equipment manufacture and turnkey services. It also provides fine screens, flow measuring tanks, sludge scrapers, anaerobic biological treatment equipment, floating decanter system of sequential batch reactors, physical and chemical treatment equipment, sludge drying equipment, and air pollution control equipment. The company serves food, textile and dying, mechanical and automotive, leather, electric and optoelectronics, biotechnology and pharmaceutical, chemical, pulp and paper, and other industries. Ever-Clear Environmental Eng. Corp. was founded in 1999 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: GAME HOURS Inc.
summary: GAME HOURS Inc. develops and publishes mobile/handheld gaming products. The company was formerly known as WeGames Corporation and changed its name to GAME HOURS Inc. in December 2020. GAME HOURS Inc. was founded in 2013 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Somnics, Inc.
summary: Somnics, Inc., a medical device company, focuses on developing technologies for the treatment of obstructive sleep apnea (OSA). The company offers iNAP One and iNAP Lite sleep therapy systems, which utilize oral negative pressure technology to treat OSA, a sleep-related breathing disorder. Somnics, Inc. was founded in 2011 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Sinew Pharma Inc.
summary: Sinew Pharma Inc., a biopharmaceutical company, focuses on the development and sale of drugs for the treatment of hepatotoxicity-free acetaminophen and fatty liver diseases. The company's products include SNP-610 drug, which is in Phase II clinical trial for treating patients with non-alcoholic steatohepatitis in Taiwan; and SNP-630, a pre-clinical drug for treating patients with non-alcoholic steatohepatitis. It is also developing SNP-810 for use in analgesic and antipyretic indications; and SNP-830 and SNP-840, which are used as hepatotoxicity-free analgesic medicines in the United States. The company was founded in 2014 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD.
summary: Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD. designs, manufactures, and sells front-end and back-end packaging and inspection equipment for manufacturing semiconductors in Taiwan, Hong Kong, and China. Its principal products include semiconductor process equipment, semiconductor detecting equipment, laser application equipment, precision machineries, and precision molds. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan. Gallant Micro. Machining Co., LTD. operates as a subsidiary of Gallant Precision Machining Co., Ltd.

name: Fuzetec Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Fuzetec Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and sells circuit protection solutions for electronic and electrical industries worldwide. The company offers radial leaded PPTC, surface mount polymer PTC, battery strap polymer PTC, and low Rho SMD polymer resettable fuses, as well as PPTC chips and discs. Its products are used in various applications, including telecommunications, networks, Smart phones, tablet and notebook PCs, computers and peripherals, automotives, instrumentation and industrial controls, power supplies, consumer electronics, primary and secondary batteries, etc. The company was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: M31 Technology Corporation
summary: M31 Technology Corporation operates as a professional silicon intellectual property (IP) provider. It offers standard cell library, general purpose I/O library, special I/O, high level ESD cell, memory compiler, high speed interface IP, Analog IP, and other solutions. The company was founded in 2011 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Biomaterial Co., Ltd.
summary: Taiwan Biomaterial Co., Ltd. develops and sells medical devices in Taiwan. The company provides Foamagen, an absorbable biomaterial for dura reconstruction after surgeries; stroke interventional treatment devices; and devices for the treatment of early degenerative arthritis, and tissue repair and regeneration. Taiwan Biomaterial Co., Ltd. is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Art Emperor Technology & Culture Co., Ltd
