summary: Art Emperor Technology & Culture Co., Ltd operates an art information website in Taiwan. Its website allows access art information; and offers art auction services, as well as TODAAY art, an e-commerce platform for artists. The company also offers art e-commerce and art advertising services. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Cystech Electronics Corp.
summary: Cystech Electronics Corp. designs, develops, manufactures, and supplies power devices for the computing, consumer electronics, communication, and industrial markets worldwide. The company offers MOSFET and SCR products, bipolar and digital transistors, and AECQ transistors. It also provides universal high brightness LED drivers; PWM integrated circuits (IC); DC to DC ICs; and dual operational amplifier and voltage references, regulators, CMos regulators, and quadruple operational comparators. In addition, the company offers switching control, fast, zener, switching, and schottky diodes; general purpose, glass passivated, snubber damping, and high efficiency rectifiers; and bridge and TVS products. Cystech Electronics Corp. is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: EUSOL Biotech Co., Ltd.
summary: Eusol Biotech Co.,Ltd. focuses on developing drugs for unmet medical needs. Its pipeline includes ES135, a recombinant human acidic fibroblast growth factor (rhFGF1) for repairing neuron function; and SM-1, a 3-in-1 capsule containing 3 commercial drugs with sedative effect. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Energenesis Biomedical CO.,LTD.
summary: Energenesis Biomedical CO.,LTD. operates in the biomedicine industry in Taiwan. It provides ENERGI-F703, which is Phase II clinical trial for use in treatment of diabetic foot ulcers; ENERGI-F701, a topical tonic for the treatment of alopecia that is in Phase II clinical trial; ENERGI-F711, a burn cream; ENERGI-F702 to treat metabolic diseases; ENERGI-F704 for the treatment of inflammatory bowel disease; ENERGI-F708 for asthma treatment; ENERGI-F705 for Parkinson's disease control; ENERGI-F707 for the treatment of mitochondria deficiency; ENERGI-F706 to treat cachexia; ENERGI-F709, a vaccine adjuvant; and ENERGI-F710 for blood phosphate control. The company also offers scientific products, which include western blot, antibody production, protein purification, and proteome experiment reagents, as well as buffer solutions for scientific researchers. Energenesis Biomedical CO.,LTD. was founded in 2012 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Welgene Biotech Co.,Ltd.
summary: Welgene Biotech Co.,Ltd. provides clinical testing services. The company offers research services, including sequencing, microarray, quantitative PCR verification, nucleic acid extraction/QC, LCM single cell experiment, and bioinformatics analysis services; and clinical application services, such as array-based genomic hybridization and non-invasive prenatal tests. It also provides reagents, consumable supplies, and instruments, as well as software services. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: BioLASCO Taiwan Co., Ltd.
summary: BioLASCO Taiwan Co., Ltd. provides bio-materials and surgical services in Taiwan and internationally. The company is also involved in the design of animal facility; and provision of contract management and training services. It breeds and produces SPF laboratory rats and mice, including outbreed stocks, inbreed strains, and immune deficient models, as well as offers special animal model services. The company also provides endotoxin detection, animal heath diagnostic, and serological kits, as well as biological indicators. In addition, it offers equipment, including IVC systems and ventilated houses; professional and automated animal watering systems; transponders; portable chlorine dioxide gas generators; mouse and rat tail cuff blood pressure systems, analgesia equipment, and animal behavioral equipment; metabolism and behavior systems, and trackers; cabinet X-ray systems; automatic cleaning equipment; workstations; isolation chambers; and foggers. The company is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Healthconn Corp.
summary: Healthconn Corp. provides customized disease prevention and health management services. It offers personalized health services; health promotion services, such as nutrition, exercise, stress, and sleep management services; and health management services. The company also provides environmental food safety and clinical microbiological testing, infectious molecular biological detection, senior consultation, cancer genetic testing products, and pension planning services. Healthconn Corp. was founded in 2009 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Trusval Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Trusval Technology Co., Ltd. provides solutions in the field of water supply system, waste treatment, and system integration. The company offers functional water supply systems, including CO2-DIW, O3-DIW, H2-DIW, and NH3-DIW dissolvers; and waste water treatment advanced processes that include waste acid De H2O2, waste solvent De H2O2, waste solvent De DMSO/DMSO2, waste water degrade IPA, and waste IPA and solvent reclaim, as well as reclaim of copper sulfate by electrolysis. It also provides system integration solutions, such as chemical supply, slurry supply, gas supply, waste chemical collection, and automatic electronics control systems; and engages in the planning, design, construction, and maintenance of equipment, instruments, and field pipes for the facility system in the hi-tech industries. In addition, the company is involved in the semiconductor business. Trusval Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1995 and is based in Miaoli, Taiwan.

name: Innovision FlexTech Corporation
summary: Innovision FlexTech Corporation manufactures and sells projection screens. It offers ultra-short throw front projection, telephoto, and rear projection screens. The company is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan. Innovision FlexTech Corporation is a subsidiary of Arisawa Mfg. Co., Ltd.

name: Anxo Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd.
summary: Anxo Pharmaceutical Co., Ltd., a specialty pharmaceutical company, develops, manufactures, and sells pharmaceutical products for medical professionals and patients in Taiwan and internationally. It offers prescription and over the counter drugs in various therapeutic areas, such as cardiovascular, metabolism, CNS, diabetic, gastroenterology, respiratory, anti-infection, dermatology, nephrology, urology, orthopedics, etc. The company was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Zilltek Technology Corp.
summary: Zilltek Technology Corp. operates as an analog and mixed signal IC design house in Taiwan. It designs and develops micro-electromechanical (MEMS) heterogeneous integrated circuits. The company offers analog, digital, and optics MEMS microphones; digital barometric pressure and temperature sensors; audio amplifiers; DC/DC converters; LDOs; and touch screen controllers. Its products are used in PCs, wearable devices, and TVs applications. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Sintrones Technology Corp.
summary: Sintrones Technology Corp. manufactures and sells computers and peripherals in Taiwan, Europe, the Americas, and internationally. The company provides edge AI rugged computers; in-vehicle rugged computer computing platforms; reliable rugged industrial computer systems for smart factory automation; display computer, such as in-vehicle HM monitor, in-vehicle panel pc, and industrial panel pc; and peripherals, including GPS, CAN bus, and video capture modules. It also offers edge AI, AGV and AMR, autonomous cars, railway and rolling stock, fleet management, intelligent surveillance, smart agriculture and animal husbandry, industrial automation, and military and defense solutions. Sintrones Technology Corp. was incorporated in 2009 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Keystone Microtech Corporation
summary: Keystone Microtech Corporation operates in the semiconductor industry in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers load board and burn-in boards. It also offers probe cards. In addition, the company provides technical services comprising of signal integrity and power integrity simulation and thermal simulation. Keystone Microtech Corporation was founded in 2006 and is based in Zhubei City, Taiwan.

name: Algoltek, Inc.
summary: Algoltek, Inc. provides building bloc IPs in Taiwan. The company offers solutions for video conversion in various formats, such as MHL, HDMI, VGA, DisplayPort, and type-C ALT mode; ASIC solutions for switching/splitting video signal between sink and source devices; signal extension and redriver solutions; and protocol controls for power delivery application. It also provides design assistance that enables IC designers to accelerate SoC designs from planning to SoC silicon. Algoltek, Inc. was founded in 2010 and is based in Zhubei, Taiwan.

name: Deepjoy Picture Corporation
summary: Deepjoy Picture Corporation engages in the film distribution, digital and TV copyright licensing, home video and audio distribution, and film investment businesses in Taiwan. It operates 100 DVD-owned cooperation channels; 92 movie theaters; and 5 cable TV channels, as well as OTT digital platforms. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: eCloudvalley Digital Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: eCloudvalley Digital Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a cloud managed service provider and storage product distributor in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers cloud storage, disaster backup, server hosting, server monitoring, and Amazon Web Services (AWS) training; and solution for management consultant roles, such as examining existing information security risks, system architecture weaknesses, improving system performance, and lowering corporate expense on IT. It serves traditional industries; public sectors; banks; and media, gaming, and travel industries, as well as startups. eCloudvalley Digital Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 2013 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Yankey Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Yankey Engineering Co., Ltd. offers engineering services in Taiwan. Its projects include clean room constant temperature and humidity engineering; HVAC commercial fine air conditioning; and high and low voltage transmission, fire system, process pipeline system, water supply and drainage system, process exhaust system, and monitoring and weak current system installation engineering, as well as green energy technology services. Yankey Engineering Co., Ltd. was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in New Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Acmepoint Energy Services Co.,Ltd.
summary: Acmepoint Energy Services Co.,Ltd. provides engineering, procurement, construction consultancy, construction, and operation warranty and maintenance services for solar power stations in Taiwan and internationally. The company also offers solar systems, grid connected PV systems, standalone PV systems, solar hot water systems, biomass energy generation systems, and energy storage systems. In addition, it provides BIPV and BAPV system integration services, and solar system and station services. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Inergy Technology Inc.
summary: Inergy Technology Inc. engages in the development and sale of integrated power components that are optimized for system applications. It also provides integrated power modules for motor drives and ceiling fan air cleaners. The company was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

summary: iCatch Technology, Inc. designs and sells fabless IC. It also provides SoC for consumer imaging devices for use in digital still, action, home security, body worn, trail, 3D sensing, surveillance, and VR cameras, as well as digital video recorders, factory automation, automated stores, and home appliances. The company was founded in 2009 and is headquartered in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: MARTAS Precision Slide Co., Ltd.
summary: MARTAS Precision Slide Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells ball bearing slides for various applications in Taiwan. Its products are used in server rails, cabinets, and cloud computing devices; tool cabinets, fire cabinets, ATM machines, ending machines, POS machines, and upright open showcases; and office furniture, computer desks, copy machines, and fax machines, as well as in kitchen cabinets, dish washers, ovens, and refrigerators. The company's products are also used for automotive applications, such as in sliding arm rests, under seat and glove box storage, and luggage compartments; and residential applications for living rooms, TV cabinets, bedrooms, closets, cupboards, and restaurants. MARTAS Precision Slide Co.,Ltd was founded in 1996 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Advagene Biopharma Co., Ltd.
summary: Advagene Biopharma Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of vaccine technology and related products in Taiwan. Its products in development include nasal spray influenza vaccine, allergy vaccines, other vaccines, etc. The company was founded in 1995 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

summary: SmartDisplayer Technology Co., Ltd. develops, manufactures, and sells smart display cards in Taiwan and internationally. It also offers IC, segmented e-paper, module, and firmware design; semiconductor and graphic e-paper integration; emulation kit; and credit card personalization services, as well as various OTP seed perso solutions. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Keelung, Taiwan.

summary: uPI Semiconductor Corp., an IC design company, designs and manufactures analog and mixed-signal power management solutions in electronic systems in Taiwan and internationally. The company also provides application and interface, ultra speed, tiny package speed, high surge, and high voltage TVS products; OP-amplifiers; bio sensors; and GaN solutions. uPI Semiconductor Corp. was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Zhubei, Taiwan.

The company was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

summary: Femco Steel Technology Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, markets, and distributes steel golf shafts to golf club original equipment manufacturers and distributors worldwide. The company offers steel shafts under the FST and KBS brand names. Femco Steel Technology Co., Ltd. is based in Chiayi, Taiwan.

The company is also involved in developing bio-orthopaedic devices and treatment methods to fulfill unmet clinical needs. BioGend Therapeutics Co., Ltd. was founded in 2016 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

It offers PixoTest Blood Glucose Monitoring System and PixoTest POCT System for chronic diseases management; Eveline Smart Fertility System for women's health management; and systems for infectious disease management, as well as PixoHealth App, which measures, records, and uploads test readings to the cloud. As of March 19, 2020, the company operated nine discount ticket stores in Las Vegas under its Tix4Tonight marquee; and tix4tonight.com, an online ticket sales site. In addition, it provides online booking services for shows, concerts, tours, attractions, and other entertainment and leisure activities. The company was formerly known as Cinema Ride, Inc. and changed its name to Tix Corporation in March 2005. Tix Corporation was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Studio City, California.

name: Lungteh Shipbuilding Co., Ltd.
summary: Lungteh Shipbuilding Co, Ltd. designs and builds ships. It engages in building work boats, including environmental services craft and other special purpose vessels, as well as passenger ferries and naval combat boats. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Dongshan, Taiwan.

name: Wendel
summary: Wendel is a private equity firm specializing in equity financing in middle markets and later stages through leveraged buy-out transactions. It invests in both listed and non-listed companies. The firm seeks to invest in United States, Canada, Africa, Europe, and European Developed Markets. It invests between √Ç¬Ä250 million ($305.51 million) and √Ç¬Ä500 million ($611.03 million) in companies. It prefers to take a majority stake in its portfolio companies. The firm seeks to take a seat on the board of directors or supervisory board of its portfolio companies. It makes balance sheet investments. summary: Ace Edulink Co., Ltd. provides small to high school short-term study and tutoring services. The company was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

Powerchip Semiconductor Manufacturing Corp. operates as a subsidiary of Powerchip Technology Corporation.

Entire Technology Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2003 and is headquartered in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Study King Co., Ltd.
summary: Study King Co., Ltd. provides digital learning content. It offers high school audio-visual interactive teaching materials. The company was founded in 2012 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tsky Co.,Ltd
summary: Tsky Co., Ltd. engages in the design, development, manufacture, and sale of GPS watches and bands, and wearable devices that are used for golf, running, cycling, swimming, and track record. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in Zhubei City, Taiwan.

The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

Its CMOS image sensor products are used in various areas, such as digital cameras, camera phones, web cameras, notebooks, security devices, automobiles, and miniature imaging devices used in medical applications. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan. VisEra Technologies Company Limited is a subsidiary of Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company Limited.

summary: Yuen Foong Yu Consumer Products Co., Ltd produces and sells household paper in Taiwan. The company is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

summary: Unictron Technologies Corp. engages in the development, manufacture, and sale of antennas and piezoelectric ceramic elements for use in various electronic devices in Taiwan and internationally. It also offers over-voltage and over-current circuit protection components comprising spark gaps, gas tubes, thyristors, transient voltage suppressors, ZnO-based varistors, PPTC resettable fuses, and other fuses. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Hsin-Chu, Taiwan.

summary: Tien Li Offshore Wind Technology Co., Ltd. produces and sells wind turbine blades, wind turbine molds, and other products. It also provides offshore wind operation and maintenance, as well as blade or composite materials research and development technical advisory services. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

summary: Medimaging Integrated Solution Inc. provides digital and portable diagnostic solutions. It designs and manufactures digital hand-held diagnostic scopes, as well as auxiliary tools. The company was founded in 2010 and is based in Hsinchu, Taiwan.

name: ECOVE Environment Corp.

It finances, plans, constructs, operates, and maintains energy-from-waste plants, hazardous and special waste treatment plants, water and wastewater treatment plants, photovoltaic power plants, and resource reclamation and treatment plants. The company's services include operations and maintenance, consulting, and investment and development of public and private entities. It also offers technical and consulting services, such as mechatronics system and equipment maintenance and upgrade, commissioning, and testing for energy-from-waste, railway, waste management, and public utility sectors. name: Winston Medical Supply Co.,Ltd
summary: Winston Medical Supply Co.,Ltd. engages in the development, manufacture, and distribution of pharmaceuticals, nutrition supplements, and cosmeceutical products. Its products are used in 5G, electric car, IoT, ehealth, network communication, and industrial control applications. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

summary: Qbic Technology Co., Ltd. develops and sells commercial and industrial grade devices in Taiwan. The company provides smart panel-PCs, embedded and fanless ARM box-PCs, fanless AI edge computers, embedded and fanless x86 box-PCs, single board computers, OQupancy manager devices, kiosks, and accessories It offers devices for facility management, embedded computing, retail and hospitality solution, interactive smart technology, and design and manufacturing. The company is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Brinno Incorporated
summary: Brinno Incorporated designs, develops, produces, and sells imaging devices. The company offers time lapse, construction, and outdoor security cameras; camera kits; and smart home security products, as well as time lapse accessories. It also provides contact tracing COVID-19 products; and Friday home smart locks. The company offers its products through distributors worldwide. Brinno Incorporated was founded in 2003 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Mortech Corporation
summary: Mortech Corporation develops and provides polyimide films in Taiwan. Its products include PIF, PIN, PIB/PMB, PIA/PAB, and PIT type polyimide films. The company was founded in 2004 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Fluxtek International Corp.
summary: Fluxtek International Corp. manufactures and sells RO water purification equipment in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers compact systems, residential systems, purifier systems, commercial systems, dispensers, filters/membranes, housing caps, pumps/transformers, tanks/faucets, fittings, and coconut shell carbon products. It also provides accessories, such as leak detectors, housing wrenches, shut off valves, pressure regulators, flow restrictors, mini digital TDS meters, pressure gauges, high and low pressure switches, solenoid and needle valves, and control boxes. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Pingtung City, Taiwan.

name: Enrestec Inc.
summary: Enrestec Inc engages in the pyrolysis and recycling of used plastic, rubber, and organic wastes. It is also involved in the development of soil thermal desorption technology and application. The company was incorporated in 1994 and is based in Pingtung, Taiwan.

name: Intumit Inc.
summary: Intumit, Inc. provides artificial intelligence and CX solutions primarily in China. The company's products include SmartRobot, a solution to help enterprises in establishing automate smart service platforms across Websites, FB Messenger, LINE, WeChat, WhatsApp, Microsoft Services, APPs, and other channels; SmartKMS, a cognitive knowledge management system; SmartWork, a Microsoft 365 internal helpdesk; WFH solutions, a personal internal helpdesk assistant for information technology, human resource, call centers, and other areas; AOG, a Google assistant solution; SmartForce, a solution for customer interaction; SmartNow, a workplace management solution; SmartXP, a customer engagement solution; and Smartonnect, a solution to collect customers' interests and info from conversations and speech dialogues. It primarily serves financial services, insurance, healthcare, retail/FMCG, public service/education, tourism/transportation, and manufacturing sectors. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Flashaim Inc.
summary: Flashaim Inc. provides digital marketing services to major portals and messaging software of Yahoo, Google, LINE, Facebook, and Bing and other advertising agencies. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Yeedex Electronic Corporation
summary: Yeedex Electronic Corporation provides parts, materials, and sub-systems for semiconductor process equipment in Taiwan and China. The company offers fine ceramic parts and materials; perfluoroelastomer seals; precision vacuum chucks; refurbish and repair precious parts, including ESC, heaters, vacuum chucks, ceramic coatings, anodizing products, etc.; plasma coated chamber parts; quartz and others parts; tungsten carbide blades; and heat resistant phosphor plates. It also serves flat display panel, passive electronic component, LED, solar cell, automobile, medical, and special material industries. The company also exports its products to other Asian and American countries. Yeedex Electronic Corporation was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Bryton Inc.
summary: Bryton Inc. develops, sells, and retails GPS cycle computers and accessories in Taiwan and internationally. It also operates an online store for products. The company was founded in 1998 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Bioray Biotech Co., Ltd
summary: BioRay Biotech Co., Ltd. engages in the development and manufacture of biological agents. Its biological agents include functional probiotics, medicinal fungi, and immune cell preparations. The company was founded in 1994 is based in Pingtung, Taiwan.

name: Argo Yachts Development Co.,Ltd.
summary: Argo Yachts Development Co., Ltd. engages in the operation of water recreation activities and ship leasing business in Taiwan. The company was founded in 2003 is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Pharmigene, Inc.
summary: PharmiGene, Inc. develops, manufactures, and sells diagnostic tests worldwide. It primarily develops DNA genetic tests. The company was founded in 2005 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Koryo Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Koryo Electronics Co., Ltd. engages in the production, sale, and import/export of electronic parts and components, and computers and computer peripherals. It also imports/exports electric appliances and components, such as TV sets, video and radio cassette recorders, air conditioners, refrigerators, and microwave ovens; and acts as an agent for related products of Taiwan and international companies on sales, bids, and quotes. The company was founded in 1987 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: OPNET Technologies Co., Ltd.
summary: OPNET Technologies Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and markets telecommunication network access and optical transport equipment worldwide. Its access network products include DLC/E1-MUX/IP-MUX, MSAN/SVG, Mini-DSLAM, VoIP gateway, and GPON; and transmission network products comprise CWDM/DWDM/ROADM, carrier grade switching platform, fiber optical multiplexers, TDMo-PSN, Ethernet over PDH, and G.SHDSL.bis bridges/routers. The company also offers enterprise network products, such as EPON; distribution network products that consist of telecom cables, ODF/FDC, FOSC, FDP/FDB, and box panels, as well as accessories; and submarine cable systems, including submarine power, submarine optical fiber, optical fiber composite submarine, special underwater, and high voltage power cables, as well as transoceanic communication system accessories. In addition, the company provides fiber optic sensor solutions; and supports network planning, installation, training, and maintenance services. It serves incumbent fixed-network operators, mobile operators, cable TV operators, utility companies, enterprises, and military entities. The company was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: Changs Ascending Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Changs Ascending Enterprise Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, manufacture, and sale of rechargeable batteries and cell materials in Taiwan. The company offers vehicle batteries, including starter batteries for golf carts, forklifts, and hybrids and E-cars; and electronic storage systems (ESS) and uninterruptible power supply (UPS) systems for use in office and home applications, ESS UPC backup power, off the grid applications, and solar LED lights. It also provides grid and industrial ESS/UPS energy storage and back-up systems for large UPS, micro grid ESS, mission critical UPS, and traffic light back-up applications. The company was formerly known as Changs Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Changs Ascending Enterprise Co., Ltd. in July 2000. Changs Ascending Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Taiwan Chinsan Electronic Industrial Co., Ltd.

Taiwan Chinsan Electronic Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1970 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Honey Hope Honesty Enterprise Co.,Ltd
summary: Honey Hope Honesty Enterprise Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the sales agency of multilayer ceramic capacitors and inductors in passive components in Taiwan, Asia, and internationally. It provides electronic components, and related products. The company also engages in investment activities. Honey Hope Honesty Enterprise Co.,Ltd was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

It also operates portals that provide a range of network services, including news platforms, stock markets, email, Kaza personal blog, news, travel, car-buying, customized photo album, search channels, etc., as well as online adverting services, such as display advertising and display network. In addition, the company offers type II telecommunications, magazine publication, international trade and investment, online payment processing, travel agency, information, transportation and logistics, clothing sales, information processing, electronic information, and Internet services. PChome Online Inc. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: two

The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

It also provides original and joint design manufacturing services, such as board/system specification design, software design, manufacturing, validation, and after services. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

It also provides mobile device, data link, USB flash disk, and SSD storage controllers, as well as SD card controllers. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

The company also provides SSDs, SD/microSD cards and USB modules, FDM modules, conformal coatings, and anti-sulfur modules. name: QST International Corp.
summary: QST International Corp. manufactures and sells automotive fasteners and metal parts worldwide. It provides proprietary fasteners, such as screws and induction hardened bolts; and auto fasteners, including weld bolts and weld studs, screws and washer assemblies, multi-die headed pins and rivets, and special screws per print, as well as internal, external, and non-fasteners. The company also offers third party testing and consulting services, as well as training services; and logistics services, including tailored services that consist of JIT, kanban, VMI, Bar Code, 2 Bin, in-house crib and products integration, localization, joint design, and value analysis and engineering to OEM assembly plants, as well as operates Halofast.com/VMI, a Web-based EDI platform to provide remote VMI service. QST International Corp. was founded in 1985 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells self-adhesive labels in Taiwan. It offers release papers, including PE coated Kraft, glassine, clay coated Kraft, and super calandered Kraft paper; film release liners, such as PET, PP, and HDPE release liners; and adhesive tapes, such as surface protective films, adhesive transfer tapes, and film and non-woven tissue double sided adhesive tapes. The company also provides PSA label materials comprising paper, film, tamper evident, and re-sealable labels; and thermal and UV release film tapes, and PE laminated non-woven products, as well as contract coatings. It serves decorative, electronics and optoelectronics, automobiles, logistics, food and beverage, and consumer commodity industries. The company was formerly known as Koan Hao Enterprise Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. in 2013. Koan Hao Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1992 and is headquartered in Nantou City, Taiwan.

name: Cashbox Partyworld Co., Ltd.
summary: Cashbox Partyworld Co., Ltd. primarily engages in the karaoke business in Taiwan and China. The company conducts its operations through Services Industries segment. It offers karaoke entertainment services. The company is also involved the distribution and trade of karaoke equipment and supplies; sale of food and beverages; retail of stationery, toys, entertainment products, books, and tobacco; and management consulting business. It operates 12 branches and 16 direct stores. The company was formerly known as Cashbox Consulting Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Cashbox Partyworld Co., Ltd. in September 2000. Cashbox Partyworld Co., Ltd. was founded in 1986 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Jiin Yeeh Ding Enterprises Corp.
summary: Jiin Yeeh Ding Enterprises Corp. engages in recycling and refining precious metals in Taiwan. It operates professional cleaning and recycling facilities that clean shutters, recycle precious metals, sift disintegrated materials, and prevent pollution, as well as owns recycling and cleaning vehicles. The company serves semiconductor, printer circuit, computer components, electro-optical, passive components, telecommunication, and other industries. Jiin Yeen Ding Enterprise Corp. was founded in 1997 and is based in Hsinchu City, Taiwan.

name: ShareHope Medicine Co., Ltd.
summary: ShareHope Medicine Co., Ltd. provides integrated medical services in Taiwan. It engages in the health management and operation activities; human resource dispatch of professional medical staff; provision of medical, pharmaceutical, and health devices, as well as long-distance health care services; and rental of medical devices. The company was founded in 2003 and is based in Taoyuan, Taiwan.

name: Ginko International Co., Ltd.
summary: Ginko International Co., Ltd., together with its subsidiaries, manufactures and sells non-disposable and disposable contact lenses, and lens care products in China, Germany, the United Kingdom, Australia, Poland, Canada, Brazil, Iran, and internationally. The company offers various optical products, such as high definition contact lenses, toric lenses, cosmetic lenses, and others, as well as lens solutions under the Horien and Hydron brands. Ginko International Co., Ltd. was founded in 2007 and is based in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: EBM Technologies Incorporated
summary: EBM Technologies Incorporated develops and markets software and integrity solutions to the health sector in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers Enterprise PACS (picture archiving and communication systems), including SoliPACS that unites various products of the radiology, mammography, and dental fields; SoliPACS Gateway, a DICOM gateway; SoliPACS Server, an interface between HIS and RIS patient data and PACS; SoliPACS Web Viewer, which enables radiologists and physicians to view DICOM-compliant images, compare them to examination results, utilize image enhancement tools, and select images for review; SoliPACS Report that offers a tool for generating customized reports; and Advanced Server Archive, a PACS storage system. It also provides MobiPACS applications, which allow clinicians to retrieve, view, and compare various medical images; MobiPACS Server to store, process, and retrieve image files for mobile devices; MobiPACS App, an in mobile medical image viewing app; MobiPACS Web Viewer for viewing images from Internet-enabled end devices; and MobiPACS Share, a cloud-based platform. In addition, the company offers MobiPACS Multi that supports doctors to connect various iPads/iPad Pros for image display; Vital-Sign On-the-Go, a patient monitoring solution; Rad@, which enables doctors and radiologists to view medical-grade images and diagnose; and Digital Pathology scanner. Further, it provides Telemed, which interlinks medical facilities; Electronic Medical Record, a digital version of the paper-based individual medical record for patients' medical history; Personal Health Record that offers electronic access to the individual's medical history; and eHealth solutions for retrieving and reviewing patient images, sign data, and ECG waveforms, as well as technical and after sales services. EBM Technologies Incorporated was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Sentien Printing Factory Co., Ltd.
summary: Sentien Printing Factory Co., Ltd. produces, supplies, and sells heat transfer, insert mold, and in-mold label and release foils in Taiwan. Its heat transfer films are used in house wares, cosmetics, stationeries, appliances, and janitorial applications; and in-mold labels are used in plastic plates or cups applications. The company's in-mold decoration films are used in consumer electronic products, appliances, and automotive interior components applications; and insert molding films are used in smart appliances, and interior and exterior of automobiles and motorbikes applications. Sentien Printing Factory Co., Ltd. was founded in 1956 and is based in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Brighton-Best International (Taiwan) Inc.
summary: Brighton-Best International (Taiwan) Inc. sells screws and nuts primarily in Taiwan, North America, and Oceania. It also engages in import, export, and sale of aluminum products; and investment activities. The company was founded in 2007 and is based in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Solidwizard Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Solidwizard Technology Co., Ltd. provides software, hardware, and consulting service solutions in Taiwan and China. The company offers CAID, CAD, RP, RE, CAE, CAM, and PDM solutions. It also provides subscription services; 3D CAD, product data management, simulation solution, technical communication, CAM, and education software products; 3D printer and scanner products; and collaborative robots. The company was founded in 1997 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Polygreen Resources Co., Ltd.
summary: Polygreen Resources Co., Ltd., an investment holding company, engages in resource recycling and environmental protection business in Malaysia. The company manufactures and sells Tyrec, a tyrec reclaimed rubber for use in tires, conveyor belts, inner tubes, ring pads, rubber matting, shoe soles, vibration pads, dock fenders, and other rubber products; Burec, a butyl reclaimed rubber for use in butyl inner tubes, tire inner liners, butyl adhesives, and other butyl rubber-related products; and Narec, a natural inner tube reclaimed rubber for use in rubber matting, shoe soles, and other rubber products. Its products also comprise T-Mesh, a crumb rubber for use in various applications in rubber products as compounding substitute, such as tire, ring pads, and rubber matting; and rubber granules that are recycled from the tire and industrial rubber waste that is used in the underlayment for running tracks, children's playgrounds, gym, and rubber tiles. The company also exports its products to Japan, Europe, Taiwan, Vietnam, the Philippines, Indonesia, Thailand, Pakistan, China, the Middle East, Australia, Singapore, and internationally. It serves manufacturers in the tire and conveyor-belt industries. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Grand Cayman, the Cayman Islands.

name: Wellpool Co., Ltd.
summary: Wellpool Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells fireproof and environmental protection green building materials. It offers calcium silicate and fiber cement boards. The company was founded in 1981 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Superior Plating Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: Superior Plating Technology Co., Ltd. operates as a surface treatment company in Taiwan. The company engages in the research and development of metal and plastic surface treatment technology and manufacturing services. It also provides plating services for the semiconductor lead frames, terminals, strips, and LED stents. In addition, the company provides plating services for HDD products, medical equipment, auto parts, connectors, and OA products; and anodizing services to 3C products and industrial products. Superior Plating Technology Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: TSH Biopharm Corporation Limited
summary: TSH Biopharm Corporation Limited develops and markets medicines for chronic diseases in Taiwan. It offers products for cardiovascular, central nervous, gastrointestinal, and others, as well as liquid-biopsy diagnosis. The company is headquartered in Taipei city, Taiwan. TSH Biopharm Corporation Limited is a subsidiary of TTY Biopharm Company Limited.

name: Bon Fame Co., Ltd.
summary: Bon Fame Co., Ltd. operates in fashion market in Taiwan. It offers hair accessories, jewelry, hairstyling products, beauty tools, bags and purses, fashion accessories, and novelty products, as well as event products, such as kid's masks. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Zimmite Taiwan Ltd.
summary: Zimmite Taiwan Ltd. engages in the industrial water treatment activities in Taiwan and China. It offers cooling water treatment agents, such as corrosion inhibitors, scale inhibitors, algaecides, biocides, rust removers, and cooling water all-in-one tablets; and boiler water treatment agents, including internal treatment additives, oxygen scavengers, neutralizing amines, and filming amines. The company also provides boiler fireside treatment additives comprising fuel oil additives and soot removers; and oil refinery and petrochemical process additives consisting of corrosion inhibitors, antifoulants, desalting agents, demulsifiers√Ç¬ñemulsion breakers, antifoamers/defoamers, metal passivating agents, polymerization inhibitors, and antioxidants. In addition, it offers wastewater treatment agents, including polymer flocculants, dewatering aids, heavy metal chelators, deodorants, and COD degradation agents; slow release tablets, such as cooling water treatment tablets, drain pan slime preventive tablets, and chlorine donors; and RO and scrubber chemicals. Further, the company provides environmental protection testing and technical services; water treatment technology supports; and oil mud dispersants, as well as sells water treatment raw materials. It primarily serves oil refineries and petrochemicals production plants, steel mills, power generation plants, office buildings, textile manufacturing processes, plastic manufacturing plants and processors, electronic manufacturing sector, and public facilities. Zimmite Taiwan Ltd. was founded in 1977 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Dadi Early-Childhood Education Group Limited
summary: Dadi Early-Childhood Education Group Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides early childhood education management consulting services in Mainland China, Hong Kong, and Taiwan. It offers campus development, classroom decoration, curriculum design, and teaching materials and teaching aids development services; early childhood education supplies; preschool textbooks and toys; and preschool software. The company also wholesales and retails cultural and education products, musical instruments, educational and entertainment materials, computers and office equipment, and information software; and leases office equipment and teaching devices. In addition, it engages in the trading business; IPRs; provision of system integration services; books, audio, and software publication business; and provision of management consultation, general advertising, product design, art and culture, agent, convention and exhibition, and overseas study services. The company was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in George Town, the Cayman Islands.

name: Amia Co.,Ltd
summary: Amia Co.,Ltd manufactures and sells copper sulfate in Taiwan. It also offers oxides and carbonates. The company also exports its products. Amia Co.,Ltd was founded in 1974 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Pili International Multimedia Co.,Ltd.
summary: Pili International Multimedia Co.,Ltd. produces and distributes dramatic puppetry series in Taiwan. It is also involved in the Pili satellite television station; production and distribution of DVD's and soundtrack; performance and movie activities; publications and posters, etc.; and licensing development of peripheral products. In addition, the company fan club and cosplay activity; operates puppetry community Website; manages allied counters and boutiques in Taiwan; and produces and distributes 3D animation. The company was formerly known as Da Chih Entertainment Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Pili International Multimedia Co.,Ltd. in August 2000. Pili International Multimedia Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Tekho Marine Biotech Co., Ltd
summary: Tekho Marine Biotech Co., Ltd researches and develops aquatic and aquarium products in Taiwan and internationally. It offers blood fish, larva fish, and adult fish, as well as giant, leopard coral, tiger, and orange-spotted grouper. The company also develops hardware-software products; and imports peripheral products of aquarium fish. In addition, it publishes aquarium books. Tekho Marine Biotech Co., Ltd was founded in 1965 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: GOMAJI Corp., LTD
summary: GOMAJI Corp., LTD provides e-commerce and advertising services in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Kuobrothers Corp.
summary: Kuobrothers Corp. operates B2C e-commerce business under the Living Bazaar name In Taiwan. The company provides online shopping platform for daily consumables, electric apparatuses, household commodities, storage and decoration devices, and delicacies. It also operates online trading platforms under the MobiX and MySport brand names. The company was founded in 2012 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: ELTA Technology Co.,Ltd.
summary: ELTA Technology Co.,Ltd. operates platform for digital content in Taiwan. The company has library of digital content and broadband-delivered AV materials. It offers IP/TV (STB or MOD), PC/TV, VOD, and mobile TV, as well as large-sized data transfer technology and wireless communications support services. The company was founded in 2000 and is based in Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Samebest Co., Ltd.
summary: Samebest Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development of digital cloud curriculum systems primarily in Taiwan. The company also develops personalized action learning solutions through the integration of virtual reality. Its products cover high school, junior high school, middle and upper grades primary school, lower middle grade primary school, kindergarten, and preschool. The company was founded in 2006 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Eagle Cold Storage Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Eagle Cold Storage Enterprise Co., Ltd. engages in the processing and trade of vegetables and meat products in Taiwan. It offers frozen beef, hot pot meat, and canned products, as well as imports and sells meat, french fries, green beans, and other commodities. The company also develops, constructs, leases, and sells residential houses. In addition, it is involved in the cold storage, warehousing, logistics, and distribution business. The company was founded in 1990 and is based in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: Forward Graphic Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Forward Graphic Enterprise Co., Ltd. operates in the printing industry in Taiwan. The company provides product design, prepress, printing equipment, and post press services. It offers printing services for various packages, such as boxes, gift boxes, chocolate boxes, and bags; books; notebooks; catalogue/flyers; calendars; and special, DIY, and ECO friendly products. The company was founded in 1968 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: ShinHsiung Natural Gas Inc.
summary: ShinHsiung Natural Gas Inc. supplies natural gas in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1975 and is based in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells apparel in Taiwan, China, Vietnam, and Japan. The company operates through Apparel department, Down Material Department, and Home Textile Department segments. It offers down and bedding; wholesale of outdoor supplies, household wares, clothing, and related packaging materials; food; and import and export of goods and technology. The company provides down products, including natural down, water repellent down, antibacterial deodorant down, color down, and flame retardant, as well as Thermobrid plus products for use in outdoor and home textile. In addition, it provides clothing products, such as snowboard wear, skiing wear, mountain climbing jackets, seamless wind and rain-proof jackets, biking wear, sportswear, jeans, casual jackets and pants, etc. Further, it manufactures winter quilts, cushions, seating pads, sofas, pillows, sleeping bags, gloves, and home decoration products. It also offers bedding products under the Kong lung brand. Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd.
summary: Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells apparel in Taiwan, China, Vietnam, and Japan. The company operates through Apparel department, Down Material Department, and Home Textile Department segments. It offers down and bedding; wholesale of outdoor supplies, household wares, clothing, and related packaging materials; food; and import and export of goods and technology. The company provides down products, including natural down, water repellent down, antibacterial deodorant down, color down, and flame retardant, as well as Thermobrid plus products for use in outdoor and home textile. In addition, it provides clothing products, such as snowboard wear, skiing wear, mountain climbing jackets, seamless wind and rain-proof jackets, biking wear, sportswear, jeans, casual jackets and pants, etc. Further, it manufactures winter quilts, cushions, seating pads, sofas, pillows, sleeping bags, gloves, and home decoration products. It also offers bedding products under the Kong lung brand. Kwong Lung Enterprise Co., Ltd. was founded in 1966 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: CKM Applied Materials Corp.
summary: CKM Applied Materials Corp. develops metal building materials in Taiwan. The company offers ceiling suspension systems, such as exposed T grids and partition frame systems; metal ceilings, including flat, perforated, embossed, mesh, baffle, curve, linear grid, honeycomb, extrusion, crossing, triangular, strip, and cell ceilings; and micro-perforated acoustical panels. Its products are used in governmental buildings, hospitals, schools, department stores, hotels, factories, public and residential buildings, and commercial buildings. The company was formerly known as CKM Building Material Corp. and changed its name to CKM Applied Materials Corp. in July 2017. The company was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Tainan city, Taiwan.

name: Ta-Yuan Cogeneration Company Ltd.
summary: Ta-Yuan Cogeneration Company Ltd. generates and supplies electricity and heat to Dayuan industrial park in Taiwan. It operates and manages cogeneration plants. The company also engages in operating and repairing equipment, processing waste disposal, managing incinerators, producing petrochemical materials, and processing refuse derived fuel. Ta-Yuan Cogeneration Company Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Taoyuan City, Taiwan.

name: Max Zipper Co., Ltd.
summary: Max Zipper Co., Ltd. manufactures and markets zippers worldwide. It offers nylon, delrin, metal, invisible, specialized, water repellent, heat transfer, pattern tape, coil vacuum, satin tape, chameleon, reflective, spear teach, weave tape, delrin inkjet, and contrast slit zippers; invisible, nylon, delrin, metal, and tape attachable sliders; plastic and spring lock sliders; and metal, plastic, diamante, cord, leather, woven, and stone pullers. The company also provides special slider treatment, such as pattern coating and double plating services. Max Zipper Co., Ltd. offers its products under the MAX brand. The company was formerly known as Horng Dah Zippers Co. Ltd. and changed its name to Max Zipper Co., Ltd. in September 2009. Max Zipper Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Taipei, Taiwan.

name: Ideal Bike Corporation
summary: Ideal Bike Corporation manufactures and sells bicycles worldwide. The company was founded in 1980 and is headquartered in Taichung, Taiwan.

name: Pontex Polyblend Co.,Ltd
summary: Pontex Polyblend Co., Ltd. engages in footwear injection molding and engineering plastics compound materials businesses in Taiwan. It offers ABS, PC, nylon, PP, PBT, NPE, TPU, PLA, PBS, and r-PET plastic products for applications in the areas of 3C/electronic products, industrial equipment parts, auto/moto parts, household goods, sports/toy parts, and medical supplies. The company also provides sports equipment, such as baseball, football, soccer, and bicycle outsoles; and shoe components, including midsoles, shanks, and counters. In addition, it manufactures various women vamps injection products on an OEM basis for the CROCS' brand. Pontex Polyblend Co., Ltd. was founded in 1982 and is headquartered in Taichung City, Taiwan.

name: Kuo Toong International Co., Ltd.
summary: Kuo Toong International Co., Ltd. designs, produces, and assembles water supply and division pipes in Taiwan. The company offers various concrete products, including prestressed concrete cylinder and non-cylinder pipes, reinforced concrete pipes, reinforced concrete cylinder pipes, concrete pipes for sewerage in jacking method, prestressed beams, precast prestressed concrete culverts, manholes for sewerage, shield-segments, and other concrete products. It also provides ductile iron pipes, DI flexible pipes, connecting closures, and accessories; and various steel pipe items comprising coated steel pipes for water service, polyethylene coated and lined steel pipes, steel pipes by jacking method, steel flexible pipe joints, connecting closures, fittings, and weight-coated offshore pipes. In addition, the company offers services for the design, manufacturing, and construction of water supply and division pipes through no-dig jacking methods; and specific mechanical equipment and plant set up, and operation of seawater desalination, water, and sewage water. Kuo Toong International Co., Ltd. was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Advanced International Multitech Co., Ltd.
summary: Advanced International Multitech Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells golf club heads, shafts, golf club sets, golf balls, carbon fiber components, aviation products, and composite materials worldwide. The company offers various golf products, including metal woods, irons/wedges, putters, graphite shafts, and club assemblies; carbon fiber bicycle components, such as frames, forks, and parts; DIZO bicycles; and investment casting services for components of aircraft interior, bike, industrial, and hardware in titanium and stainless steel. It also provides composite products, such as aircraft interiors comprising seat backrests, seat pads, and seat arm rests; automotive products consisting of engine covers, spoilers, and driving shafts; electronic device protectors, such as laptop carbon covers and pad soft goods; and industrial structures, including robot arm accessories, frame tubes, and assistive devices. In addition, the company offers prepreg products. Advanced International Multitech Co., Ltd. was founded in 1987 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung, Taiwan.

name: Xxentria Technology Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Xxentria Technology Materials Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells metal composite materials worldwide. The company develops products with metal and plastic components. It offers exterior facades cladding and interior furnishing for new buildings, as well as refurbishment; and lacquer coated solid aluminum panels, as well as anodized and PVD-coating materials for architectural applications. The company also provides solar receiver tubes and tube coatings; and reflective composites materials for solar thermal applications. In addition, it offers wall and door panels for truck and trailer bodies; galvanized steel composite panels; and high tensile aluminum composite panels for transportation applications. The company was founded in 1994 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Tittot Company Limited
summary: Tittot Company Limited provides glass-art products in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1994 and is based in New Taipei City, Taiwan.

name: Eminent Luggage Corporation
summary: Eminent Luggage Corporation designs, manufactures, and sells luggage products worldwide. The company provides a range of ABS, PP, PC, nylon, and polyester cases; bags and leisure products; and hard shell and beauty cases, soft luggage, trolleys, suitcase sets, business suitcases, and laptop backpacks. It offers its products under the Eminent, Case-Star, Mine, and Probeetle brands. Eminent Luggage Corporation was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tainan City, Taiwan.

name: Macauto Industrial Co., Ltd.
summary: Macauto Industrial Co., Ltd. engages in the manufacture and sale of automotive sunshade products. The company offers automotive interiors, such as Sunshades for roof systems, luggage cover systems, side and rear window shades, wind deflectors, divider net systems, and mobile phone/tablet holder. It also provides garden tools, including cordless electric mower, electric wheelbarrows, and robotic golf caddy cart. Macauto Industrial Co., Ltd. was founded in 1979 and is headquartered in Tainan, Taiwan.

name: Yieh United Steel Corp.
summary: Yieh United Steel Corp. produces and sells stainless steel products in Taiwan and internationally. The company offers stainless steel billets, hot rolled black coils and plates, coils and sheets, cold rolled coils and sheets, and slabs for home and office uses, and industrial and transport applications, as well as for architecture, building, and construction applications. It also provides carbon steel products, including carbon steel slabs, billets, blacks, and plates for industrial applications. The company was founded in 1988 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Dacome International Ltd.
summary: Dacome International Ltd. distributes golf brands in Taiwan, the United States, and Japan. The company offers balls, golf products, footwear, bags, apparel, hats, belts, gloves, accessories, audiovisual books, team gifts, and gift certificates, as well as training supplies. It also markets its products through its Website, golfshop.com.tw; and provides golf equipment bidding, golf courses booking, golf tours at home and abroad, golf skills teaching, handicap system, etc. The company was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.

name: Yeou Yih Steel Co., Ltd.
summary: Yeou Yih Steel Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells hot rolled stainless steel plates and flat bars primarily in Taiwan. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Kaohsiung City, Taiwan.
